instruction: The **SMB Work Order System API (SAPI)** serves Charter Communications' Small & Medium Business (SMB) division by providing a streamlined interface to using DataWeave Transform, Error Handling, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /${app.name}/api/${app.version}/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">
    
    <flow name="smb-workorder-sapi-main">

        <error-handler>

				<set-variable variableName="httpStatus" value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set HTTP Status Code" />
                <json-logger:logger doc:name="logError" doc:id="366c9c5a-8256-4686-8d40-840e664e6036" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="#['After Receiving Error']" tracePoint="EXCEPTION"/>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="smb-workorder-sapi-console">
                <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/${app.name}/api/${app.version}/console/*">

output application/json

instruction: The **sf-eom-attachment-papi** (Salesforce EOM Attachment Process API) is a MuleSoft Process API that provides a unified interface for managing file a using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, Salesforce Query

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:email="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email" xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email/current/mule-email.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd">
    
	<flow name="get:\api\v1\attachments\(Id):sf-eom-attachment-papi-config">
        <ee:transform doc:name="Set URI parameter">
            <ee:variables>
                <ee:set-variable variableName="Id">attributes.uriParams.'Id'</ee:set-variable>
            </ee:variables>
        </ee:transform>
        <json-logger:logger doc:name="Log Parent ID" doc:id="01312180-3118-4ef2-a04e-43b680a32579" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Parent ID" tracePoint="BEFORE_REQUEST">
			<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
{
    ParentID: JSONLoggerModule::stringifyNonJSON(vars.Id),
    requestPath: attributes.maskedRequestPath
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<salesforce:query doc:name="Query to fetch files list" doc:id="c57963e1-d838-477a-ab54-7971a7b6161c" config-ref="PEGA_Salesforce_Config">
			<salesforce:salesforce-query ><![CDATA[select Id,Name,Description,CreatedDate, CreatedBy.name,Owner.name,parent.type from Attachment where ParentId=':Id']]></salesforce:salesforce-query>
			<salesforce:parameters ><![CDATA[#[{
	"Id": vars.Id
}]]]></salesforce:parameters>
		</salesforce:query>
						<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="140270ae-8629-42e3-90fd-8feae5f17390" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
payload]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log after querying attachmnets" doc:id="cf5ba5ad-64d5-4caf-a08b-883b7a2883ac" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After query"/>
		<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="54707e7b-2492-42ad-826f-3ca09d534b22" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload)>0]">
				<ee:transform doc:name="Success Response" doc:id="51556cf0-ff1c-4bd1-82aa-25285897ca7d">
            <ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/GetV1_Success.dwl" />
            
</ee:message>
        </ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log success response" doc:id="eee112ff-1b81-43f1-adfb-0f1d9487cfac" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Success response" tracePoint="END" />
			
</when>
			<otherwise >
				<ee:transform doc:name="Failure Response" doc:id="a0a591a3-1c88-4c01-b40a-b6fc2e59a1ad" >
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    "success": false,
    "apiName": p('api.name'),
    "version": vars.version,
    "correlationId": correlationId,
    "timestamp": now(),
    "errorDetails": [
        {
            "code": p('error.badrequestcode'),
            "reason": p('error.sfreason'),
            "message": p('error.invaliddata')
        }
    ]
}]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>
					<ee:variables >
						<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA[p('error.badrequestcode')]]></ee:set-variable>
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log failure response" doc:id="edaa50a8-f3e3-42ce-983b-a4641d2b057d" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Failure response" tracePoint="END" priority="ERROR" />
			
</otherwise>
		</choice>
		<error-handler ref="Salesforce-Error_Handler" />
    </flow>
	
	</mule>

instruction: The **SF-Netcracker Quote Update Process API** serves as the integration bridge between **Salesforce CPQ** and **NetCracker** for the Charter Communic using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*

    <apikit:config name="sf-netcracker-quote-update-papi-config" api="resource::08a5d659-b26c-462a-a917-051d17e658ef:sf-netcracker-quote-update-papi:1.0.6:raml:zip:sf-netcracker-quote-update-papi.raml" outboundHeadersMapName="outboundHeaders" httpStatusVarName="httpStatus" />
    <flow name="sf-netcracker-quote-update-papi-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>

            <ee:message />
            <ee:variables>
                <ee:set-variable resource="dwl/v_correlationId.dwl" variableName="correlationId" />
                <ee:set-variable resource="dwl/originalPayloadData.dwl" variableName="originalPayloadData" />
            </ee:variables>
        </ee:transform>
        <json-logger:logger doc:name="Log initial request payload" doc:id="9c27b362-4d75-4851-9284-a33f48089d7f" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Initial Request Payload" />
        <apikit:router doc:name="APIkit Router" doc:id="0547f027-7729-49af-a6c8-65bfb40fe8d3" config-ref="sf-netcracker-quote-update-papi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="867cf9d7-a7fc-45ae-ad62-32002ed0bf29">
                <error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="260d272e-bafb-4c3f-929b-b921ed126ed4" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config" />
                <set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set Http Status Code" doc:id="ef0b5c19-db0d-4f1f-8bce-1ab5dae92505" variableName="httpStatus" />
                <json-logger:logger doc:name="Log APIkit error response" doc:id="df822799-1db1-48bb-b049-dbc9c329b496" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Error response from APIkit router" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" />
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="sf-netcracker-quote-update-papi-console">
        <http:listener path="/console/*" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">

        <apikit:console config-ref="sf-netcracker-quote-update-papi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\health-check:sf-netcracker-quote-update-papi-config">

        <json-logger:logger doc:name="Log Health-Check Response" doc:id="c18a0d5f-c46a-4ccf-b973-05d8d65778b2" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Health-Check Response" tracePoint="END" />

    <flow name="post:\site-survey-update:application\json:sf-netcracker-quote-update-papi-config">

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook map transform (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Map Transform
 * Category: Array Manipulation
 * Difficulty: Beginner
 * Description: Transform each element in an array into a new shape. The most
 * common DataWeave operation — use it to reshape payloads, rename fields,
 * compute derived values, or build API responses from raw data.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * [
 *   {
 *     "firstName": "Alice",
 *     "lastName": "Chen",
 *     "salary": 95000,
 *     "currency": "USD"
 *   },
 *   {
 *     "firstName": "Bob",
 *     "lastName": "Martinez",
 *     "salary": 72000,
 *     "currency": "USD"
 *   },
 *   {
 *     "firstName": "Carol",
 *     "lastName": "Nguyen",
 *     "salary": 110000,
 *     "currency": "USD"
 *   }
 * ]
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * {"fullName": "Alice Chen", "annualSalary": "$95,000.00"},
 * {"fullName": "Bob Martinez", "annualSalary": "$72,000.00"},
 * {"fullName": "Carol Nguyen", "annualSalary": "$110,000.00"}
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload map (employee) -> ({fullName: employee.firstName ++ " " ++ employee.lastName, annualSalary: "\$" ++ (employee.salary as String {format: "#,###.00"})})

instruction: Create a Mule 4 flow named 'battlesnake-api-main' using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /api/*

    <flow name="battlesnake-api-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="battlesnake-api-httpListenerConfig" path="/api/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body>#[payload]</http:body>
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:router config-ref="battlesnake-api-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:BAD_REQUEST">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Bad request"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">400</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Method not allowed"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">405</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_ACCEPTABLE">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Not acceptable"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">406</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Unsupported media type"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">415</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_IMPLEMENTED">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Not Implemented"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">501</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\:battlesnake-api-config">
        <ee:transform>
            <ee:message>
                <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
  apiversion: "${battlesnake.config.apiversion}",
  author: "${battlesnake.config.author}",
  color: "${battlesnake.config.color}",
  head: "${battlesnake.config.head}",
  tail: "${battlesnake.config.tail}",
  version: "${battlesnake.config.version}",
}]]></ee:set-payload>
            </ee:message>
        </ee:transform>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\start:application\json:battlesnake-api-config">

		<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="b320da4e-842c-40a6-b021-db4e0247a345" message="#[payload]"/>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\move:application\json:battlesnake-api-config">
        <logger level="INFO" message="#['Move Game $(payload.game.id)']" />
		<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="1423365b-9bc2-4e2e-9f28-a85fa84de445" message="#[payload]"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="54a59f57-b3b2-49c9-9df1-ea5de079e976" >
			<ee:message >
                <ee:set-payload resource="dw/move-snake.dwl" />
            </ee:message>
        </ee:transform>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\end:application\json:battlesnake-api-config">
        <logger level="INFO" message="#['End Game $(payload.game.id)']" />
		<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="e9f0dd37-688a-4c17-9213-f7139eef0e9b" message="#[payload]"/>
    </flow>


</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: p oppQuoteValidationStatus
Write a DataWeave transformation for p extractCDFFromSPCResponse (XML handling)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/java
var padding = ["", "0", "00", "000", "0000"]
fun padCDF(code, size) = (if ( isNull(code) ) (if ( (sizeOf(code) default 0) < size ) (padding[size - (sizeOf(code) default 0)] ++ code) else code) else null)
fun isNull(value) = (if  (value != "" and  value != null)  true else false)
var IBS = payload.getLocationResponse.location
---
if ( isNull(payload.getLocationResponse) ) {
	company: if ( isNull(IBS.billingStationLevel0Code) ) padCDF(IBS.billingStationLevel1Code, 2) else null,
	division: if ( isNull(IBS.billingStationLevel1Code) ) padCDF(IBS.billingStationLevel2Code, 2) else null,
	franchise: if ( isNull(IBS.billingStationLevel2Code) ) padCDF(IBS.sourceFTACode, 3) else null
}
else null

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook xml signature prep (XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: XML Signature Preparation
 * Category: Security & Encoding
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Prepare XML for WS-Security signing by canonicalizing
 * elements, stripping whitespace, and building the SignedInfo reference
 * structure. Used in SOAP integrations with banks, government APIs,
 * and enterprise B2B services.
 *
 * Input (application/xml):
 * <soap:Envelope
 *   xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
 *   <soap:Body>
 *     <Order>
 *       <id>ORD-100</id>
 *       <total>250.00</total>
 *     </Order>
 *   </soap:Body>
 * </soap:Envelope>
 *
 * Output (application/xml):
 * <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
 * <soap:Header>
 * <wsse:Security xmlns:wsse="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd">
 * <ds:Signature xmlns:ds="http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#">
 * <ds:SignedInfo>
 * <ds:CanonicalizationMethod Algorithm="http://www.w3.org/2001/10/xml-exc-c14n#"/>
 * <ds:SignatureMethod Algorithm="http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmldsig-more#rsa-sha256"/>
 * <ds:Reference URI="#body">
 * <ds:DigestMethod Algorithm="http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmlenc#sha256"/>
 * <ds:DigestValue><!-- computed digest --></ds:DigestValue>
 * </ds:Reference>
 * </ds:SignedInfo>
 * </ds:Signature>
 * </wsse:Security>
 * </soap:Header>
 * <soap:Body Id="body">
 * <Order xmlns="http://example.com/orders">
 * <OrderId>ORD-001</OrderId>
 * <Amount currency="USD">1500.00</Amount>
 * <Customer>Acme Corp</Customer>
 * </Order>
 * </soap:Body>
 * </soap:Envelope>
 */
%dw 2.0
import dw::Crypto
output application/xml
ns soap http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/
ns wsse http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd
ns ds http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#
var bodyContent = write(payload.soap#Envelope.soap#Body, "application/xml", {indent: false})
var bodyDigest = Crypto::hashWith(bodyContent as Binary, "SHA-256")
---
{soap#Envelope: {soap#Header: {wsse#Security: {ds#Signature: {ds#SignedInfo: {ds#Reference @(URI: "#body"): {ds#DigestValue: bodyDigest}}}}}, soap#Body @(Id: "body"): payload.soap#Envelope.soap#Body}}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook default values
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Default Values
 * Category: Error Handling
 * Difficulty: Beginner
 * Description: Provide fallback values for null or missing fields using the
 * `default` operator. The first line of defense against null pointer errors
 * in DataWeave. Use whenever a field might be missing, null, or empty in
 * the source payload.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "customer": {
 *     "name": "Alice Chen",
 *     "email": null,
 *     "phone": "+1-555-0142",
 *     "preferences": {
 *       "language": null,
 *       "currency": "EUR"
 *     }
 *   },
 *   "shippingAddress": null,
 *   "notes": ""
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "name": "Alice Chen",
 * "email": "noreply@example.com",
 * "phone": "+1-555-0142",
 * "language": "en",
 * "currency": "EUR",
 * "shippingAddress": "No address provided",
 * "notes": "No notes",
 * "loyaltyTier": "Standard",
 * "tags": []
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
  name: payload.customer.name default "Unknown",
  email: payload.customer.email default "noreply@example.com",
  phone: payload.customer.phone default "N/A",
  language: payload.customer.preferences.language default "en",
  currency: payload.customer.preferences.currency default "USD",
  shippingAddress: payload.shippingAddress default "No address on file",
  notes: if (payload.notes == "") "No notes" else payload.notes
}

instruction: Create a Mule 4 flow named 'dataweave-class10Flow' using DataWeave Transform
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
	xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd">
	<flow name="dataweave-class10Flow" doc:id="008104b5-d0c4-4874-8c19-819abed1a574" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="using update operator with array" doc:id="cc603943-5dcf-4862-a008-9a8bccfae11f" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json

// round off lat and lon to two decimal places and change the time zone offset for the US East to -4
var myInput = readUrl("classpath://airports/airports.json", 'application/json')
---

myInput map(item, index) -> item update {
	case l at .lat -> l as String {format:".00"}
	case m at .lon -> m as String {format:".00"}
	case t at .tz if(t == -5) -> -4
	case airport at .name if(airport == 'Schaumburg Regional') -> 'abc'
}
]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="string-replace-using-regex" doc:id="7de9b307-d618-480d-8d81-49387c0305e7" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="77f8f06d-9971-4be0-ad9f-7fd7d9daaaad" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json

var address = '3400 peace st, MD, USA 21067'
---
 {'zipped code masked': address replace  /[0-9]{5}$/ with "zipcode masked",
 'house number masked': address replace  /^[0-9]{4}/ with "house number masked",
 'state masked': address replace /[A-Z]{2},/ with "state masked" }]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="mask-five-digits-ssn" doc:id="5ff92ca5-8d6b-47f1-ac4f-7fe8d69db21c" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="d871435c-2645-4750-bcdf-fd829fd940c0" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json

// mask the first five digits of ssn
---
'777-77-9999' replace /[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{2}/ with "***-**"]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="various-ways-of-masking-data" doc:id="684b602d-700c-4840-9847-1f57db739b1b" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="check the variables as well" doc:id="100cacc3-2c0b-48da-ace5-884dc59fe46c" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
//mask age and the last five digits of the SSN
var myData = {
	          fname: 'mule',
	          lname: 'max',
	          age: 45,
	          ssn: '048-15-8876'
              }
---
myData mapObject ((value, key, index) ->
	if( key as String == 'age') {(key): "**"}
	else if (key as String == "ssn") 
	    {(key): value replace /[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{2}/ with "***-**"}
	else {(key): value}
)]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="using_update" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
//mask age and the last five digits of the SSN
var myData = {
	          fname: 'mule',
	          lname: 'max',
	          age: 45,
	          ssn: '048-15-8876'
              }
---
myData update {
	case age at .age -> "**"
	case ssn at .ssn -> ssn replace /[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{2}/ with "***-**"
	case address at .address! -> '1234 my address '
}]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="using_util" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
//mask age and the last five digits of the SSN
import * from dw::util::Values
var myData = {
	          fname: 'mule',
	          lname: 'max',
	          age: 45,
	          ssn: '048-15-8876'
              }
---
myData mask "age" with "**" mask 'ssn' with "***-**-****"]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="using_util2" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
//mask age and the last five digits of the SSN
import * from dw::util::Values
var myData = {
	          fname: 'mule',
	          lname: 'max',
	          age: 45,
	          ssn: '048-15-8876'
              }
---
myData mask 'age' with '**'
 mask 'ssn' with ($ replace /^[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{2}/ with "***-**")]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	
	<flow name="get-array-of-dates" doc:id="79114607-cc5c-4416-882c-e8645e5c161c">
		<ee:transform doc:name="get array of dates between two dates" doc:id="fefe8328-fd15-4b89-89ab-0713cd06f86a">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[
%dw 2.0
output application/json
fun getDatesFromTo(start_date:Date, end_date:Date)= 
   if (start_date > end_date) []
   else if (start_date == end_date)  [start_date]
   else [start_date] ++ getDatesFromTo((start_date +|P1D|), end_date)
---
getDatesFromTo(|2022-01-01|, |2022-01-05|)]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: The **S3-SF-SCQR-Sync-App** (Sales Credit Quota Relief Synchronization Application) is an enterprise integration that automates the synchronization of using DataWeave Transform, Error Handling, HTTP Listener

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">
    <flow name="sf-scqr-sync-app-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <json-logger:logger doc:name="After receiving the request" doc:id="ee6386b7-281f-4bef-8721-6cb5ce41caca" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After receiving the request">
		</json-logger:logger>
		<apikit:router config-ref="sf-scqr-sync-app-config" />
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Final response" doc:id="bd09f1ae-1fbf-4a55-b730-5d1eacf7112d" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Final response" />
		<error-handler>
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="c7fada3b-0567-4267-82f1-346d297a8d6a" >
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="2db1c6b3-8462-47cb-99d0-3aaa9b9334f6" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config" />
				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="httpStatus" doc:id="5212b802-85bd-4217-b8d0-2cfbaec3bce1" variableName="httpStatus" />
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Before sending the error response" doc:id="ac62aa4e-1f99-41ff-b493-8f4b4d82663e" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Before sending the error response" />
			</on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="sf-scqr-sync-app-console">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="${api.name}/api/${api.version}/console/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="sf-scqr-sync-app-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p_apikitConsoleErrorResponse.dwl" />
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus"><![CDATA[404]]></ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\health-check:sf-scqr-sync-app-config">
        <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
            <ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p_healthCheckResponse.dwl" />
            </ee:message>
        </ee:transform>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\deltaload\retryfailed:application\json:sf-scqr-sync-app-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="sf-failedRecords-retryFlow" doc:id="2e2dca75-2184-4929-8129-ac328689bff6" name="sf-failedRecords-retryFlow"/>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\fullload:application\json:sf-scqr-sync-app-config">
        <flow-ref doc:name="processOpportunities" doc:id="c654de8a-c9ad-4506-9372-2db1510d4ae2" name="processOpportunities"/>
    </flow>
	<flow name="put:\scqrUpdate:application\json:sf-scqr-sync-app-config" doc:id="3f46ab98-bc75-4e37-9594-0fa038809670" >
		<flow-ref doc:name="OpportunityUpdate" doc:id="544cadfd-a864-4a4d-9dc9-7c21c14af615" name="OpportunityUpdate" />
	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: using DataWeave Transform, Error Handling, HTTP Request
output:
<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:sdc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/sdc" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd     http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd  http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/sdc http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/sdc/current/mule-sdc.xsd  http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd">
  <sub-flow name="implementation-schema">
    <ee:transform doc:name="flatten and transform to yaml schema">
      <ee:message>
        <ee:set-payload resource="dw/schema.dwl"></ee:set-payload>
      </ee:message>
    </ee:transform>
  </sub-flow>
  <sub-flow name="implementation-query">
    <ee:transform doc:name="text to json">
      <ee:message>
        <ee:set-payload resource="dw/text-to-json.dwl"></ee:set-payload>
      </ee:message>
    </ee:transform>
    <sdc:query config-ref="Salesforce_CDP_Sdc_config" doc:id="zcumcy" doc:name="Query"></sdc:query>
    <ee:transform doc:name="extract data">
      <ee:message>
        <ee:set-payload>
                    
          <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
        output application/json
        ---
        payload.data]]>
                  
        </ee:set-payload>
      </ee:message>
    </ee:transform>
  </sub-flow>
  <sub-flow name="implementation-insert">
    <ee:transform doc:name="add data">
      <ee:message>
        <ee:set-payload>
                    
          <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
        output application/json
        ---
        {
            data: payload
        }]]>
                  
        </ee:set-payload>
      </ee:message>
    </ee:transform>
    <sdc:insert-objects config-ref="Salesforce_CDP_Sdc_config" doc:id="vxmdir" doc:name="Insert" objectNameUriParam="#[attributes.queryParams.objectName]" sourceNameUriParam="#[attributes.queryParams.sourceApiName]"></sdc:insert-objects>
  </sub-flow>
  <sub-flow name="implementation-delete">
    <sdc:delete-objects config-ref="Salesforce_CDP_Sdc_config" doc:id="wgexgs" doc:name="Delete" idsQueryParams="#[output application/java --- payload]" objectNameUriParam="#[attributes.queryParams.objectName]" sourceNameUriParam="#[attributes.queryParams.sourceApiName]"></sdc:delete-objects>
  </sub-flow>
  <sub-flow name="implementation-bulk-upsert">
    <set-variable doc:id="hdhhqn" doc:name="originalPayload in text/csv" value="#[output text/csv  var contentType = payload.^mediaType  ---  if (contentType contains "text") read(payload,"text/csv")  else payload]" variableName="originalPayload"></set-variable>
    <sdc:create-bulk-job config-ref="Salesforce_CDP_Sdc_config" doc:id="tojmzu" objectNameUriParam="#[attributes.queryParams.objectName]" operationUriParam="upsert" sourceNameUriParam="#[attributes.queryParams.sourceApiName]"></sdc:create-bulk-job>
    <set-variable doc:id="yhgubz" doc:name="jobId" value="#[payload.id]" variableName="jobId"></set-variable>
    <logger doc:id="vpfnkg" doc:name="Logger" message="#["JOB ID CREATED: " ++ vars.jobId]"></logger>
    <try doc:id="secumw" doc:name="Try">
      <sdc:upload-data-bulk-job config-ref="Salesforce_CDP_Sdc_config" doc:id="nbpkxs" doc:name="Upload originalPayload" idUriParam="#[vars.jobId]">
        <sdc:upload-data-bulk-job-body>#[vars.originalPayload]</sdc:upload-data-bulk-job-body>
      </sdc:upload-data-bulk-job>
      <sdc:update-bulk-operation-job config-ref="Salesforce_CDP_Sdc_config" doc:id="bhtzdz" doc:name="UploadComplete" idUriParam="#[vars.jobId]" state="UploadComplete"></sdc:update-bulk-operation-job>
      <error-handler>
        <on-error-continue>
          <sdc:update-bulk-operation-job config-ref="Salesforce_CDP_Sdc_config" doc:id="psonzs" doc:name="Aborted" idUriParam="#[vars.jobId]" state="Aborted"></sdc:update-bulk-operation-job>
        </on-error-continue>
      </error-handler>
    </try>
    <flow-ref doc:name="getJob" name="implementation-bulk-getJob"></flow-ref>
  </sub-flow>
  <sub-flow name="implementation-bulk-getJob">
    <sdc:get-bulk-job config-ref="Salesforce_CDP_Sdc_config" doc:id="cucwnl" doc:name="Bulk - Get Job" idUriParam="#[vars.jobId]"></sdc:get-bulk-job>
  </sub-flow>
  <sub-flow name="implementation-bulk-deleteJob">
    <try doc:id="sfeumg" doc:name="Try">
      <sdc:delete-bulk-job config-ref="Salesforce_CDP_Sdc_config" doc:id="vunjpt" doc:name="Bulk - Delete Job" idUriParam="#[vars.jobId]"></sdc:delete-bulk-job>
      <error-handler>
        <on-error-continue>
          <sdc:update-bulk-operation-job config-ref="Salesforce_CDP_Sdc_config" doc:id="myioys" doc:name="Abort Job" idUriParam="#[vars.jobId]" state="Aborted"></sdc:update-bulk-operation-job>
          <sdc:delete-bulk-job config-ref="Salesforce_CDP_Sdc_config" doc:id="vunpt" doc:name="Bulk - Delete Job" idUriParam="#[vars.jobId]"></sdc:delete-bulk-job>
        </on-error-continue>
      </error-handler>
    </try>
  </sub-flow>
  <sub-flow name="implementation-bulk-getAllJobs">
    <ee:transform doc:name="SF request">
      <ee:message>
        <ee:set-payload resource="dw/request-token-sf.dwl"></ee:set-payload>
      </ee:message>
    </ee:transform>
    <http:request doc:id="lcsuhf" doc:name="SFTokenResponse" method="POST" target="SFTokenResponse" url="#[Mule::p("salesforce.url") ++ "services/oauth2/token"]">
      <http:headers>
                
        <![CDATA[#[{
                    "Content-Type": "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
                }]]]>
              
      </http:headers>
    </http:request>
    <ee:transform doc:name="DC request">
      <ee:message>
        <ee:set-payload resource="dw/request-token-dc.dwl"></ee:set-payload>
      </ee:message>
    </ee:transform>
    <http:request doc:id="jvuump" doc:name="DCTokenResponse" method="POST" target="DCTokenResponse" url="#[vars.SFTokenResponse.instance_url ++ "/services/a360/token"]">
      <http:headers>
                
        <![CDATA[#[{
                    "Content-Type": "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
                }]]]>
              
      </http:headers>
    </http:request>
    <http:request doc:id="sagdny" doc:name="Get All Jobs" url="#["https://" ++ vars.DCTokenResponse.instance_url ++ "/api/v1/ingest/jobs"]">
      <http:headers>
                
        <![CDATA[#[{
                    "Authorization": "Bearer " ++ vars.DCTokenResponse.access_token
                }]]]>
              
      </http:headers>
    </http:request>
    <ee:transform doc:name="extract data">
      <ee:message>
        <ee:set-payload>
                    
          <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
        output application/json
        ---
        payload.data]]>
                  
        </ee:set-payload>
      </ee:message>
    </ee:transform>
  </sub-flow>
</mule>

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file/current/mule-file.xsd

	<file:config name="File_Config" doc:name="File Config" doc:id="bc590ad9-04c5-49fb-ad1b-3861c1e5c8e1" >
		<file:connection workingDir="C:\fish\MuleSoft\data-transformation\output" />
	</file:config>
	<flow name="data-transformation-v2Flow" doc:id="84223336-8237-42f8-b877-dd51eac19018" >
		<file:listener doc:name="On New or Updated File" doc:id="7214dbdd-f6d5-4f77-a5f6-8ca0cca4b313" directory="C:\fish\MuleSoft\data-transformation\input" moveToDirectory="C:\fish\MuleSoft\data-transformation\backup" outputMimeType="application/xml" renameTo="#["backup-" ++ now() as String {format: 'y-M-d-h-m-s'} ++ vars.fileName]" doc:description="This is the trigger and it starts the flow when there is new file in the specified folder.">

		<scatter-gather doc:name="Scatter-Gather" doc:id="e74238ef-9c55-456f-8726-a32be6e2975f" >

	</flow>
	<sub-flow name="to-csv" doc:id="748110d4-881d-480c-abef-a9a49f730040" >

output application/csv
---
payload.data.*row]]></ee:set-payload>

output application/json

instruction: The **SF-Pega-Sync-App** is a MuleSoft integration application that synchronizes Salesforce data changes to the **Pega Workforce Optimization (WFO)**  using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, HTTP Request, Retry Logic
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger"
	xmlns:kafka="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka/current/mule-kafka.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd">
	<flow name="kafka-opportunity-flow" doc:id="37f39e10-dc7c-438b-8c7a-444f64958376" >
		<kafka:message-listener doc:name="Consume messages from Opportunity topic" doc:id="ceba93af-8697-4cf2-8d09-9c2abecea05b" config-ref="Apache_Kafka_opportunity_Consumer_configuration" ackMode="IMMEDIATE" parallelConsumersAmount="${kafka.consumers}"/>
		<set-payload value="#[payload]" doc:name="Changing the payload to JSON" doc:id="a9be9d70-0d43-4be7-9fe7-68b71f22c701" mimeType="application/json"/>
		<set-variable value="#[payload]" doc:name="originalPayload" doc:id="8431a479-b7b6-42dd-a649-6de7c33846cd" variableName="originalPayload"/>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log kafka payload" doc:id="98584179-cdcd-496b-baf8-e39a7428bb13" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Received Message from Opportunity topic"/>
		<choice doc:name="Check payload size" doc:id="9b5c7ca0-de16-46ab-84f2-5ac874178162" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload) > 0]">
				<flow-ref doc:name="token-flow" doc:id="83312d02-06df-479f-ac1b-2cfa73938bca" name="token_flow"/>
				<choice doc:name="Check access token is null" doc:id="3118f226-a50b-4b70-96ba-e73fd697a1af" >
					<when expression="#[vars.token.access_token != null]">
						<until-successful maxRetries="${pega.reconnectionattempts}" doc:name="Until Successful" doc:id="9f5594d7-dd42-4ae5-84cb-41d254bc933c" millisBetweenRetries="${pega.reconnectionfrequency}">
							<http:request method="POST" doc:name="Request to PEGA" doc:id="ae75f6af-425b-4427-9a66-da188eccfd31" responseTimeout="${http.responsetimeout}" config-ref="HTTP_Request_configuration-pegacloud" path="${pega.optyresource}">
							<http:headers><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"Authorization" : "Bearer " ++ vars.token.access_token 
}]]]></http:headers>
						</http:request>
						</until-successful>
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="Success Response" doc:id="b4b6c6fd-dacf-4333-ad82-94caba36c6ba" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After Sending Opportunity Message successfully to PEGA" tracePoint="END" />
					</when>
					<otherwise >
						<ee:transform doc:name="Failure response" doc:id="ff2b4a09-c063-4be0-ba6e-19d4e19be2e8" >
							<ee:message >
								<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/failure_response.dwl" />
							</ee:message>
							<ee:variables >
								<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
p('error.badrequestcode')]]></ee:set-variable>
							</ee:variables>
						</ee:transform>
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="Failure Response" doc:id="2519956c-46a8-4ead-bf45-6d96652725bf" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Invalid token error message" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" />
					</otherwise>
				</choice>
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log the empty payload" doc:id="942ae3a2-019f-4eb2-a085-aadb3715b9dd" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Getting Empty payload of Opportunity from SFDC" tracePoint="END"/>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
		<error-handler ref="global_error_handler" />

	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: p finalFailureResponse
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json skipNullOn="everywhere"
var newUpdatedBssRecordCount = if (payload.upsertedBssIds != null and ((sizeOf(payload.upsertedBssIds)) > (sizeOf(vars.disconnectedBssObjects default "")))) ((sizeOf(payload.upsertedBssIds)) - (sizeOf(vars.disconnectedBssObjects default ""))) else 0
var includeParams = vars.sfdc.retrieveParameters default false
---
{
	BssRefreshResponse: {
	isSuccess : false,
	NewUpdatedBssRecordCount :  newUpdatedBssRecordCount,
	DisconnectedBssRecordCount : sizeOf(payload.disconnectedBssRecords) ,
    (NewUpdatedBssParamsRecordCount : if (payload.upsertedBssParamsIds != null and ((sizeOf(payload.upsertedBssParamsIds)) > (sizeOf(payload.disconnectedBssParamsRecords)))) ((sizeOf(payload.upsertedBssParamsIds)) - (sizeOf(payload.disconnectedBssParamsRecords))) else 0) if (includeParams) , 
    (DisconnectedBssParamsRecordCount : sizeOf(payload.disconnectedBssParamsRecords)) if (includeParams) , 
	errorMessage : "First error message is:" ++ vars.errors
	}
}

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd

	<http:listener-config name="HTTP_Listener_config" doc:name="HTTP Listener config" doc:id="1f24d044-6de9-4b65-aa0c-c9ce98d414c1" >

	</http:listener-config>

			<x12:schema value="/x12/004010/997.esl" />
		</x12:schemas>
	</x12:config>
	<flow name="flow-1-plain-transform" doc:id="c32ef432-2f34-4756-854a-9667946233c0" >
		<http:listener doc:name="Listener" doc:id="16ff44b8-4665-4899-96a3-48ea74d0382a" config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="/edi" allowedMethods="POST"/>
		<x12:read doc:name="Read" doc:id="01ffafb3-b02b-41ae-a717-90de8a5ccbbf" config-ref="X12_EDI_Config_Read"/>
		<set-payload value="#[output application/json --- payload]" doc:name="Set Payload" doc:id="220ed3fb-9d61-4004-8597-09f6d073df3e" />
	</flow>
	<flow name="flow-2-fa-ack-back" doc:id="c4394385-bb88-4fd8-a84a-bc996fb1fff0" >
		<http:listener doc:name="Listener" doc:id="8916ba90-9da2-4b2e-aa61-ef10ec5e7b28" config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="/ack-back"/>
		<x12:read doc:name="Read" doc:id="f1494f10-91df-44cc-9824-ace24a9e9d82" config-ref="X12_EDI_Config_Read" />
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform X12 FA Acks" doc:id="8fa8636c-a3a3-4346-9b27-545b3b5eccdd" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
{
    TransactionSets: {        
        (payload.FunctionalAcksGenerated map {

                ($.Id): [ $ ]
            }
        })
    }
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<x12:write doc:name="Write" doc:id="f30a47a3-f541-42c4-b03b-94ec4512180e" config-ref="X12_EDI_Config-Write"/>
	</flow>
	<flow name="flow-3-fa-receive" doc:id="05eee614-fb69-48e0-ba81-4c55e39e5ac0" >

		<x12:read doc:name="Read" doc:id="07233aa3-642f-4cdf-ae55-f5efcc06a61d" config-ref="X12_EDI_Config_Read"/>
		<set-payload value="#[output application/json --- payload]" doc:name="Set Payload" doc:id="b557f254-c63a-485b-a878-1596b528cdd9" />
	</flow>

		<x12:read doc:name="Read" doc:id="b2384827-c157-405a-afef-ab8a529d4aae" config-ref="X12_EDI_Config_Read"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="fe225c05-fbd7-4937-b2ff-17c310931318" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.TransactionSets.v004010."810" map {
    invoiceDate: $.Heading."020_BIG".BIG01 as Date as String  {format: "MM/dd/yyyy"},
    invoiceNummber: $.Heading."020_BIG".BIG02,

    currency: $.Heading."040_CUR02" default "USD",
    items: $.Detail."010_IT1_Loop" map (item, index) -> {
       description: item."060_PID_Loop"."060_PID".PID05[0],
       quantity: item."010_IT1".IT102,
       unit: item."010_IT1".IT103,

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p queryParams (mapping/transformation, filtering)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var queryParams = vars.queryParams
var fieldMappings = {
    "sfAcctID": "Account_ID__c",
    "billingAcctID": "Billing_System_Account_Number__c",
    "CID": "Circuit_ID2__c",
    "serviceProviderUNICID": "Service_Provider_UNI_Circuit_ID__c",
    "type2VendorCID": "Type_II_Vendor_s_Circuit_ID__c",
    "twcBuyNNICID": "TWC_Buy_NNI_Circuit_ID__c",
    "rfqID": "Type_II_RFQ_ID__c",
    "eprID": "ID",
    "eprName": "Name"
}
var availableParams = queryParams filterObject ((value, key) -> value != null)
var selectedKey = if (sizeOf(availableParams) > 0) keysOf(availableParams)[0] else null

var selectedField = 
  if (selectedKey == "externalCID" and fieldMappings[selectedKey] != null) 
    fieldMappings[selectedKey][0]
  else if (selectedKey != null)
    fieldMappings[selectedKey]
  else 
    null

var selectedValue = if (selectedKey != null) availableParams[selectedKey] else null


var condition = 
  if (selectedField != null and selectedValue != null) 
    selectedField ++ " = '" ++ selectedValue ++ "'"
  else 
    null

---
{
    queryParams: queryParams,
    availableParams: availableParams,
    selectedKey: selectedKey,
    selectedField: selectedField,
    selectedValue: selectedValue,
    condition: condition
}

		<anypoint-mq:subscriber doc:name="queue1" doc:id="706d9088-bb88-45a0-b508-c054365e4acf" config-ref="Anypoint_MQ_Config" destination="queue1" acknowledgementMode="MANUAL" acknowledgementTimeout="3" acknowledgementTimeoutUnit="MINUTES"/>
		<flow-ref doc:name="my-process-api:vars-and-request" doc:id="f02833e0-ec6f-4e62-8d7e-d275c1eb54e4" name="my-process-api:vars-and-request"/>
		<until-successful maxRetries="2" doc:name="Until Successful" doc:id="fcc040ed-ff78-4d51-bd29-c38659ab872e" millisBetweenRetries="500" >
			<flow-ref doc:name="my-process-api:hr-api-call" doc:id="dabbb930-1ec6-49fd-a6f2-4b80f9a2cc9d" name="my-process-api:hr-api-call"/>
		</until-successful>
		<anypoint-mq:publish doc:name="to queue2" doc:id="6c13ae81-85f1-4f12-8810-36939fa75bfc" config-ref="Anypoint_MQ_Config" destination="queue2"/>
		<anypoint-mq:ack doc:name="queue1" doc:id="61d194d0-6d8b-421b-9594-c2eee435019c" config-ref="Anypoint_MQ_Config" ackToken="#[vars.ackToken]"/>
		<error-handler >
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="238789c9-18cd-4377-ba25-325356f3910e" >
				<anypoint-mq:nack doc:name="queue1" doc:id="de9a49ad-820e-4aea-8d18-6180ed41160f" config-ref="Anypoint_MQ_Config" ackToken="#[vars.ackToken]"/>
			</on-error-propagate>
		</error-handler>
	</flow>
	<sub-flow name="my-process-api:hr-api-call" doc:id="ba9e95fc-fd78-454c-9fa7-71a38f0dcf5d" >
		<try doc:name="Try" doc:id="4fb21513-5d48-4ebf-9470-553bcb6555dc" >
			<http:request method="POST" doc:name="HR API" doc:id="3c2b7c2d-7041-453c-9a37-e3a060536ca0" config-ref="HTTP_Request_configuration" path="/employees"/>
			<ee:transform doc:name="Create Successful Response" doc:id="0872e243-8f8b-467b-8aad-9f8cedc409a1" >
				<ee:message >
					<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json

var message = payload.message
---
{
    eid: payload.eid default vars.eid,
    status: "SUCCESS",
    message: if (isEmpty(message)) "Operation was a success"
    	else message
}]]></ee:set-payload>
				</ee:message>
			</ee:transform>
			<error-handler >
				<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="70268a7e-8f4c-4d64-ae01-070f17a4ccbf" type="HTTP:CONNECTIVITY">
					<logger level="ERROR" doc:name="Connection error" doc:id="8a246324-1173-4e3f-abe8-b406bbba276a" message="Connection error" />
				</on-error-propagate>
				<on-error-continue enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Continue" doc:id="f08c79d7-8ab6-415c-9984-aeed5fdd758f" type="ANY">
					<ee:transform doc:name="Create Error Response" doc:id="1095617d-faca-40b3-9d07-84376d5a01c1" >
						<ee:message >
							<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json

var message = payload.message default error.description
---
{
    eid: payload.eid default vars.eid,
    status: "ERROR",
    message: if (isEmpty(message)) "No error message"
    	else message
}]]></ee:set-payload>
						</ee:message>
					</ee:transform>
				</on-error-continue>
			</error-handler>
		</try>
	</sub-flow>
</mule>

	http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/sdc http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/sdc/current/mule-sdc.xsd">

            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:response>

        </http:listener>
        <apikit:router config-ref="data-cloud-integration-api-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:BAD_REQUEST">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload>
                            <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Bad request"}]]>
                        </ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">400</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload>
                            <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]>
                        </ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload>
                            <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Method not allowed"}]]>
                        </ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">405</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_ACCEPTABLE">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload>
                            <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Not acceptable"}]]>
                        </ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">406</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload>
                            <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Unsupported media type"}]]>
                        </ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">415</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_IMPLEMENTED">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload>
                            <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Not Implemented"}]]>
                        </ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">501</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="delete:\delete:application\json:data-cloud-integration-api-config">
        <flow-ref name="implementation-delete" />
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\insert:application\json:data-cloud-integration-api-config">
        <flow-ref name="implementation-insert" />
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\query:text\plain:data-cloud-integration-api-config">
        <flow-ref name="implementation-query" />
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\schema:application\json:data-cloud-integration-api-config">
        <flow-ref name="implementation-schema" />
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\bulk\upsert:text\plain:data-cloud-integration-api-config">
        <flow-ref name="implementation-bulk-upsert" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-continue>
                <flow-ref name="global-create-error" />
            </on-error-continue>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\bulk\upsert:application\json:data-cloud-integration-api-config">
        <flow-ref name="implementation-bulk-upsert" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-continue>
                <flow-ref name="global-create-error" />
            </on-error-continue>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\bulk\(id):data-cloud-integration-api-config">
        <flow-ref name="global-set-jobId-from-uriParam" />
        <flow-ref name="implementation-bulk-getJob" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-continue>
                <flow-ref name="global-create-error" />

        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="delete:\bulk\(id):data-cloud-integration-api-config">

        <flow-ref name="implementation-bulk-deleteJob" />
        <error-handler>

                <flow-ref name="global-create-error" />
            </on-error-continue>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\bulk:data-cloud-integration-api-config">
        <flow-ref  name="implementation-bulk-getAllJobs"/>
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-continue>
                <flow-ref name="global-create-error" />
            </on-error-continue>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
</mule>

instruction: using DataWeave Transform, Database Insert, Database Select
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
      xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
      xmlns:db="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db"
      xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
      xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
      xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
                          http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db/current/mule-db.xsd
                          http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd">

    <sub-flow name="create-task-flow" doc:id="e1b15d7b-214f-45eb-a033-b6e7671368ca">
        <logger level="INFO" doc:name="Start - Create Task" message="Starting create task flow with payload: #[payload]"/>
        
        <!-- Validate required fields -->
        <ee:transform doc:name="Validate Required Fields">
            <ee:message />
            <ee:variables>
                <ee:set-variable variableName="taskInput"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
{
    title: payload.title,
    description: payload.description default null,
    dueDate: payload.dueDate default null,
    completed: payload.completed default false
}]]></ee:set-variable>
            </ee:variables>
        </ee:transform>
        
        <!-- Insert task into database -->
        <db:insert doc:name="Insert Task" config-ref="mysql-db-config">
            <db:sql><![CDATA[INSERT INTO tasks (title, description, dueDate, completed) 
VALUES (:title, :description, :dueDate, :completed)]]></db:sql>
            <db:input-parameters><![CDATA[#[{
    'title': vars.taskInput.title,
    'description': vars.taskInput.description,
    'dueDate': vars.taskInput.dueDate,
    'completed': vars.taskInput.completed
}]]]></db:input-parameters>
        </db:insert>
        
        <!-- Get the generated ID -->
        <db:select doc:name="Get Generated ID" config-ref="mysql-db-config">
            <db:sql><![CDATA[SELECT id from tasks ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1]]></db:sql>
        </db:select>
        
        <!-- Transform to API response format -->
        <ee:transform doc:name="Transform to API Response">
            <ee:message>
                <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    id: payload[0].id as String,
    title: vars.taskInput.title,
    description: vars.taskInput.description,
    dueDate: vars.taskInput.dueDate,
    completed: vars.taskInput.completed
}]]></ee:set-payload>
            </ee:message>
            <ee:variables>
                <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus"><![CDATA[201]]></ee:set-variable>
            </ee:variables>
        </ee:transform>
        
        <logger level="INFO" doc:name="End - Create Task" message="Completed create task flow, created task with ID: #[payload.id]"/>
    </sub-flow>
    
</mule>

instruction: The **SF Populate Change PAPI** (Process API) automates the **Populate Change** operation within Charter Communications' **TAP (Telephony Administrati using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd">
	<flow name="populate-change-BCPFlow" doc:id="e69571d8-f93e-4933-96b9-adc63cf87aac" >
		<flow-ref name="create-rcf-lines" doc:name="create-rcf-lines" doc:id="65eb39fb-7571-4d65-82a1-88f0f4333be7"/>
        <flow-ref name="create-vars-from-parent-query" doc:name="create-vars-from-parent-query" doc:id="c4ba85d1-bcbd-400c-b56b-3d50bc5e8689"/>
        <flow-ref name="create-addresses" doc:name="create-addresses" doc:id="04cd1b43-4455-43c3-a2d1-be5de640b45c"/>
		<flow-ref doc:name="create-bcp" doc:id="98567b26-6834-4fd6-980f-72b7f6ab31e9" name="create-bcp-change-subflow"/>
		<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="ce08f834-193d-4423-a356-8176555765f1" >
			<when expression="#[((vars.twoStepCancel.IOM_Stage__c == 'BCP LOCKED BY IOM') and 
(vars.twoStepCancel.Service_Request_IOM_Type__c == 'DIRECTORY LISTINGS') and 
(vars.twoStepCancel.Order_Contains__c == 'BCP AND DIRECTORY LISTINGS'))]">
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger" doc:id="bb42192c-a811-4285-a58d-af4ddebf651f" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="#['Correlation-ID: ' ++ vars.messageID ++ '-' ++ vars.srID ++ '|| Inside BCP populate change matching 2 step cancel state']" tracePoint="FLOW">
					<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[""]]]></json-logger:content>
				</json-logger:logger>
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<flow-ref doc:name="change-request-directory-listing" doc:id="93d3b62a-71c5-4d94-b304-2c97d653d7fa" name="change-request-directory-listing-sub-flow"/>
				<flow-ref doc:name="change-request-directory-deliveries" doc:id="5d973fef-a345-4626-ac2e-a4c204210eab" name="change-request-directory-deliveries-sub-flow" />
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
		<flow-ref doc:name="update-service-request" doc:id="5d91f006-1970-422e-a7cb-d0e7429b2fd6" name="UpdateServiceRequestSubFlow"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="final-response" doc:id="2a993925-147f-47a8-b98c-24556b83bcb9" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	transactionID: vars.messageID,
	"message": p('dw.finalResponse')
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="end of flow" doc:id="bdb0f66c-26c5-4583-b5ec-0bbf1321d78b" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="#['Correlation-ID: ' ++ vars.messageID ++ '-' ++ vars.srID ++ '|| End of BCP Populate change request flow : ']" tracePoint="END">
			<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[""]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<error-handler >
			<on-error-continue enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Continue" doc:id="564f46b7-a74e-4ad5-b320-a0424a7cb089" >
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="eb258191-b813-48eb-af5d-60460c884c7c" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config"/>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger" doc:id="971fe0b8-854a-44e0-99ea-d0e9596b8632" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="#['Logger in on error continue scope of BCP Flow']"/>
			</on-error-continue>
		</error-handler>
	
</flow>
</mule>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger"
	xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
	xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
	xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd">
	<flow name="get-enrichment-data-v2"
		doc:id="e72e1252-726f-401d-95ef-738ac66351c8">
		<json-logger:logger
			doc:name="Log Inside get-enrichment-data-v2 flow"
			doc:id="68c6a520-4624-4d85-9653-81f254434f70"
			config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config"
			message="Inside get-enrichment-data-v2 flow"
			tracePoint="BEFORE_REQUEST">
			<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[output application/json 
---
{
    "serviceRequestId" : (attributes.uriParams.serviceRequestId) 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<salesforce:query
			doc:id="c985078a-f9e9-4478-bbe5-4f2c3135c7ae"
			config-ref="PEGA_Salesforce_Config"
			doc:name="Query to fetch enrichment data">
			<reconnect frequency="${salesforce.reconnectionfrequency}"
				count="${salesforce.reconnectionattempts}" />
			<salesforce:salesforce-query><![CDATA[${salesforce.queryv2}]]></salesforce:salesforce-query>
			<salesforce:parameters><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	SRId : attributes.uriParams.serviceRequestId
}]]]></salesforce:parameters>
		</salesforce:query>
		<choice doc:name="Check if sizeOf(payload) > 0"
			doc:id="9a864ebc-0872-49e1-a8c6-c78930df9ed7">
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload) > 0]">
				<ee:transform doc:name="Success response"
					doc:id="1ec0388c-f052-4ec1-9184-feb8eba3da2c">

					<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload
							resource="dwl/enrichment_data_v2_response.dwl" />
					</ee:message>
				</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger
					doc:name="Log success response"
					doc:id="7792ea79-a4bd-4806-a328-1487f58a3270"
					config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config"
					message="After successfully fetching the details from salesforce "
					tracePoint="END" />
			</when>
			<otherwise>
				<ee:transform doc:name="Failure response"
					doc:id="65fbbcdf-7662-4c8f-9909-e7597531b9cb">
					<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    "success": false,
    "apiName": p('api.name'),
    "version": vars.version,
    "correlationId": correlationId,
    "timestamp": now(),
    "errorDetails": [
        {
            "code": p('error.badrequestcode'),
            "reason": p('error.reason'),
            "message": p('error.message')
        }
    ]
}]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>
					<ee:variables>
						<ee:set-variable
							resource="dwl/error_status_400.dwl" variableName="httpStatus" />
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger
					doc:name="Log failure response"
					doc:id="d7a8f7bf-e5fc-4274-bcf2-da07dc191b61"
					config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config"
					message="Failed to fetch the details from Salesforce"
					tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" />
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
		<error-handler ref="global_error_handler" />
	</flow>
</mule>

 *
 * Input (application/xml):
 * <PurchaseOrder orderDate="2026-02-15" status="confirmed">
 *   <Customer>
 *     <Name>Acme Corp</Name><AccountId>ACCT-5001</AccountId>
 *     <Contact email="proc@acme.com" phone="555-0100"/>
 *   </Customer>
 *   <Items>
 *     <Item sku="SKU-100" quantity="5">
 *       <Description>Keyboard</Description>
 *       <UnitPrice>149.99</UnitPrice>
 *     </Item>
 *     <Item sku="SKU-400" quantity="10">
 *       <Description>Mouse</Description><UnitPrice>29.99</UnitPrice>
 *     </Item>
 *   </Items>
 * </PurchaseOrder>
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "orderDate": "2026-02-15",
 * "status": "confirmed",
 * "customer": {
 * "name": "Acme Corporation",
 * "accountId": "ACCT-5001",
 * "email": "procurement@acme.com",
 * "phone": "+1-555-0100"
 * },
 * "items": [
 * {"sku": "SKU-100", "description": "Mechanical Keyboard", "quantity": 5, "unitPrice": 149.99},
 * {"sku": "SKU-400", "description": "Wireless Mouse", "quantity": 10, "unitPrice": 29.99}
 * ]
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var po = payload.PurchaseOrder
---
{orderDate: po.@orderDate, status: po.@status, customer: {name: po.Customer.Name, accountId: po.Customer.AccountId, email: po.Customer.Contact.@email, phone: po.Customer.Contact.@phone}, items: po.Items.*Item map (item) -> ({sku: item.@sku, description: item.Description, quantity: item.@quantity as Number, unitPrice: item.UnitPrice as Number})}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for reschedule request (XML handling)
Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook decimal precision (mapping/transformation, aggregation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Decimal Precision Arithmetic
 * Category: Math & Precision
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Use DataWeave 2.10's decimal math functions to avoid
 * floating-point errors in financial calculations. Standard arithmetic
 * gives 0.1 + 0.2 = 0.30000000000000004. Decimal functions give exact results.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "lineItems": [
 *     {
 *       "product": "Widget A",
 *       "price": 19.99,
 *       "quantity": 3,
 *       "taxRate": 0.0825
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "product": "Widget B",
 *       "price": 49.95,
 *       "quantity": 1,
 *       "taxRate": 0.0825
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "product": "Discount",
 *       "price": -5.5,
 *       "quantity": 1,
 *       "taxRate": 0
 *     }
 *   ],
 *   "currency": "USD"
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "lineItems": [
 * {"product": "Widget A", "subtotal": 59.97, "tax": 4.95, "total": 64.92},
 * {"product": "Widget B", "subtotal": 49.95, "tax": 4.12, "total": 54.07},
 * {"product": "Discount", "subtotal": -5.50, "tax": 0.00, "total": -5.50}
 * ],
 * "grandTotal": 113.49,
 * "currency": "USD"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
import decimalAdd, decimalMultiply, decimalRound from dw::util::Math
output application/json
var computed = payload.lineItems map (item) -> do {
  var subtotal = decimalMultiply(item.price, item.quantity)
  var tax = decimalRound(decimalMultiply(subtotal, item.taxRate), 2)
  ---
  {product: item.product, subtotal: subtotal, tax: tax, total: decimalAdd(subtotal, tax)}
}
---
{
  lineItems: computed,
  grandTotal: computed reduce (item, acc = 0) -> decimalAdd(acc, item.total),
  currency: payload.currency
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: p connectivityErrorResponse
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
fun extractErrorDetails(err) =
    {
        code: if (isEmpty(err.muleMessage.attributes.StatusCode))
               p('error.connectivitycode')
              else
                err.muleMessage.attributes.StatusCode,
        reason: err.errorType.asString,
       message: 
           if (err.description != null) err.description 
           else err.cause.localizedMessage
    }

---
{
    "success": false,
    "apiName": p("api.name"),
    "version": p("api.version"),
    "correlationId": correlationId,
    "timestamp": now(),
    "erorDetails": [
        if (error.suppressedErrors[0] != null) 
            extractErrorDetails(error.suppressedErrors[0])
        else 
            extractErrorDetails(error)
    ]
}

		<choice doc:name="Check payload size" doc:id="9dee9053-5182-4ba4-bd62-1f5b012564d6" >

					<http:request method="POST" doc:name="Request to PEGA" doc:id="925be550-1dbf-43c7-9da5-3ce77c69b010" config-ref="HTTP_Request_configuration-pegacloud" responseTimeout="${http.responsetimeout}" path="${pega.srandeprresource}">
								<http:headers ><![CDATA[#[output application/java
