instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook parallel safe chunking (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Parallel-Safe Chunking
 * Category: Performance & Optimization
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Split a large payload into balanced chunks for parallel
 * processing in batch scopes or scatter-gather. Includes chunk metadata
 * for reassembly and error tracking.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "config": {
 *     "chunkSize": 3,
 *     "batchId": "B-100"
 *   },
 *   "records": [
 *     {
 *       "id": 1,
 *       "val": "A"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": 2,
 *       "val": "B"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": 3,
 *       "val": "C"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": 4,
 *       "val": "D"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": 5,
 *       "val": "E"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": 6,
 *       "val": "F"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": 7,
 *       "val": "G"
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "batchId": "BATCH-2026-001",
 * "totalRecords": 8,
 * "totalChunks": 3,
 * "chunks": [
 * {
 * "chunkIndex": 0,
 * "chunkSize": 3,
 * "startIndex": 0,
 * "endIndex": 2,
 * "records": [{ "id": "R001" }, { "id": "R002" }, { "id": "R003" }]
 * },
 * {
 * "chunkIndex": 1,
 * "chunkSize": 3,
 * "startIndex": 3,
 * "endIndex": 5,
 * "records": [{ "id": "R004" }, { "id": "R005" }, { "id": "R006" }]
 * },
 * {
 * "chunkIndex": 2,
 * "chunkSize": 2,
 * "startIndex": 6,
 * "endIndex": 7,
 * "records": [{ "id": "R007" }, { "id": "R008" }]
 * }
 * ]
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
import divideBy from dw::core::Arrays
output application/json
var chunkSize = payload.config.chunkSize
var records = payload.records
var chunks = records divideBy chunkSize
---
{ batchId: payload.config.batchId, totalRecords: sizeOf(records), totalChunks: sizeOf(chunks),
  chunks: chunks map (chunk, idx) -> ({ chunkIndex: idx, chunkSize: sizeOf(chunk),
    startIndex: idx * chunkSize, endIndex: (idx * chunkSize) + sizeOf(chunk) - 1, records: chunk }) }

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for v Received Service Request (mapping/transformation, filtering)
output:
%dw 2.0

output application/java  
---
{
  NtlSalesICOMSWorkOrderParams: {
    Service_Request__c: {
      Id: payload.Id,
      Service_Request_Number__c: payload.Service_Request_Number__c,
      Product_Family__c: payload.Product_Family__c default "",
      (Service_Active_Date__c: payload.Service_Active_Date__c) if(vars.serviceRequestOrderType != "Disconnect"),
      (Service_Active_Date__c: 
        if (payload.Customer_Requested_Due_Date__c == null or payload.Service_Request_Order_Type__c == "Conversion Disconnect")
          payload.Scheduled_Disconnect_Date__c
        else
          payload.Customer_Requested_Due_Date__c) if (vars.serviceRequestOrderType == "Disconnect"),
      Opportunity_Service_Location__c: payload.Opportunity_Service_Location__c,
      Service_Request_Order_Type__c: payload.Service_Request_Order_Type__c,
      Bill_System_Work_Order_Number__c: payload.Bill_System_Work_Order_Number__c,
      Service_Location__r: {
        Id: payload.Service_Location__r.Id,
        ParentId: payload.Service_Location__r.ParentId,
        ShippingStreet: payload.Service_Location__r.ShippingStreet,
        ShippingCity: payload.Service_Location__r.ShippingCity,
        ShippingState: payload.Service_Location__r.ShippingState,
        ShippingPostalCode: payload.Service_Location__r.ShippingPostalCode,
        Unit__c: payload.Service_Location__r.Unit__c,
        Ntl_Sales_ICOMS_Account_Number__c: 
          if ( payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_ICOMS_Account_Number__c != null)
            payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_ICOMS_Account_Number__c
          else
            vars.ntlSalesICOMSAccNumber,
        Ntl_Sales_Business_Name__c: payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Business_Name__c,
        Ntl_Sales_Enduser_ID__c: payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Enduser_ID__c,
        Ntl_Sales_Location_Primary_Contact__c: payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Location_Primary_Contact__c,
        Ntl_Sales_Bill_With_Account_Number__c: 
          if ( vars.NtlSalesBillWithAccountNumber != null and vars.callingFlow == "New Install")
            vars.NtlSalesBillWithAccountNumber[0].Ntl_Sales_Bill_With_Account_Number__c
          else
            vars.serviceLocationParent.Ntl_Sales_Bill_With_Account_Number__c,
        Ntl_Sales_Business_Location__c: payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Business_Location__c,
        Ntl_Sales_Tax_Exempt_Flag__c: payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Tax_Exempt_Flag__c,
        Ntl_Sales_Referring_Regional_Rep_Name__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.Ntl_Sales_Referring_Regional_Rep_Name__c,
        Ntl_Sales_Agent_Commission__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.Ntl_Sales_Agent_Commission__c,
        ICOMS_Bill_Type__c: payload.Service_Location__r.ICOMS_Bill_Type__c,
        Service_Location_Parent: {
          Ntl_Sales_Parent_Business_Id__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.Ntl_Sales_Parent_Business_ID__c,
          Ntl_Sales_Parent_Business_Location__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.Ntl_Sales_Parent_Business_Location__c,
          Ntl_Sales_Account_Type__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.Ntl_Sales_Account_Type__c,
          Ntl_Sales_Invoice_Presentation__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.Ntl_Sales_Invoice_Presentation__c,
          ParentId: vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.ParentId,
          ICOMS_Bill_Type__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.ICOMS_Bill_Type__c,
          Ntl_Sales_Hierarchy_Flag__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.Ntl_Sales_Hierarchy_Flag__c
        }
      },
      Opportunity_Products__r: 
        if ( payload.Opportunity_Products__r != null)
          [
            (payload.Opportunity_Products__r filter ( $.Ntl_ICOMS_Service_Code__c != null) map {
              OpportunityLineItem: {
                Id: $.Id,
                Quantity: $.Quantity,
                Service_Code__c: $.Service_Code__c,
                Service_Code_Old__c: $.Service_Code_Old__c,
                Order_Type__c: $.Order_Type__c,
                Service_Occurance__c: $.Service_Occurance__c,
                Ntl_ICOMS_Service_Code__c: $.Ntl_ICOMS_Service_Code__c,
                ProductCode: $.ProductCode,
                Does_Product_Have_Rev_Schedule__c: $.Does_Product_Have_Rev_Schedule__c,
                Revenue_Schedule_Rollup_Key__c: $.Revenue_Schedule_Rollup_Key__c,
                TotalPrice: $.TotalPrice,
                UnitPrice: $.Billing_Price__c,
                ListPrice: $.ListPrice,
                Product_Revenue_Catagory__c: $.Product_Revenue_Catagory__c,
                Is_Core_Product__c: $.Is_Core_Product__c
              }
            })
          ]
        else
          []
    },
    AttachToHierarchy: if (vars.callingFlow == "New Install") true else false,
    NtlSalesICOMSAccountNumber: if (vars.callingFlow == "New Install") vars.Ntl_Sales_ICOMS_Account_Number else vars.ntlSalesICOMSAccNumber,
    NtlSalesParentBusinessId: if (vars.callingFlow == "New Install") vars.NtlSalesParentBusinessId else vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.Ntl_Sales_Parent_Business_ID__c,
    NtlSalesParentBusinessLocation: vars.NtlSalesBusinessLocation default "",
    OperationCode: "",
    (OperationCode: p('CONST.Operation.CD.NewInstall')) if (vars.serviceRequestOrderType == "New Install" or vars.serviceRequestOrderType == "Add"),
    (OperationCode: p('CONST.Operation.CD.Discontinue')) if (vars.serviceRequestOrderType == "Disconnect"),
    SendToBilling: true
  }
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for v afnActiveLocation (filtering)
Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook sse event stream (mapping/transformation, filtering, aggregation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: SSE Event Stream Parser
 * Category: Event-Driven
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Parse and generate Server-Sent Events (SSE) using the native
 * text/event-stream format introduced in DataWeave 2.9. Handles real-time
 * streaming responses from AI/LLM APIs, live dashboards, and push notifications.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "events": [
 *     "data: {\"token\": \"Hello\"}",
 *     "data: {\"token\": \" world\"}",
 *     "data: {\"token\": \"!\"}",
 *     "data: [DONE]"
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "tokens": ["Hello", " world", "!"],
 * "fullText": "Hello world!",
 * "eventCount": 3
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var events = payload.events filter (e) -> e != "data: [DONE]"
var parsed = events map (e) -> read(e[6 to -1], "application/json")
---
{tokens: parsed map $.token, fullText: parsed reduce (e, acc = "") -> acc ++ e.token, eventCount: sizeOf(parsed)}

instruction: The **SMB SF Account Outage SAPI** (System API) serves as a critical integration component within Charter Communications' Small/Medium Business (SMB)  using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd  http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">
    <flow name="smb-sf-account-outage-papi-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <json-logger:logger doc:name="Initial Logger" doc:id="6ee4f7c2-e13f-4e7c-b186-4ca238df402f" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="#[" Before Sending Request to API Kit Router :  "]" />
        <apikit:router config-ref="smb-sf-account-outage-papi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate enableNotifications="false" logException="false" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="fa5ce2f4-35d9-497f-a1f5-1a2924fcf2ab">
                <error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="741634bd-21c3-484a-b1ba-1af45baf124b" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config" previousErrors="#[[error.description default []]]" />
                <set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set HTTP Status Code" doc:id="d69cf52b-2302-4750-bcc8-5eb9492d738a" variableName="httpStatus" />
                <json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger" doc:id="b5d71d00-8fe4-4e95-8e40-8ec8ea2d06ed" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After Receiving Error" />
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="smb-sf-account-outage-papi-console">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/console/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: alexandramartinez datacloud mulesoft integration error structure
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var statusCode = error.errorMessage.attributes.statusCode
---
{
    error: {
        description: error.description,
        message: error.errorMessage.payload.message,
        statusCode: statusCode,
        reasonPhrase: error.errorMessage.attributes.reasonPhrase,
        MuleRecommendation: if (statusCode ~= 409)
            "There probably is already a job in queue for this specific object."
            ++ " If you have the job ID, you can try getting the job's details to verify its state."
            ++ " If the state appears as InProgress, you will have to wait until Data Cloud finishes the processing (JobComplete/Failed) to try this operation again."
        else "No recommendation for this error."
    }
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p MAC00054Request (XML handling)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/xml
import * from dw::core::Strings
var lastName = (account, name) ->  if(name == null or name == '') account else name
---
{
	ICOMS @(KEY: p('default.ICOMS.API.Key') , USERID: p('default.ICOMS.Username') , PASSWORD: p('secure::default.Icoms.Password') , ENVIRONMENT: p('default.Icoms.API.Environment')): {
		MAC00054: {
			TASKCODE: "CUSTOMER",
			SITEID: p('default.Icoms.SiteID'),
			EXTRNLSESNID: p('default.ICOMS.Ext.Session.ID'),
			INL00192: {
				HOUSNMBR: vars.houseNum,
				CSTMRNAMEFRMT: "N",
				CSTMRBSNSNAME1: if( (sizeOf(vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.AccountName) default 0) > 31) ( substring(vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.AccountName,0,31)  )
					else (vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.AccountName default "" replace /[^ -~]/ with ("-") ) ,
				CSTMRBSNSNAME2: if(vars.bsnsline2 != null) vars.bsnsline2   else
				(  if(vars.authorizedContact != null) ( if( (sizeOf(vars.authorizedContact.Contact_Full_Name__c) default 0) > 31) ( substring(vars.authorizedContact.Contact_Full_Name__c,0,31) )   
					else vars.authorizedContact.Contact_Full_Name__c) else "Accounts Payable") ,
				FRSTNAME: if( (sizeOf(vars.authorizedContact.FirstName) default 0) > 9) (substring(vars.authorizedContact.FirstName,0,9) ) 
					else vars.authorizedContact.FirstName default "",
				LASTNAME: if(  ( sizeOf(lastName(vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.AccountName, (vars.authorizedContact.LastName default ""))  )  default 0)  > 9  )
						substring(lastName(vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.AccountName, (vars.authorizedContact.LastName default "")) ,0,9 )   
					else ( lastName(vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.AccountName, (vars.authorizedContact.LastName default "") ) replace /[^ -~]/ with ("-") ),
				bsnsTlphnNmbr: if(vars.authorizedContact.Phone != null) vars.authorizedContact.Phone   else "",
				CSTMRCMNT: "BA ID: " ++ vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.AccountId default "",
				(if( p('default.Send.National.Sales.TaxExempt.Flag') as Boolean == true) (TAXEXMPTCODE: vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.NtlSalesTaxExemptFlag default "") else ({})) ,
				CSTMRTYPECODE: if(vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.NtlSalesAccountType != null) lookup("AccountTypeLookup", vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.NtlSalesAccountType, 60000)   else "0",
				LANGCODE: "ENGL",
				(if(vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.NtlSalesInvoicePresentation == "Consolidated") (CSTMRCTGRY: 1 ) else ({}) ),
				(if(vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.NtlSalesInvoicePresentation == "Third Party") (CSTMRCTGRY: 2 )else ({}) ),
				(if(vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.NtlSalesInvoicePresentation == "Individual") (CSTMRCTGRY: 3 )else ({}) ),
				(if(vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.NtlSalesInvoicePresentation != "Consolidated" 
					and vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.NtlSalesInvoicePresentation != "Third Party" 
					and vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.NtlSalesInvoicePresentation != "Individual") (CSTMRCTGRY: 0 ) else({}) ),
				(if(vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.NtlSalesInvoicePresentation != "Consolidated" 
					and vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.NtlSalesInvoicePresentation != "Third Party" 
					and vars.subGroupRequest.BillingAccountDetails.NtlSalesInvoicePresentation != "Individual") (CSTMRCTGRY: 1 ) else ({}) ),
					(EMALADRS: if((sizeOf(vars.authorizedContact.Email) default 0) > 39) trim(substring(vars.authorizedContact.Email, 0, 40)) else trim(vars.authorizedContact.Email) ) if(vars.authorizedContact != null and (vars.authorizedContact.Email default "") != "")				
				
			}
		}
	}
}

instruction: The **SF-Netcracker Quote Update Process API** serves as the integration bridge between **Salesforce CPQ** and **NetCracker** for the Charter Communic using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, Error Handling, HTTP Request, Retry Logic, Salesforce Query
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce"
	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd">
	<flow name="special-pricing-decision-support-statusFlow" doc:id="fedc89df-8800-4460-b7f8-b88209e445bb" >
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Before Salesforce query payload" doc:id="fdbff8ee-b6aa-4377-8af9-e3e7207cac1d" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Before salesforce query" tracePoint="BEFORE_REQUEST" />
		<salesforce:query doc:name="specilalPricing and decisionSupport Details" doc:id="de5adaa9-64e0-4b4c-b214-1940734ea1f0" config-ref="CPQ_Salesforce_Config">
			<salesforce:salesforce-query ><![CDATA[${query.specialPricingDecisionSupport}]]></salesforce:salesforce-query>
			<salesforce:parameters ><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"approvalPlanId" : vars.originalPayloadData.approvalPlanId
}]]]></salesforce:parameters>
		</salesforce:query>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Salesforce Payload" doc:id="e0ca187a-f0fc-4715-a532-bc95b52e126c" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="After Salesforce query payload" doc:id="73855ca1-9632-4354-9035-17d22f0a1011" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After salesforce query" tracePoint="AFTER_REQUEST" />
		<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="12eca80f-614b-46fe-8c1e-cfcf211b1e9f" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload)>0]">
				<flow-ref doc:name="token" doc:id="5e685362-227d-445a-ad56-07db1ac3d608" name="token_flow" target="token" targetValue="#[payload.access_token]"/>
				<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="4a1dff73-9ed5-448f-bda4-238dd1680cd0" >
					<when expression="#[vars.token != null]">
						<ee:transform doc:name="SF to NC fields mapping" doc:id="a6c0a94c-eb77-4e8d-881d-3faa35de6b01">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	"extendedParameters": 
	{
		"approver": [payload[0].ApprovalPlan__r.Approval_Status_Owner__c],
		"approvalPlanId": [payload[0].Id],
	    "approvalTimestamp": [payload[0].ApprovalPlan__r.LastModifiedDate],
	     (vars.originalPayloadData.status): ["Completed"]
	}
}
]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="After transforming the data as per netcracker" doc:id="3f65481a-0dc6-47c9-8ba1-1f4d0546b080" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Logging specialPricing and decisionStatus request " tracePoint="BEFORE_REQUEST"/>
						<until-successful maxRetries="${retry.count}" doc:name="Until Successful" doc:id="7122aa4b-ae87-48b0-8adc-c0a0f05c9832" millisBetweenRetries="${retry.frequency}">
							<http:request method="PATCH" doc:name="Request to Netcracker" doc:id="d8f67c08-f5c1-4a34-b7d8-52460ac94a77" config-ref="Netcracker_CPQ_GW_HTTPS_Request_configuration" path="${netcracker.sitesurveyPath}">
							<http:headers><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"Authorization" : "Bearer " ++ vars.token 
}]]]></http:headers>
							<http:uri-params><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"quoteId" : vars.quoteId
}]]]></http:uri-params>
						</http:request>
						</until-successful>
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logging NC Response" doc:id="a6f7268f-143d-4062-b17a-3be3a87a4a51" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Logging the NC response" tracePoint="AFTER_REQUEST"/>
						<ee:transform doc:name="Success Response" doc:id="5f958ea1-9e93-46aa-aed3-4481210d5983" >
							<ee:message >
								<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
import * from dw::util::Values
output application/json
---
{
    "success": true,
    "apiName": p('api.name'),
    "version": p('api.version'),
    "message": vars.originalPayloadData.status ++ "status successfully updated in netcracker",
    "correlationId": correlationId,
    "timestamp": now()
}]]></ee:set-payload>
							</ee:message>
						</ee:transform>
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logging Success Response" doc:id="ad461227-d214-4874-b8f3-b09e94e4abac" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Logging the response" tracePoint="END"/>
					</when>
					<otherwise >
						<ee:transform doc:name="Failure response" doc:id="8a800aff-18df-4a1a-8320-4e0de0a3b138">
					<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p_failure_response.dwl" />
					</ee:message>
					<ee:variables>
						<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
p('error.badrequestcode')]]></ee:set-variable>
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="Failure Response" doc:id="98f05a20-dc98-4247-8a5d-cf9d8ff45f4b" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Invalid token error message" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" />
					</otherwise>
				</choice>
			</when>
			<otherwise>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log the empty payload" doc:id="3c8a7cd8-e48a-4fc6-842e-b2e176e28051" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Getting Empty payload of quote from SF" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" />
			</otherwise>
		</choice>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule
	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger"

	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
	xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
	xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">
	<sub-flow name="nuwave-request-subflow"
		doc:id="c1044fee-3371-4163-9f68-e08ceea3c9b7">
		<ee:transform doc:name="set metadata"
			doc:id="637c44b6-f884-47ce-839a-54a8e172e84d">
			<ee:message>
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="method"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
payload.method default "GET"]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="path"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
p('nuwave.apiBasePath') ++ payload.path default ""]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="queryParams"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
payload.queryParams default {} ++  {
	"instance": "spectrum"
}]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="body"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.body]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<flow-ref doc:name="flow refers to get-auth-token"
			doc:id="64eaec70-b2dd-4f77-8e31-f0ee37b49182" name="get-auth-token" />
		<try doc:name="Try" doc:id="26eae09f-e2d3-4836-a2b8-9d4643e9dff0" >
			<flow-ref doc:name="flow refers to invoke nuwave request" doc:id="d453b018-ff78-4c40-94b9-01d7b6084f65" name="request-nuwave-common-subflow" />
			<error-handler >
				<on-error-continue enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Continue" doc:id="838cd9b1-4e53-4e04-840f-c6a0227c6cf0" when="#[(error.muleMessage.typedValue.^raw contains Mule::p('nuwave.token.invalid')) or (lower(error.muleMessage.typedValue.^raw) contains Mule::p('nuwave.token.expired'))  ]">
					<flow-ref doc:name="get-new-token" doc:id="c5d40e72-7876-4987-bb20-8052dd80b3f0" name="get-new-token" />
					<flow-ref doc:name="flow refers to invoke nuwave request" doc:id="af7e5e9d-e907-4b00-a9ed-c5eadd194876" name="request-nuwave-common-subflow" />
				</on-error-continue>
			</error-handler>
		</try>
		<ee:transform doc:name="set response" doc:id="e4cadfdb-12e7-4df2-8278-53c62158c17d">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
var statuscode = vars.httpStatus
output application/json
---
{
	"success": if ( statuscode ~= 200 or statuscode ~= 201 or statuscode ~= 204 ) true else false,
	"apiName": Mule::p('api.name'),
	"version": Mule::p('api.version'),
	"correlationId": correlationId,
	"timestamp": now(),
	"system": "Nuwave",
	"response": if(isEmpty(payload.^raw)) [] else payload
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
attributes.statusCode]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
	</sub-flow>
</mule>

instruction: The **SF SPC PAPI** (Process API) serves as the integration layer between Salesforce and the Spectrum Platform Core (SPC) system. It provides a unifie using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, HTTP Request
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"

	xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">
	<flow name="post-customerStatements-flow" doc:id="27f54309-eb36-4473-bd3c-5f0c983396ae" >
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Initial Log" doc:id="e0041f60-347a-4f15-a0b8-4a7bed28ba0c" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="SPC Service : getCustomerStatementsV1x1 :: Intial Payload :"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Request Payload" doc:id="8d11ea25-df16-4f57-80d7-880b386481bd">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload resource="dw/SPC_getCustomerStatements_Request.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="accountNumber" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
accountNumber: payload.RetrieveStatementLedgerRequest.AccountNumber]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Request Log" doc:id="7202898f-3ad2-4120-8caa-c1d214dfde92" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message=" SPC Service : getCustomerStatementsV1x1 :: Request :"/>
		<http:request method="POST" doc:name="SPC : getCustomerStatementsV1x1" doc:id="e17e5e24-2671-415d-aa36-0de303dfd5a7" config-ref="SPC_HTTPS_Request_configuration" path="${spc.getCustomerStatementsV1x1.InvokePath}" sendCorrelationId="ALWAYS" correlationId="#[correlationId]"/>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Response Log" doc:id="9310b69f-c93e-4ecc-ac1a-f62c1b1cb880" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="SPC Service : getCustomerStatementsV1x1 :: Response :"/>
		<choice doc:name="checkResponse" doc:id="38661d76-490c-4c2a-88cc-6c534a3056da" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload.getCustomerStatementsResponse) > 0]">
				<ee:transform doc:name="Transform SPC Response" doc:id="67ba5877-b22d-4bff-8b0d-db195dc1fc86">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload resource="dw/SPC_getCustomerStatements_Response.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Final Response Log" doc:id="f234e0ea-722f-416b-8b6c-031f88cbacb9" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="SPC Service :  getCustomerStatementsV1x1 ::  Successfully Processed : Response :" />
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="No data from SPC" doc:id="329771b0-5b42-4481-88e6-8eb11e2841c6" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="SPC Service :  getCustomerStatementsV1x1 ::  No data returned from SPC getCustomerStatementsV1x1"/>
				<ee:transform doc:name="errorMessage" doc:id="06fb6e25-55d7-4e94-820d-5e2564f4d22c" >
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	"isSuccess": false,
		RetrieveStatementLedgerResponse: {	
	AccountNumber: vars.accountNumber,
	errorCode: 404,
	errorMessage: "No data returned from SPC customer Statements"
	
	}
}]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>
				</ee:transform>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
			<error-handler >
			<on-error-continue enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Continue" doc:id="6d66fabe-2c97-49c8-be08-3f43003f2788" >
				<set-variable value="#[error.exception.errorMessage.attributes.statusCode default 500]" doc:name="httpStatus" doc:id="7e4092ff-d9bd-4d07-9a67-20e2bd4303b1" variableName="httpStatus" />
				<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Error Message" doc:id="41ffa6af-bc80-404b-8704-72621b599e6f">
					<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	"isSuccess": false,	
		RetrieveStatementLedgerResponse: {
	AccountNumber: vars.accountNumber,
	errorCode:error.exception.errorMessage.attributes.statusCode,
	errorDescription: error.description,
	errorType:error.exception.'type',
	errorMessage:error.exception.errorMessage.payload
	
	}

}
]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>
				</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="SPC Error Log" doc:id="92000a48-1cef-4c88-add0-c1d097efcabe" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" message="SPC Service :  getCustomerStatementsV1x1 :: Final Exception Message : " />
			</on-error-continue>
		</error-handler>
	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for Any Error Response (mapping/transformation)

%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    "success": false,
    "apiName": p('api.name'),
    "version": p('api.version'),
    "correlationId": correlationId,
    "timestamp": now(),
    "errorDetails": vars.kafkaPayload.messagelist.Id map ((item, index) -> 
        {
            "code": (if(isEmpty(error.muleMessage.attributes.StatusCode))
                       p('error.internalservercode')
                    else
                      error.muleMessage.attributes.StatusCode),
            "reason": error.errorType.asString ,
            "message": if(error.description != null)(error.description) else (error.cause.localizedMessage)
        }
    )
}

Write a DataWeave transformation for p opportunityRecords (mapping/transformation, CSV processing)

%dw 2.0
output application/csv
import * from dw::core::Strings
---
((payload distinctBy($.AccountID)) orderBy ((item, index) -> item.AccountID) default []) map ((row) -> {
	"Coax_NRR_SCQR__c":row.CoaxNRRAmt replace "," with "",
	"Fiber_NRR_SCQR__c":row.FiberNRRAmt replace "," with "",
	"New_Coax_Rev_SCQR__c":row.CoaxSimpleMRRAmt replace "," with "",
	"New_Fiber_Rev_SCQR__c":row.FiberMRRAmt replace "," with "",
	"Renewal_MRR_SCQR__c":row.RenewalSoldAmt replace "," with "",
	"Renewal_MRR_Credit_SCQR__c":row.RenewalCreditAmt replace "," with "",
	"Opp_Coax_Net_Rev_NRR_Amort_Quota_SCQR__c":row.CoaxSimpleSalesCreditAmt replace "," with "",   
	"Opp_Fiber_Net_Rev_NRR_Amort_Quota_SCQR__c":row.FiberSalesCreditAmt replace "," with "",
	"Sales_Credit_Quota_Relief_SCQR__c":row.SalesCreditAmt replace "," with "",
	"Id":row.OpportunityID,
	"Last_Calculated_SCQR__c": (( ( trim(row.RecordChangedDateTime) replace " " with "T") as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T 'HH:mm:ss+HH:mm"} >> "UTC") as DateTime {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"})
})

		<set-variable value='#[if(error.detailedDescription !=null) error.detailedDescription  else "Job failed. Please check app logs for more details"]' doc:name="emailBody" doc:id="6725c7e0-230c-4572-86df-0f6f15025d4c" variableName="emailBody" />
		<set-variable value='#["Failed: " ++ server.host ++ " / " ++ app.name]' doc:name="emailSubject" doc:id="0e1ca8d4-60b1-4bcc-b3c1-efa5704eedca" variableName="emailSubject" />

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook regex match replace
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Regex Match and Replace
 * Category: String Operations
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Use regular expressions to match patterns within strings, extract
 * captured groups, and perform find-and-replace. Essential for parsing
 * unstructured text, validating formats, extracting IDs from URIs, and
 * sanitizing input data.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "orderRef": "ORD-2026-00542-US",
 *   "phone": "+1 (555) 012-3456",
 *   "email": "alice.chen@example.com",
 *   "logLine": "2026-01-15 ERROR [com.acme.api] Connection timeout"
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "orderYear": "2026",
 * "orderNumber": "00542",
 * "orderRegion": "US",
 * "phoneDigitsOnly": "15550123456",
 * "emailDomain": "example.com",
 * "logLevel": "ERROR",
 * "logHost": "db-prod-01.internal",
 * "logPort": "5432",
 * "phoneMasked": "+1 (555) ***-****"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var orderMatch = payload.orderRef match /^ORD-(\d{4})-(\d{5})-(\w+)$/
---
{
    orderYear: orderMatch[1],
    orderNumber: orderMatch[2],
    orderRegion: orderMatch[3],
    phoneDigitsOnly: payload.phone replace /[^0-9]/ with "",
    emailDomain: (payload.email match /.*@(.+)/)[1]
}

			postalCode: if ( vars.TypeIIOrder.RFQ_Name__r.Z_Location_Non_US__c == "true" ) (vars.TypeIIOrder.RFQ_Name__r.Z_Location_Zip_Code__c) else "",

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p extractCDFFromSPCResponse (XML handling)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/java
var padding = ["", "0", "00", "000", "0000"]
fun padCDF(code, size) = (if ( isNull(code) ) (if ( (sizeOf(code)) < size ) (padding[size - (sizeOf(code))] ++ code) else code) else null)
fun isNull(value) = (if  (value != "" and  value != null)  true else false)
var IBS = payload.getLocationResponse.location
---
if ( isNull(payload.getLocationResponse) ) {
	company: if ( isNull(IBS.billingStationLevel0Code) ) padCDF(IBS.billingStationLevel1Code, 2) else null,
	division: if ( isNull(IBS.billingStationLevel1Code) ) padCDF(IBS.billingStationLevel2Code, 2) else null,
	franchise: if ( isNull(IBS.billingStationLevel2Code) ) padCDF(IBS.sourceFTACode, 3) else null
}
else null

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: shyamrajprasad dataweave fun
Write a DataWeave transformation for p MAC00073CommitRequest (XML handling)
Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook edi to json (mapping/transformation, aggregation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: EDI to JSON
 * Category: Real-World Mappings
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Transform parsed EDI (X12/EDIFACT) data into a clean JSON
 * structure. In MuleSoft, EDI is first parsed by the X12/EDIFACT connector
 * into a DataWeave-accessible object. This pattern shows how to map the
 * parsed EDI segments into business-friendly JSON. Uses an X12 850
 * (Purchase Order) as the example.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "poNumber": "PO-2026-4521",
 *   "poDate": "20260215",
 *   "buyer": {
 *     "name": "Acme Corp",
 *     "id": "ACME-001"
 *   },
 *   "seller": {
 *     "name": "Global Supplies",
 *     "id": "GSUP-500"
 *   },
 *   "lineItems": [
 *     {
 *       "line": 1,
 *       "sku": "SKU-100",
 *       "desc": "Keyboard",
 *       "qty": 50,
 *       "price": 89.99
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "line": 2,
 *       "sku": "SKU-400",
 *       "desc": "Mouse",
 *       "qty": 100,
 *       "price": 24.99
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "purchaseOrder": {
 * "poNumber": "PO-2026-4521",
 * "poDate": "2026-02-15",
 * "poType": "New Order",
 * "buyer": {"name": "Acme Corporation", "id": "ACME-001"},
 * "seller": {"name": "Global Supplies Ltd", "id": "GSUP-500"},
 * "lineItems": [
 * {"lineNumber": 1, "sku": "SKU-100", "description": "Mechanical Keyboard", "quantity": 50, "unit": "EA", "unitPrice": 149.99, "lineTotal": 7499.50},
 * {"lineNumber": 2, "sku": "SKU-400", "description": "Wireless Mouse", "quantity": 100, "unit": "EA", "unitPrice": 29.99, "lineTotal": 2999.00}
 * ],
 * "orderTotal": 10498.50
 * }
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var dateStr = payload.poDate
---
{
  purchaseOrder: {
    poNumber: payload.poNumber,
    poDate: "$(dateStr[0 to 3])-$(dateStr[4 to 5])-$(dateStr[6 to 7])",
    buyer: payload.buyer,
    seller: payload.seller,
    lineItems: payload.lineItems map (item) -> ({
      lineNumber: item.line, sku: item.sku, description: item.desc, quantity: item.qty, unitPrice: item.price, lineTotal: item.qty * item.price
    }),
    orderTotal: payload.lineItems reduce (item, acc = 0) -> acc + (item.qty * item.price)
  }
}

/**
 * Pattern: Pluck Values
 * Category: Object Transformation
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Extract keys, values, or key-value pairs from an object into an
 * array. Use pluck when you need to iterate over an object's entries (like
 * Object.entries() in JavaScript). Common for building dropdown options from
 * config objects, converting objects to arrays for further processing, or
 * extracting all values for aggregation.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "productPrices": {
 *     "Laptop": 1299.99,
 *     "Monitor": 599.99,
 *     "Keyboard": 149.99,
 *     "Mouse": 29.99,
 *     "Headset": 199.95
 *   }
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * {"product": "Laptop", "price": 1299.99},
 * {"product": "Monitor", "price": 599.99},
 * {"product": "Keyboard", "price": 149.99},
 * {"product": "Mouse", "price": 29.99},
 * {"product": "Headset", "price": 199.95}
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.productPrices pluck (price, product) -> ({product: product as String, price: price})

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook jwt decode (XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: JWT Token Decode
 * Category: Security & Encoding
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Parse a JWT (JSON Web Token) to extract header and payload
 * claims without signature verification. Useful for logging, routing based
 * on claims, or extracting user context in integration flows.
 * NOTE: This does NOT verify the signature. Verification should be done
 * by your API gateway or security policy, not in DataWeave.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyXzEyMyIsIm5hbWUiOiJKb2huIERvZSIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTcwMDAwMDAwMH0.signature"
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "header": {
 * "alg": "HS256",
 * "typ": "JWT"
 * },
 * "payload": {
 * "sub": "1234567890",
 * "name": "John Doe",
 * "role": "admin",
 * "iat": 1516239022,
 * "exp": 1739000000
 * },
 * "isExpired": true,
 * "subject": "1234567890"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
import * from dw::core::Binaries
output application/json
fun decodeJwtPart(part: String): Object =
    read(fromBase64(part) as String {encoding: "UTF-8"}, "application/json")
var parts = payload.token splitBy "."
var jwtHeader = decodeJwtPart(parts[0])
var jwtPayload = decodeJwtPart(parts[1])
---
{ header: jwtHeader, payload: jwtPayload, subject: jwtPayload.sub, isExpired: jwtPayload.exp < (now() as Number {unit: "seconds"}) }

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for v sfOliResponse (mapping/transformation, flattening nested data)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
flatten((payload default []) map (item) -> do {
    var qty = ((item.Quantity_New__c default item.Quantity) as Number) default 0
    ---
    if (qty > 0)
      (1 to qty) map {
        "Service_Code__c": item.Ntl_ICOMS_Service_Code__c,
        "Service_Occurrence__c": item.Service_Occurance__c,
        "Service_Quantity__c": "1", // Always "1" after splitting
        "Service_Rate__c": item.Billing_Price__c as Number,
        "Opportunity_Line_Item__c": item.Id,
        "EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c": item.EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c,
        "Future_Bill_Date__c": item.Service_Request__r.Future_Bill_Date__c,
        "Service_Active_Date__c": item.Service_Request__r.Service_Active_Date__c,
        "Actual_Install_Date__c": item.Service_Request__r.Actual_Install_Date__c
      }
    else []
})

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for Transform SOA Request (XML handling)
Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook sliding window (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Sliding Window
 * Category: Array Manipulation
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Create overlapping windows (sub-arrays) of a fixed size
 * that slide across an array. Used for time-series analysis, moving
 * averages, streak detection, and sequential pattern matching.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "prices": [
 *     100,
 *     102,
 *     98,
 *     105,
 *     110,
 *     108,
 *     115
 *   ],
 *   "windowSize": 3
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "windows": [
 * [100, 102, 98],
 * [102, 98, 105],
 * [98, 105, 110],
 * [105, 110, 108],
 * [110, 108, 115],
 * [108, 115, 120],
 * [115, 120, 118],
 * [120, 118, 125]
 * ],
 * "movingAverages": [100.0, 101.67, 104.33, 107.67, 109.33, 110.33, 117.67, 119.33, 121.0],
 * "maxInWindow": [102, 105, 110, 110, 115, 120, 120, 125]
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var prices = payload.prices
var windowSize = payload.windowSize
fun slidingWindow(arr, size) = (0 to (sizeOf(arr) - size)) map (i) -> arr[i to (i + size - 1)]
var windows = slidingWindow(prices, windowSize)
---
{windows: windows, movingAverages: windows map (w) -> round(avg(w) * 100) / 100, maxInWindow: windows map (w) -> max(w)}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook hateoas links
output:
/**
 * Pattern: HATEOAS Links
 * Category: API Response Patterns
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Generate hypermedia links for REST resources following
 * HATEOAS (Hypermedia As The Engine Of Application State) principles.
 * Allows API clients to discover available actions dynamically.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "id": "ORD-500",
 *   "customerId": "CUST-42",
 *   "status": "PENDING",
 *   "total": 189.5,
 *   "items": [
 *     {
 *       "sku": "ITEM-A",
 *       "qty": 2
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "sku": "ITEM-B",
 *       "qty": 1
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "id": "ORD-12345",
 * "customerId": "CUST-001",
 * "status": "PENDING",
 * "total": 299.99,
 * "items": [...],
 * "_links": {
 * "self":     { "href": "/api/v1/orders/ORD-12345", "method": "GET" },
 * "update":   { "href": "/api/v1/orders/ORD-12345", "method": "PUT" },
 * "cancel":   { "href": "/api/v1/orders/ORD-12345/cancel", "method": "POST" },
 * "customer": { "href": "/api/v1/customers/CUST-001", "method": "GET" },
 * "items":    { "href": "/api/v1/orders/ORD-12345/items", "method": "GET" },
 * "invoice":  { "href": "/api/v1/orders/ORD-12345/invoice", "method": "GET" }
 * }
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var baseUrl = "/api/v1"
var orderId = payload.id
fun link(href: String, method: String): Object = { href: href, method: method }
var statusActions = payload.status match {
    case "PENDING" -> ({ update: link("$(baseUrl)/orders/$(orderId)", "PUT"), cancel: link("$(baseUrl)/orders/$(orderId)/cancel", "POST"), confirm: link("$(baseUrl)/orders/$(orderId)/confirm", "POST") })
    case "CONFIRMED" -> ({ cancel: link("$(baseUrl)/orders/$(orderId)/cancel", "POST"), ship: link("$(baseUrl)/orders/$(orderId)/ship", "POST") })
    else -> ({}) }
---
payload ++ { _links: { self: link("$(baseUrl)/orders/$(orderId)", "GET"), customer: link("$(baseUrl)/customers/$(payload.customerId)", "GET") } ++ statusActions }

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p createProduct (mapping/transformation)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/java
var grp= vars.tmfResponse.quoteItem groupBy ((item, index) -> item.productOffering.id)
---
vars.newProduct map ((item, index) ->{
    "Name": grp[item][0].extendedParameters.contractDisplayName[0] default grp[item].productOffering.name[0],
    "Product_Revenue_Category__c": if(grp[item].quoteItemPrice..priceType[0] == "RC" or grp[item].quoteItemPrice..priceType[0] == "Total RC") "Monthly Recurring" else "Non-Recurring",
    "CPQExternalId__c": item,
    "Family": grp[item].productFamily..name[0],
    "CPQEnabledFlag__c": true,
    "IsActive": true,
   ("CanUseRevenueSchedule": true) if(grp[item].quoteItemPrice..priceType[0]=="RC"),
   ("CanUseRevenueSchedule": false) if(grp[item].quoteItemPrice..priceType[0]=="NRC"),
   (if(grp[item].productFamily..name[0] contains "RingCentral") ({
   	"Secondary_Service_Code__c": grp[item][0].extendedParameters.ringCentralSecondary[0] default "",
    "Tertiary_Service_Code__c": grp[item][0].extendedParameters.ringCentralTertiary[0] default "",
	"Quaternary_Service_Code__c": grp[item][0].extendedParameters.ringCentralQuaternary[0] default ""	
   }) else {})
})

    reversal1: myVar[-1 to 0]
}

		<http:listener-connection host="0.0.0.0" port="8081" />
	</http:listener-config>
	<flow name="automatic-watermarkingFlow" doc:id="e4592c41-685f-4cee-9bd1-40776b657131" >
		<db:listener doc:name="AWS MySQL" doc:id="7bd8fb5f-6b71-425d-aea4-14c71541743e" config-ref="AWS-MySQL-Database_Config" table="customers" watermarkColumn="CustomerID" idColumn="CustomerID">
			<scheduling-strategy >

			<db:sql ><![CDATA[INSERT INTO customers (CustomerID, CustomerName, ContactName, Address, City, PostalCode, Country)

]]></db:sql>
			<db:input-parameters ><![CDATA[#[{
CustomerID: payload.CustomerID, 
CustomerName:payload.CustomerName, 
ContactName:payload.CustomerName, 
Address:payload.Address, 
City:payload.City,
PostalCode:payload.PostalCode,
Country:payload.Country
}]]]></db:input-parameters>
		</db:insert>
	</flow>
	<flow name="manual-watermarkingFlow1" doc:id="f3b92221-d230-4aed-bbae-999896e97f6e" >
		<scheduler doc:name="Scheduler" doc:id="d645fd3b-7538-401a-bcb8-920df31a2698" >
			<scheduling-strategy >
				<fixed-frequency frequency="10" timeUnit="SECONDS"/>
			</scheduling-strategy>
		</scheduler>
		<os:retrieve doc:name="maxID" doc:id="66dcb7a5-186d-44a2-bbea-68833ef8f9fd" key="maxID" objectStore="Object_store" target="maxID">
			<os:default-value ><![CDATA[0]]></os:default-value>
		</os:retrieve>
		<db:select doc:name="AWS-MySQL" doc:id="55f511b3-ed79-4a1a-8277-d9f0319078df" config-ref="AWS-MySQL-Database_Config">
			<db:sql ><![CDATA[SELECT * FROM suppliers
where SupplierID > :ID and Country = 'USA']]></db:sql>
			<db:input-parameters ><![CDATA[#[{'ID':vars.maxID}]]]></db:input-parameters>
		</db:select>
		<set-variable value="#[sizeOf(payload)]" doc:name="size of payload" doc:id="1868749e-93c7-4b1a-bafc-228053842bfd" variableName="size_var"/>
		<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="bbb71081-4d0f-4611-8923-6b6df5eb1c6d" />
		<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="197f6723-ceb8-4a73-b634-0a560d736237" >
			<when expression="#[not isEmpty(payload)]">
				<os:store doc:name="maxID" doc:id="e2288441-fff3-4496-82d8-60b3ea0ff1db" key="maxID" objectStore="Object_store">
					<os:value ><![CDATA[#[max(payload.*SupplierID)]]]></os:value>

values(:SupplierID,:SupplierName,:ContactName,:Address,:City,:PostalCode,:Country,:Phone)]]></db:sql>
				</db:bulk-insert>
				<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="f3ccb777-d652-4da6-bb52-d526d5dc38be" message='#[{"message": vars.size_var as String ++ " imported into the local MySQL from AWS MySQL"}]' />
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="e308bd1d-72b7-40d7-8b61-91b0a9ff1072" message="No new data found!"/>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
	</flow>
	<flow name="automatic-manual-watermarkingFlow" doc:id="1558c8db-1211-4506-95c6-28e9e77d41d1" >
		<http:listener doc:name="Listener" doc:id="81c6bc7d-4333-44ca-a673-ac0552b52c02" config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="/clear"/>
		<os:clear doc:name="Clear" doc:id="6a089843-1ddd-40ca-94dd-b3ba3d43ab92" objectStore="Object_store"/>
	</flow>
</mule>

output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
      xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
      xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
      xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
      xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit"
      xmlns:example="http://www.example.org/schema/mule/example"
      xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
                          http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
                          http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd
                          http://www.example.org/schema/mule/example http://www.example.org/schema/mule/example/current/mule-example.xsd">

    <http:listener-config name="api-httpListenerConfig">
        <http:listener-connection host="0.0.0.0" port="8081" />
    </http:listener-config>

    <apikit:config name="api-config" raml="../resources/api.raml" outboundHeadersMapName="outboundHeaders" httpStatusVarName="httpStatus" />

    <flow name="api-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="api-httpListenerConfig" path="/api/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body>#[payload]</http:body>
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:router config-ref="api-config" />
    </flow>

    <flow name="get:/example:api-config" doc:id="a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-1234-567890abcdef">
        <!-- This flow implements the /example GET endpoint from api.raml -->
        <!-- Dependency usage reference: org.example:example-dependency -->
        <set-payload value="#['Response from /example implementation']" doc:name="Set Payload"/>
        <!-- Adding a dummy component to reference the example dependency -->
        <example:transform doc:name="Example Transformer"/>
    </flow>

</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook diff comparison (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Structural Diff Between Two Payloads
 * Category: Utility Modules
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Use dw::util::Diff to compare two values structurally and
 * identify exact differences. Invaluable for API response regression testing,
 * config change detection, migration validation, and audit logging where
 * you need to know precisely what changed.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "expected": {
 *     "name": "Alice Chen",
 *     "age": 30,
 *     "roles": [
 *       "admin",
 *       "editor"
 *     ],
 *     "address": {
 *       "city": "Portland",
 *       "state": "OR"
 *     }
 *   },
 *   "actual": {
 *     "name": "Alice Chen",
 *     "age": 31,
 *     "roles": [
 *       "admin",
 *       "viewer"
 *     ],
 *     "address": {
 *       "city": "Seattle",
 *       "state": "WA"
 *     }
 *   }
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "identical": false,
 * "differenceCount": 4,
 * "differences": [
 * {"path": "age", "expected": 30, "actual": 31},
 * {"path": "roles[1]", "expected": "editor", "actual": "viewer"},
 * {"path": "address.city", "expected": "Portland", "actual": "Seattle"},
 * {"path": "address.state", "expected": "OR", "actual": "WA"}
 * ]
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
import diff from dw::util::Diff
output application/json
var result = diff(payload.expected, payload.actual)
---
{
  identical: result.matches,
  differenceCount: sizeOf(result.diffs default []),
  differences: (result.diffs default []) map (d) -> ({
    path: d.path, expected: d.expected, actual: d.actual
  })
}

instruction: The **Interactive Install Process API (PAPI)** is a MuleSoft-based integration service that orchestrates the **interactive installation scheduling wor using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd">

    
    <flow name="interactive-install-papi-main">
               <http:listener path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
		<ee:transform doc:name="set sourceSystem, service" doc:id="e19179c5-d76c-4c86-a11b-5eac36f1f554">
			<ee:message />
			<ee:variables>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="sourceSystem"><![CDATA[attributes.headers."source-system" default "XDG"]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="service"><![CDATA["NEOS Service"]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<apikit:router config-ref="interactive-install-papi-config"/>
		<error-handler >
			<on-error-continue enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Continue" doc:id="f0872622-f0b2-4184-9a17-f155fa9fb189" >
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:id="8ca14fd9-649a-4fa3-903c-76509b94a014" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config" doc:name="Process Error" />
				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set httpStatus code" doc:id="aa3ece8e-5beb-43b3-ab07-1bc54e6e5c0e" variableName="httpStatus" />
				<json-logger:logger doc:id="f0795871-f470-43f4-996c-92d26dda23be" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Error details" doc:name="Log APIkit error response" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR"/>
			</on-error-continue>
		</error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="interactive-install-papi-console">
        <http:listener path="/console/*" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="interactive-install-papi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\health-check:interactive-install-papi-config">
          <ee:transform doc:name="health-check response">
            <ee:message>
                <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    "success": true,
    "apiName": p('api.name'),
    "version": p('api.version'),
    "correlationId": correlationId,
    "timestamp": now(),
    "response": {
                  "Status": p('api.name') ++ " is up and running"
                }
}
 ]]></ee:set-payload>
            </ee:message>
        </ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log health check response" doc:id="69eebd18-6325-4a82-b1d5-59470c69545f" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Health check response" tracePoint="END"/>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\order\schedule-info:interactive-install-papi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="get-order-schedule-info-flow" doc:id="ecb1faa7-6ce3-44e6-9445-485ba0c21429" name="get-order-schedule-info-flow"/>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\order\schedule:application\json:interactive-install-papi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="update-order-schedule-flow" doc:id="985319d4-3d03-466d-b137-7ee685189df4" name="update-order-schedule-flow"/>
    </flow>
</mule>

	("Pega_Task_URL__c": (vars.modifiedPayload[0].pegaCaseURL)) if(vars.modifiedPayload[0].pegaCaseURL != null),
	("Pega_Short_Banner_Message__c": (vars.modifiedPayload[0].shortBannerMsg)) if(vars.modifiedPayload[0].shortBannerMsg != null),
})

---

]]></ee:set-payload>

output application/json

var array1 = ['a', 'b', 3, 5, true]

var object1 = {name: "Hagos", age:24}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook camel to snake (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Case Conversion (camelCase ↔ snake_case)
 * Category: String Operations
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Convert strings between camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase, and
 * kebab-case. Critical when mapping between systems with different naming
 * conventions — e.g., Java/Salesforce camelCase fields to Python/database
 * snake_case columns, or REST API kebab-case to internal camelCase.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "camelFields": [
 *     "firstName",
 *     "lastName",
 *     "emailAddress",
 *     "phoneNumber",
 *     "streetAddress"
 *   ],
 *   "snakeFields": [
 *     "first_name",
 *     "last_name",
 *     "email_address",
 *     "phone_number",
 *     "street_address"
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "camelToSnake": ["first_name", "last_name", "email_address", "phone_number", "created_at"],
 * "snakeToCamel": ["firstName", "lastName", "emailAddress", "phoneNumber", "createdAt"],
 * "camelToPascal": ["FirstName", "LastName", "EmailAddress", "PhoneNumber", "CreatedAt"],
 * "camelToKebab": ["first-name", "last-name", "email-address", "phone-number", "created-at"]
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
fun camelToSnake(s) = s replace /([A-Z])/ with ("_" ++ lower($[0]))
fun snakeToCamel(s) = s replace /_([a-z])/ with upper($[1])
---
{toSnake: payload.camelFields map camelToSnake($), toCamel: payload.snakeFields map snakeToCamel($)}

fun stringNull(value) = if(lower(value) == "null") " "  else value
fun dateNull(value)=if(lower(value) == "null" or value == " ") " "  else value as Date {format:'MM-dd-yyyy'}

    (Id : item.Id)if(item.Id != null),
    (Follow_Up_Date__c : dateNull(item.followUpDate)) if(item.followUpDate != null),
    (Authorized_Billing_Contact__c : stringNull(item.authorizedBillingContact)) if(item.authorizedBillingContact != null) ,
    (Fiber_Order_Serviceability_Status__c : stringNull(item.orderFlowUsed))  if(item.orderFlowUsed != null),
    (Order_Type__c : stringNull(item.orderType))if(item.orderType != null),
    (Project__c : stringNull(item.project)) if(item.project != null),
    (Related_Opportunities__c : stringNull(item.relatedOpportunities)) if(item.relatedOpportunities != null) ,
    (Reason_for_Non_Auto_build__c : stringNull(item.reasonforNonAutobuild)) if(item.reasonforNonAutobuild != null),
    (Contact__c : stringNull(item.contact)) if(item.contact != null),
	(Sales_Order_Processing_Status__c  : stringNull(item.salesOrderProcessingStatus)) if(item.salesOrderProcessingStatus != null)

<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
	xmlns:db="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db"

    <sub-flow name="create-new-task-subflow">
        <logger doc:name="START" doc:id="mjtvcd" message="Start - Create new task"/>
        <ee:transform doc:name="inputPayload" doc:id="rbpqoj" >
        <ee:variables>
            <ee:set-variable variableName="inputPayload" resource="dw/create-task-input.dwl"/>
        </ee:variables>
    </ee:transform>
        <db:insert doc:name="Insert new task" doc:id="ympvre" config-ref="Mysql_Database_Config">
            <db:sql><![CDATA[INSERT INTO tasks (title, description, dueDate, completed) 
VALUES (:title, :description, :dueDate, :completed)]]></db:sql>
        
            <db:input-parameters><![CDATA[#[vars.inputPayload]]]></db:input-parameters>        
        </db:insert>
        <db:select doc:name="get ID" doc:id="jqyymr" config-ref="Mysql_Database_Config">
            <db:sql><![CDATA[SELECT * from tasks WHERE title = :title ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;]]></db:sql>
            <db:input-parameters><![CDATA[#[vars.inputPayload]]]></db:input-parameters>    
        </db:select>
        <ee:transform doc:name="to json response" doc:id="pnbsmb" >
            <ee:message >
                <ee:set-payload doc:name="Set payload" doc:id="lyyloh" resource="dw/toJson.dwl"/>
            </ee:message>
        </ee:transform>
        <logger doc:name="END" doc:id="lrdbof" message="End - Create new task"/></sub-flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p sfBssResponse (mapping/transformation, filtering)
Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook dynamic schema (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Dynamic Schema Mapping
 * Category: Advanced Patterns
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Map data dynamically when the schema is not known at design time.
 * Use a configuration-driven approach where field mappings are defined in a
 * lookup table, allowing the same transformation logic to handle different
 * source schemas without code changes. Critical for multi-tenant integrations,
 * configurable ETL, and self-service data mapping tools.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "mappingConfig": [
 *     {
 *       "source": "cust_id",
 *       "target": "customerId"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "source": "cust_name",
 *       "target": "customerName"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "source": "order_amt",
 *       "target": "orderAmount"
 *     }
 *   ],
 *   "sourceData": [
 *     {
 *       "cust_id": "C-100",
 *       "cust_name": "Acme Corp",
 *       "order_amt": 5200
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "cust_id": "C-200",
 *       "cust_name": "Globex Inc",
 *       "order_amt": 3100
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * {"customerId": "C-100", "customerName": "Acme Corp", "orderAmount": 5000.50, "orderDate": "2026-02-15", "isPriority": true},
 * {"customerId": "C-200", "customerName": "Globex Inc", "orderAmount": 1250.00, "orderDate": "2026-02-16", "isPriority": false}
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var config = payload.mappingConfig
---
payload.sourceData map (record) -> ({
  (config map (field) -> ({
    (field.target): record[field.source]
  }))
})

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd">
   
	<flow name="pega-sf-case-sapi-main">
        <http:listener path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <json-logger:logger doc:name="Request Payload" doc:id="704bec5d-2a1c-45ba-af9f-8f55ce666508" message="After receiving the request Payload" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" category="com.charter.pega-sf-case-sapi.pega-sf-case-sapi-main"/>
		<apikit:router config-ref="pega-sf-case-sapi-config" />
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Final response" doc:id="7fa5796f-4b1a-4c31-9b10-d004580197ad" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message='#["pega-sf-case-sapi-main flow complete"]' tracePoint="END" category="com.charter.pega-sf-case-sapi.pega-sf-case-sapi-main"/>
		<error-handler >
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="23646ca9-b3bc-48f5-969d-3747b9d318b2" >
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="182d01f9-5402-4af2-9316-07c9e82b55a8" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config" />
				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="httpStatus" doc:id="161260d3-ecbb-4924-971e-0d8e54813f51" variableName="httpStatus" />
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Error Response" doc:id="34564089-0b5a-4c0f-adc9-d85b25203e5a" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message=" error response" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" category="com.charter.pega-sf-case-sapi.pega-sf-case-sapi-main"/>
			</on-error-propagate>
		</error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="pega-sf-case-sapi-console">
        <http:listener path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/console/*" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="pega-sf-case-sapi-config" />
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\health-check:pega-sf-case-sapi-config">
        <ee:transform doc:name="healthcheck response">
            <ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/healthCheckResponseMapping.dwl" />
            </ee:message>
        </ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="healthcheck response" doc:id="14c51dcc-65fe-4ba6-adcd-66cb2d75d30a" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Healthcheck response" tracePoint="END" category="com.charter.pega-sf-case-sapi.get:\health-check:pega-sf-case-sapi-config"/>

output application/json
---
{

}]]></ee:set-payload>

	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/compression http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/compression/current/mule-compression.xsd">
	
	<flow name="sf-resultsFlow" doc:id="e032d9ae-4240-4712-a7d9-47dcf581fed5" >
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger" doc:id="e249a51f-4a3b-497b-b41d-1a00ac7bfce3" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Entering into salesforce retrieve job failed flow for failed records">
			<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
{
    payload: JSONLoggerModule::stringifyNonJSON(payload) 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<ee:transform doc:name="JobId" doc:id="bad095ab-779f-4144-8734-d63174ac09d1" >
			<ee:message >
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="sfId" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.id]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<flow-ref doc:name="Generic Key Value call" doc:id="0f7dc1be-1edd-42c5-a790-9e518e9b0014" name="load-settingsSub_Flow" />
		<salesforce:retrieve-job-failed-results-bulk-v2 doc:name="Retrieve job failed results bulk v 2" doc:id="355cb801-3ac6-4fdb-955a-a10fcb765dc6" config-ref="Renewal_Salesforce_Config" id="#[vars.sfId]"/>
		<choice doc:name="recordCountCheck" doc:id="d620b789-6606-41e6-a642-117bddcba3d2" >
			<when expression="#[!isEmpty(payload)]">
				<ee:transform doc:name="converttoObject" doc:id="e01e83b3-fae1-4606-b947-51789d88c4f1">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
payload]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
				<ee:transform doc:name="mapping" doc:id="a9e57d51-a252-4cb3-939e-47c9f6207faa">
			<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p_accountFailedRecords.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="logResponse" doc:id="d623238a-ef7a-40fe-a3e8-3ce65c5d385a" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Before sending email to the distribution list with attached failed records file" >
					<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
{
    payload: "Not logging failed records of its size" 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
				</json-logger:logger>
				<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="206147ce-2095-4b15-85f2-804d952a59e0">
					<when expression="#[!isEmpty(vars.errorDetail)]">
						<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="347aa706-9e53-4be4-828e-8b1abe3d85d5" message="error details"/>
					</when>
					<otherwise >
						<try doc:name="Try" doc:id="a88abf11-254f-40f7-a7a5-421cc110b0dc">
					<ee:transform doc:name="Email properties" doc:id="cd1fa377-fa81-4735-bb57-6a849764be40">
						<ee:message>
						</ee:message>
						<ee:variables>
							<ee:set-variable resource="dwl/v_errorEmailSubjectForDailyDeltaLoad.dwl" variableName="errorEmailSubject" />
						</ee:variables>
					</ee:transform>
					<email:send doc:name="SendEmail" doc:id="d871e1dc-760c-4cc6-bb06-3cc275b5aeaf" config-ref="Email_SMTP" fromAddress="${email.from}" subject="#[vars.errorEmailSubject]" toAddresses='#[vars.successEmailNotificationList splitBy ","]'>
						<email:body>
							<email:content><![CDATA[#["Error records are attached"]]]></email:content>
						</email:body>
						<email:attachments><![CDATA[#[{
  ('Delta_Load_Failed_Records_' ++ (vars.sfId default "") ++ '.csv') : payload
}]]]></email:attachments>
					</email:send>
							<error-handler>
						<on-error-continue enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Continue" doc:id="88f64716-6e78-4a02-95bc-aee4fe6be89d">
							<json-logger:logger doc:name="Renewal Dashboard  Failed records email for daily delta load is not sent for jobid" doc:id="6c370f44-ae42-4edc-8fea-32768b399dfa" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message='#["Renewal Dashboard Failed records email for daily delta load is not sent for jobid : " ++ (vars.sfId default "")]' />
						</on-error-continue>
					</error-handler>
				</try>
						<ee:transform doc:name="finalOutput" doc:id="677c787c-86f7-4f24-b841-0eaf1d7ecaaf">
			<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p_dailyDeltaLoadFinalResponse.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
						<logger level="INFO" doc:name="finalResponseLog" doc:id="9db159f4-c638-4285-b321-3acfd5718764" message="successfully sent an email for the failed records to the provided distribution list for SF JobId -- -- #[vars.sfId]" />
					</otherwise>
				</choice>
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="noFailures" doc:id="9af650eb-58fc-46d7-8912-b8f020afaf1d" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message='#["No records failed from the provided Job Id -- " ++ vars.sfId]' tracePoint="END"/>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for v query (mapping/transformation)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
import * from dw::core::Strings
var queryPayload= payload - "ApiName" - "Version"
var keys= keysOf(queryPayload)
var query=p("queries." ++ (lower(vars.apiName) ++ lower(vars.apiVersion)) ++ "Query")
---

substringBefore(query, "WHERE") ++ "WHERE" ++ substringAfter(query,"WHERE") splitBy "and"  map ((item, index) -> 
(item replace (":" ++ trim(keys[index]) ) with ( trim(queryPayload[index])) )) joinBy "and"

instruction: Create a Mule 4 flow named 'whatsapp-automationFlow' using DataWeave Transform, File Read, File Write, HTTP Listener, Send Email with API endpoint /whatsapp

	xmlns:file="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file"
	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file/current/mule-file.xsd
