http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email/current/mule-email.xsd">
	<http:listener-config name="HTTP_Listener_config" doc:name="HTTP Listener config" doc:id="a1454898-01d7-45c9-a22b-d5fc4109e7aa" >
		<http:listener-connection host="${http.host}" port="${http.port}" />
	</http:listener-config>
	<file:config name="File_Config_SikulixHome" doc:name="File Config" doc:id="fab599f9-c6fd-4ead-94cb-1bee492dfafe" >
		<file:connection workingDir="#[vars.sikulixHomeFolder]"/>
	</file:config>
	<email:smtp-config name="Email_SMTP" doc:name="Email SMTP" doc:id="930550a7-3aed-4c7f-800f-217dda420ed9" >
		<email:smtp-connection host="${smtp.host}" port="${smtp.port}" user="${smtp.user}" password="${smtp.password}" >
			<email:properties >
				<email:property key="mail.smtp.starttls.enable" value="true" />
			</email:properties>
		</email:smtp-connection>
	</email:smtp-config>
	<global-property doc:name="Global Property" doc:id="8b50d25d-fb97-446b-bc65-8abd387526a1" name="env" value="dev" />
	<configuration-properties doc:name="Configuration properties" doc:id="b665ef07-074e-4b4a-9f82-accdf1c1ff1e" file="${env}-properties.yaml" />
	<flow name="whatsapp-automationFlow" doc:id="2f9d8039-4ddf-4b5b-bff7-abf6de2cf7d8">
		<http:listener doc:name="AutomationTrigger Endpoint" doc:id="238a5835-2dee-4eb6-a8ca-fdd95ac9ba3f" config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="/whatsapp" allowedMethods="POST"/>
		<flow-ref doc:name="Save Key Data in Vars" doc:id="abcef0ec-dce5-4e59-bd4f-a6e18a9a3ca6" name="save-key-data-in-vars-Sub_Flow"/>
		<flow-ref doc:name="Read CSV file" doc:id="4d620246-c868-42ce-a74a-ed69b9ebbeab" name="read-csv-data-Sub_Flow"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Filter Data for processing" doc:id="e62cc074-64ad-41ea-b482-e9dabbeed450">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
var d_mon = now() as String {format: "d-MMM"}
---
{ input_data : payload filter 
	($.Date == d_mon 
		and ($.SendMsg == "Y" or $.SendImage == "Y")
	)
} 
	
++
	
{
	"sikuli_home_folder" : vars.sikulixHomeFolder,
	"sikuli_images_sub_folder" : vars.sikulixImagesSubFolder,
	"system_default_pictures_folder" : vars.systemDefaultPicturesFolder,
	"whatsapp_desktop_exe" : vars.whatsAppExe,
	"run_date" : vars.runDate
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<java:invoke-static doc:name="Invoke static - Java Sikuli to perform WhatsApp update" doc:id="b6666bb6-6e67-499d-b5b0-9245924de1b2" class="com.dev.whatsapp.WhatsAppAutomationViaSikuliJava" method="updateProfilePictureAndSendGreeting(java.lang.String)">
			<java:args ><![CDATA[#[arg0 : payload]]]></java:args>
		</java:invoke-static>
		<flow-ref doc:name="Read, Email, and Delete Log file" doc:id="71252ac6-5124-4258-b3e2-b5598f6e4424" name="log-file-processing-Sub_Flow"/>
		<flow-ref doc:name="Write Process completion file and Log completion" doc:id="4c9eb924-4d25-4d4b-aaae-30d1cf11627c" name="process-completion-Sub_Flow"/>
	</flow>
	<sub-flow name="save-key-data-in-vars-Sub_Flow" doc:id="532c711b-7c4f-416a-96bd-9916397617d8">
		<ee:transform doc:name="Save Key Data in Vars" doc:id="94fa3559-0c3e-4e23-b1c8-c6187d5ea955">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="systemDefaultPicturesFolder"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.system_default_pictures_folder]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="runDate"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
now() as String {format: "yyyyMMdd"}]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="sikulixHomeFolder" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.sikuli_home_folder]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="sikulixImagesSubFolder" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.sikuli_images_sub_folder]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="processDoneFlagFile" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.process_done_flag_file]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="whatsAppExe" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.whatsapp_desktop_exe]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
	</sub-flow>
	<sub-flow name="read-csv-data-Sub_Flow" doc:id="be359d78-31d2-407f-a82e-b9356f119f0c">
		<file:read doc:name="Read Greetings Data - CSV file" doc:id="ef44d30b-951c-45a6-86f3-c105e31942ca" config-ref="File_Config_SikulixHome" path='#[payload.input_csv_file_name]' />
	</sub-flow>
	<sub-flow name="log-file-processing-Sub_Flow" doc:id="64841e50-696e-446c-a2d1-0774db102897">
		<file:read doc:name="Read Log file" doc:id="228fed0a-5373-4d9f-b8f4-2bd9405ff8e6" config-ref="File_Config_SikulixHome" path='#[vars.runDate as String ++ ".txt"]' />
		<email:send doc:name="Email Log File" doc:id="c98cb0a3-c5fd-4ca3-8dc8-a6e5397af09b" config-ref="Email_SMTP" subject='#[vars.runDate ++ ".txt"]'>

	<sub-flow name="process-completion-Sub_Flow" doc:id="b83ee14b-f15d-4e29-9257-f272d365f0ca" >

instruction: The **SF ICOMS Account Cross-Reference (XREF) Extract Application** is an automated ETL (Extract-Transform-Load) process that provides a critical data using DataWeave Transform, Error Handling, HTTP Listener, Salesforce Query
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd">
	<flow name="on-callHTTPSFlow" doc:id="ccc3b047-f49f-4243-b2e9-1ae55f70734f" >
		<http:listener doc:name="HTTPS" doc:id="6f18689f-e310-4e80-b09f-154a2225fa7f" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="${app.basePath}" />
		<flow-ref doc:name="create-query-jobFlow" doc:id="d2a92a6e-17ac-4e99-906d-f4d9adf8258f" name="create-query-jobFlow" />
		<ee:transform doc:name="Delay 10 mins" doc:id="42c086e2-067b-4da5-8a6a-9ae0ed6a6b60" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload resource="dataweave/p-wait.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<flow-ref doc:name="get-query-job-resultsFlow" doc:id="e0d27594-807a-4286-91fb-70822d220a87" name="get-query-job-resultsFlow" />
	</flow>
	<sub-flow name="load-GVPKSub_Flow" doc:id="2218f1b2-f80b-42b6-ba93-e0ba287872ce" >
		<try doc:name="Try" doc:id="0322c6ec-ba01-46ab-854a-adaa683cf060" >
			<salesforce:query doc:name="Query Generic_Key_Value_Pair__c" doc:id="e85bd52d-85f2-4f95-9e39-8335dad59901" config-ref="CI_Integration_Salesforce_Config" >
				<salesforce:salesforce-query ><![CDATA[select Id, Key__c, Value__c, Group_Name__c from Generic_Key_Value_Pair__c where Group_Name__c = :appName]]></salesforce:salesforce-query>
				<salesforce:parameters ><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"appName" : "'" ++ p('app.name') ++ "'"
}]]]></salesforce:parameters>
			</salesforce:query>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook tail recursion (XML handling, flattening nested data)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Tail Recursion
 * Category: Advanced Patterns
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Use tail-recursive functions with the @TailRec annotation for
 * stack-safe recursion on large datasets. Standard recursion in DataWeave can
 * overflow the stack on deep structures. Tail recursion with an accumulator
 * lets DW optimize the call into a loop, handling thousands of iterations.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "tree": {
 *     "name": "Root",
 *     "children": [
 *       {
 *         "name": "A",
 *         "children": [
 *           {
 *             "name": "A1",
 *             "children": []
 *           },
 *           {
 *             "name": "A2",
 *             "children": []
 *           }
 *         ]
 *       },
 *       {
 *         "name": "B",
 *         "children": [
 *           {
 *             "name": "B1",
 *             "children": []
 *           }
 *         ]
 *       }
 *     ]
 *   }
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * {"name": "All Products", "depth": 0, "path": "All Products"},
 * {"name": "Electronics", "depth": 1, "path": "All Products > Electronics"},
 * {"name": "Laptops", "depth": 2, "path": "All Products > Electronics > Laptops"},
 * {"name": "Monitors", "depth": 2, "path": "All Products > Electronics > Monitors"},
 * {"name": "4K Monitors", "depth": 3, "path": "All Products > Electronics > Monitors > 4K Monitors"},
 * {"name": "Ultrawide Monitors", "depth": 3, "path": "All Products > Electronics > Monitors > Ultrawide Monitors"},
 * {"name": "Furniture", "depth": 1, "path": "All Products > Furniture"},
 * {"name": "Desks", "depth": 2, "path": "All Products > Furniture > Desks"},
 * {"name": "Chairs", "depth": 2, "path": "All Products > Furniture > Chairs"}
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
@TailRec()
fun flattenTree(queue, acc = []) = if (isEmpty(queue)) acc
  else do {
    var current = queue[0]
    var rest = queue[1 to -1] default []
    ---
    flattenTree(rest ++ (current.children default []), acc << {name: current.name})
  }
---
flattenTree([payload.tree])

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for Issues Filter (mapping/transformation, filtering)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
import * from dw::util::Values
fun convertDate(inputDate) = (((((inputDate splitBy (" "))[0]) as Date  {format: "dd-MMM-yyyy"} as String {format:"yyyy-MM-dd"}) ++"T" ++ (inputDate splitBy (" "))[1] ) as DateTime)
 
var filterIssue = if (sizeOf(payload.issues)==1)  payload.issues[0] else if(!isEmpty(payload.issues filter ((item, index) -> item.resolvedTimestamp=="null" or item.resolvedTimestamp== null) ))
((payload.issues filter ((item, index) -> item.resolvedTimestamp=="null" or item.resolvedTimestamp== null))[0])  else if (!isEmpty(payload.issues filter ((item, index) -> convertDate(item.resolvedTimestamp) == ((payload.issues.resolvedTimestamp map ((item, index) ->
convertDate(item)) orderBy ($ ))[-1]))) and sizeOf((payload.issues.resolvedTimestamp map ((item, index) ->
convertDate(item)) orderBy ($)) distinctBy ($))>1 )  (payload.issues filter ((item, index) -> convertDate(item.resolvedTimestamp) == ((payload.issues.resolvedTimestamp map ((item, index) ->
convertDate(item)) orderBy ($ ))[-1])))[0]  else if (!isEmpty(payload.issues filter ((item, index) -> convertDate(item.createdTimestamp) == ((payload.issues.createdTimestamp map ((item, index) ->
convertDate(item)) orderBy ($ ))[-1]))) and sizeOf((payload.issues.createdTimestamp map ((item, index) ->
convertDate(item)) orderBy ($)) distinctBy ($))>1)  (payload.issues filter ((item, index) -> convertDate(item.createdTimestamp) == ((payload.issues.createdTimestamp map ((item, index) ->
convertDate(item)) orderBy ($ ))[-1])))[0] else   payload.issues[0]
---
payload update "issues" with [filterIssue]

instruction: Create a Mule 4 flow named 'createBulkJob' using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, Error Handling, Retry Logic, Salesforce Create, Salesforce Query
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:file="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file" xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce"
	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file/current/mule-file.xsd">
	<flow name="createBulkJob" doc:id="f532f287-c819-42ac-8fc1-b0380bc0968c" >
		<scheduler doc:name="Scheduler" doc:id="d3ba6dd4-6a3e-4ea7-84e6-dc8c008ff2d0" >
			<scheduling-strategy >
				<fixed-frequency startDelay="100" timeUnit="DAYS"/>
			</scheduling-strategy>
		</scheduler>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Job Create Request" doc:id="aaaacd3f-af50-4491-bc8c-48e040123e68" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
{
    "contentType" : "CSV",
    "concurrencyMode": "Parallel"  //Serial or Parallel
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<salesforce:create-job operation="query" type='#["Case"]' doc:name="Create job" doc:id="cd93522e-aa37-44e9-b742-3dd5b1339560" config-ref="Salesforce_Config" >
			<salesforce:create-job-request ><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></salesforce:create-job-request>
		</salesforce:create-job>
		<set-variable value="#[payload.Id]" doc:name="Job ID" doc:id="f004a16d-9d9e-4933-95f8-cd89585ddb4a" variableName="jobId"/>
		<salesforce:create-batch-for-query doc:name="Create batch for query" doc:id="908ace3c-5a3b-48b4-bdd6-10d095a32c13" config-ref="Salesforce_Config" jobInfoBatchForQuery="#[payload]" >
			<salesforce:batch-query ><![CDATA[#["Select Id,CaseNumber,CreatedDate from Case limit 50000"]]]></salesforce:batch-query>
			<salesforce:headers >
				<salesforce:header key="Sforce-Enable-PKChunking" value="TRUE" />
				<salesforce:header key="chunkSize" value="50000" />
			</salesforce:headers>
		</salesforce:create-batch-for-query>
		<salesforce:batch-info-list doc:name="Batch info list" doc:id="bb72b058-9efa-41ae-af69-ac60c8889573" config-ref="Salesforce_Config" jobId="#[vars.jobId]"/>
		<flow-ref doc:name="CheckJobStatus" doc:id="aaadd7c2-132e-4bf6-a84b-b7bdf2d430f3" name="CheckJobStatus"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Convert Back to CSV" doc:id="d23365ea-3433-4ecf-8c34-f3a097e139b7" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/csv quoteValues=true, encoding="UTF-8", escape="\\"
---
payload]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="abad4acc-bf17-48fb-ac51-b58da526bbc4" message="You can work with the data as object or maybe save the file in a diretory (based on your use case.)"/>
		<flow-ref doc:name="closeJobFlow" doc:id="7d18197e-dce0-4902-b2a3-63c7b2648bf7" name="closeJobFlow"/>
	</flow>
	
	<sub-flow name="CheckJobStatus" doc:id="6127d311-124e-45ea-892d-9923773fa766" >
		<until-successful maxRetries="40" doc:name="Until Successful" doc:id="bceb4730-286b-432b-b085-94e99d466eed" millisBetweenRetries="10000">
			<try doc:name="Try" doc:id="13829be5-514b-4749-bb14-990b66fec954" >
				<salesforce:batch-info doc:name="Batch info" doc:id="cd53bfdf-1c9d-4925-b767-34c7a28fe672" config-ref="Salesforce_Config">
					<salesforce:batch-to-retrieve ><![CDATA[#[payload[0]]]]></salesforce:batch-to-retrieve>
				</salesforce:batch-info>
				<set-variable value="#[payload.state]" doc:name="Set jobStatus" doc:id="03c747db-7fb1-49af-8ba4-29c3f7473522" variableName="jobStatus" />
				<choice doc:name="is status Completed ?" doc:id="3ffe3281-dc0d-4ee4-a1e5-7f9af7e10fda">
							<when expression='#[payload.state != "Completed"]'>
						<raise-error doc:name="Raise error" doc:id="2a360ca4-497a-4ea9-8f58-e94250431151" type="PRECONDITIONS:NOT_COMPLETED" description="Job not completed"/>
							</when>
							<otherwise>
								<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="b4de49c1-4b2f-44a7-b71b-cfa0ab6be6a0" message="#[vars.jobStatus]" />
							</otherwise>
						</choice>
				<error-handler >
					<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="b6157868-b4c8-4e32-b10a-8e69a30c1233" >
						<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Not Completed" doc:id="987f7130-9988-4a44-9f57-d62fa57b38ba" message="Not completed trying again"/>
					</on-error-propagate>
				</error-handler>
			</try>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule
  xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
  xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
  xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
  xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
  xmlns:http-policy="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http-policy"
  xmlns:http-transform="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http-policy-transform"
  xmlns:awsv4auth="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/awsv4auth"
  xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
               http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
               http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
               http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http-policy http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http-policy/current/mule-http-policy.xsd
               http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http-policy-transform http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http-policy-transform/current/mule-http-policy-transform.xsd
               http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/awsv4auth http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/awsv4auth/current/mule-awsv4auth.xsd">

    <http-policy:proxy name="{{{policyId}}}-custom-policy">
    <http-policy:operation propagateMessageTransformations="true">
      <logger level="INFO" message="BEFORE HTTP REQUEST"/>

      <set-variable value="#[output application/json --- (now() >> "UTC") as DateTime {format:"yyyyMMdd'T'HHmmss'Z'"}]" variableName="xAmzDate"/>

      <set-variable value="#[payload]" variableName="origPayload"/>
      <set-variable value="{{ hostName }}" variableName="awsHostName"/>

      <logger level="INFO" message="#[vars.xAmzDate]"/>

      <awsv4auth:get-authorization-string
        accessKey="{{ awsAccessKey }}"
        secretKey="{{ awsSecretKey }}"
        regionName="{{ region }}"
        serviceName="{{ serviceName }}"
        hostName="{{ hostName }}" 
        requestType="{{ requestType }}"
        canonicalURI="{{ canonicalURI }}"
        timeStamp="#[vars.xAmzDate]"
        body="#[payload]"/>

      <set-variable value="#[payload]" variableName="authString"/>

      <set-payload value="#[vars.origPayload]"/>

      <logger level="INFO" message="BEFORE TRANSFORM"/>

      <logger level="INFO" message="#[payload]"/>
      
      <http-transform:add-headers outputType="requester-request">
        <http-transform:headers>#[output application/json ---      
          { 
            "Authorization" : vars.authString, 
            "Content-Type" : "application/json", 
            "X-Amz-Date" : vars.xAmzDate ++ "", 
            "Host" : vars.awsHostName
          }]
        </http-transform:headers>
      </http-transform:add-headers>

      <logger level="INFO" message="AFTER TRANSFORM"/>

      <http-policy:execute-next/>

      <logger level="INFO" message="AFTER HTTP REQUEST / EXECUTE"/>

    </http-policy:operation>
  </http-policy:proxy>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook dynamic keys (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Dynamic Keys
 * Category: Object Transformation
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Build objects with key names determined at runtime. Use the
 * (expression): value syntax to create keys from variables, payload fields,
 * or computed strings. Essential for pivoting data, building lookup maps, and
 * creating flexible schemas that adapt to input data.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "settings": [
 *     {
 *       "key": "theme",
 *       "value": "dark"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "key": "language",
 *       "value": "en-US"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "key": "maxRetries",
 *       "value": "3"
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "theme": "dark",
 * "language": "en-US",
 * "notifications.email": "true",
 * "notifications.sms": "false",
 * "maxRetries": "3"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{(
  payload.settings map (setting) -> ({
    (setting.key): setting.value
  })
)}

	xmlns:ftp="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ftp" xmlns:os="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os" xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os/current/mule-os.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ftp http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ftp/current/mule-ftp.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file/current/mule-file.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email/current/mule-email.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation/current/mule-validation.xsd">
	<flow name="create-query-jobFlow" doc:id="dc9c2c8e-4965-48dd-bc23-86d227f0b073" >
		<scheduler doc:name="Scheduler" doc:id="2d08d509-8b24-4144-8c6c-f2f538a7f9a4" >
			<scheduling-strategy >
				<cron expression="${cronExpression.createJob}"/>
			</scheduling-strategy>
		</scheduler>
		<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Start" doc:id="3d5fa362-ee4e-4b88-9480-fa02369a4edf" message="Create Query Job Process START"/>
		<os:store doc:name="startTime" doc:id="8f913402-120f-4f6f-a6a6-5d0a4ff9a0dc" key="startTime" objectStore="Object_store">
			<os:value><![CDATA[#[now() as String]]]></os:value>
		</os:store>
		<flow-ref doc:name="load-GVPKSub_Flow" doc:id="345885de-c8f6-40b5-b644-dcfd5c31f422" name="load-GVPKSub_Flow" />
		<validation:is-true doc:name="Validate Server" doc:id="0f96244f-5ad6-45a7-b791-8a280e7494f7" config-ref="Validation_Config" expression="#[vars.responsibleServer contains server.host]" message="This is not a responsible server to run this sync job." />
		<scatter-gather doc:name="Scatter-Gather" doc:id="c84d6f18-c598-41d8-b085-fdc433758104" >
			<route >
				<flow-ref doc:name="sf-eom-create-query-jobSub_Flow" doc:id="7438d4a6-cf03-4118-81bc-27d8f4146e7d" name="sf-eom-create-query-jobSub_Flow"/>
			</route>
			<route >
				<flow-ref doc:name="sf-smb-create-query-jobSub_Flow" doc:id="3bf44dbc-1d77-449e-b04f-dfa2d4de6d7e" name="sf-smb-create-query-jobSub_Flow"/>
			</route>
		</scatter-gather>
		<set-variable value='#["Salesforce (EOM and SMB) - Bulk Jobs Creation Complete"]' doc:name="emailBody" doc:id="97a4caa3-b690-4e8c-864d-12ff9d8cb835" variableName="emailBody"/>
		<email:send doc:name="Send" doc:id="f6c7255b-95f0-4708-aaf5-885895ed5be2" config-ref="Email_SMTP" fromAddress="${email.fromAddress}" subject="${email.subjectSuccess}" toAddresses="#[vars.processStartEmailNotificationList splitBy ',']" >
			<email:reply-to-addresses />
			<email:body contentType="text/html" >
				<email:content ><![CDATA[#[vars.emailBody]]]></email:content>
			</email:body>
		</email:send>
		<logger level="INFO" doc:name="End" doc:id="178ddf60-3168-4d6e-821c-edd4d44aa3fa" message="Create Query Job Process END"/>
		<error-handler >
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="4b388996-7672-4322-a223-157d8aca8319" >
				<flow-ref doc:name="error-handlerSub_Flow" doc:id="4ade742b-b801-42ef-8874-3e9543fc2254" name="error-handlerSub_Flow"/>
			</on-error-propagate>
		</error-handler>
	</flow>
	<sub-flow name="sf-eom-create-query-jobSub_Flow" doc:id="d8ba5bca-073d-4c6e-b618-c3bf14fe43f0" >
		<salesforce:create-query-job-bulk-api-v2 doc:name="Fetch SF-EOM Account" doc:id="5e8a69c1-f6af-41af-b596-73abbecd9f63" config-ref="CI_Integration_Salesforce_Config" query="#[p('sf.queryEOM')]" >
			<reconnect count="3" />
		</salesforce:create-query-job-bulk-api-v2>
		<os:store doc:name="eomJobId" doc:id="944391ca-aa3d-49f3-8fca-cb97a9bb1877" key="eomJobId" objectStore="Object_store">
			<os:value><![CDATA[#[payload.id]]]></os:value>
		</os:store>
	</sub-flow>
	<sub-flow name="sf-smb-create-query-jobSub_Flow" doc:id="75be4f10-c871-4582-b128-7aac719a26c1" >
		<salesforce:create-query-job-bulk-api-v2 doc:name="Fetch SF-SMB Account" doc:id="f607be1c-81cc-4fc3-8e22-ad03b2254b8d" config-ref="SMB_NICOMS_Salesforce_Config" query="#[p('sf.querySMB')]">
			<reconnect count="3" />
		</salesforce:create-query-job-bulk-api-v2>
		<os:store doc:name="smbJobId" doc:id="9efe906d-0e5f-4d01-acbc-4042ad6fafdb" key="smbJobId" objectStore="Object_store" >
			<os:value ><![CDATA[#[payload.id]]]></os:value>
		</os:store>
	</sub-flow>
	
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p MAC00073Request MACD (mapping/transformation, XML handling)
Write a DataWeave transformation: alexandramartinez todo api impl update task query
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/java
var id = attributes.uriParams.taskId
var title = payload.title default ""
var description = payload.description default ""
var completed = attributes.queryParams.completed default false
var dueDate = attributes.queryParams.dueDate default ""
var setClause = [
        ("title = '$title'") if (!isEmpty(title)),
        ("description = '$description'") if (!isEmpty(description)),
        ("dueDate = '$dueDate'") if (!isEmpty(dueDate)),
        ("completed = $completed") if (!isEmpty(completed))
    ] joinBy ", "
---
"UPDATE tasks SET $setClause WHERE id = '$id'"

instruction: Create a Mule 4 flow named 'squirrel-main' using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /api/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd ">
    <flow name="squirrel-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="squirrel-httpListenerConfig" path="/api/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body>#[payload]</http:body>
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:router config-ref="squirrel-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:BAD_REQUEST">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Bad request"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">400</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Method not allowed"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">405</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_ACCEPTABLE">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Not acceptable"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">406</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Unsupported media type"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">415</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_IMPLEMENTED">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Not Implemented"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">501</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="squirrel-console">
        <http:listener config-ref="squirrel-httpListenerConfig" path="/console/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body>#[payload]</http:body>
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="squirrel-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\nuts:squirrel-config">
        <logger level="INFO" message="get:\nuts:squirrel-config" />
        <set-payload value="here's your nuts" doc:name="Set payload" doc:id="qewahj" />
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\nuts:squirrel-config">
        <logger level="INFO" message="post:\nuts:squirrel-config" />
        <set-payload value="* hiding nuts *" doc:name="Set payload" doc:id="giyowm" />
    </flow>
    <flow name="patch:\nuts:squirrel-config">
        <logger level="INFO" message="patch:\nuts:squirrel-config" />
        <set-payload value="* moving nuts *" doc:name="Set payload" doc:id="mfvpbs" />
    </flow>
</mule>

var caseCategorySubStatusJson = readUrl("classpath://validation/caseCategorySubStatus.json", "application/json")
var caseCategorySubStatus = caseCategorySubStatusJson.FinanceOperations.caseCategory[payload.caseCategory].caseCategorySubStatus

    true
else

Write a DataWeave transformation for createdirectoryListings (mapping/transformation)

(payload map (value, index) -> {
	CreatedById : value.CreatedById,

instruction: The **sf-pega-sitesurvey-sync-app** is a real-time event-driven integration application that synchronizes **Site Survey** data from **Salesforce** to  using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, HTTP Request
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:kafka="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka/current/mule-kafka.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">
	<flow name="sf-pega-sitesurvey-sync-app" doc:id="6c9fad27-92a6-4b42-9ae9-730ad307ea00" >
		<kafka:message-listener doc:name="Consumes messages from sitesurvey topic" doc:id="b81feb52-bc97-42c7-bc6a-e218fd187c1c" config-ref="Apache_Kafka_Consumer_configuration" ackMode="IMMEDIATE" parallelConsumersAmount="${kafka.consumers}"/>
		<set-payload value="#[payload]" doc:name="Changing Payload to JSON" doc:id="9a5fa86a-aca3-4f8e-a89d-cd4af0668cff" mimeType="application/json"/>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log consumed message from Kafka" doc:id="45f861ac-9ebe-4cb7-82db-5bdea350de1a" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Consumed message from Site Survey object topic"/>
		<choice doc:name="Check if Payload is Valid" doc:id="46e3bc22-65db-430e-8944-7ebfd5d0f8e2" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload) > 0]">
				<flow-ref doc:name="token_flow" doc:id="106b8023-7c39-4884-8e11-528d169b4319" name="token_flow"/>
				<choice doc:name="Check access token not null" doc:id="c84e84d4-f408-4fae-8c09-1c2ee5798f73">
					<when expression="#[vars.token.access_token != null]">
						<http:request method="POST" doc:name="Request to Pega to process Site Survey object" doc:id="04f5447c-2741-47b1-ac46-7ad89939e2dd" config-ref="HTTP_Request_configuration-pegacloud" path="${pega.resource}">
							<http:headers ><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"Authorization" : "Bearer " ++ vars.token.access_token 
}]]]></http:headers>
						</http:request>
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log success response" doc:id="eb83d627-74bc-4289-b219-e87abc8522ae" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After Sending Site Survey object Message successfully to PEGA" tracePoint="END" />
					</when>
					<otherwise>
						<ee:transform doc:name="Error details" doc:id="06111c72-0c44-4639-a63c-cd00a0e67bf6" >
							<ee:message >
								<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    "success": false,
    "apiName": p('api.name'),
    "version": p('api.version'),
    "correlationId": correlationId,
    "timestamp": now(),
    "errorDetails":    [
        {
            "code": p('error.badrequestcode'), 
            "reason": p('error.tokenreason'),
            "message":p('error.tokenmessage'), 
        }
    ]  
    
}
]]></ee:set-payload>
							</ee:message>
							<ee:variables >
								<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
p('error.badrequestcode')]]></ee:set-variable>
							</ee:variables>
						</ee:transform>
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log invalid token message" doc:id="545160e2-56ee-427c-8d63-e26b56c38bb4" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Invalid token error message" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR"/>
					</otherwise>
				</choice>
			
</when>
			<otherwise>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log the empty payload" doc:id="c38939e1-db80-4486-aa1c-b88455527183" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Consumed empty payload of Site Survey object from SFDC - Payload should not be empty" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" />

			</otherwise>
		
</choice>
		<error-handler ref="global_error_handler" />

	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: The **SF SPC PAPI** (Process API) serves as the integration layer between Salesforce and the Spectrum Platform Core (SPC) system. It provides a unifie using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, HTTP Request
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
	xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">
	<flow name="post-comments-flow" doc:id="58b008ea-1adf-4e06-a074-b76e095bf996" >
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Initial Log" doc:id="907f64ce-dbe0-4954-a353-62a486e4fd21" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message=" SPC Service : getCommentsV1x0 :: Intial Payload :"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="getCommentsRequest" doc:id="6ef8939f-6009-4101-a7ff-cb437e623426" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload resource="dw/SPC_getComments_Request.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="account" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.RetrieveCommentInfoRequest.AccountNumber as Number]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Request Log" doc:id="6e2c36dc-c185-4de1-81a4-de44721e65e5" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message=" SPC Service : getCommentsV1x0 :: Request :"/>
		<http:request method="POST" doc:name="SPC : getCommentsV1x0" doc:id="9263992b-e727-4df0-a9d5-4753a539187e" config-ref="SPC_HTTPS_Request_configuration" path="${spc.getCommenstV1x0.InvokePath}" sendCorrelationId="ALWAYS" correlationId="#[correlationId]"/>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Response Log" doc:id="ce47d6d9-c0f6-47bb-a4c9-29272d767d8b" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="SPC Service : getCommentsV1x0 :: Response :"/>
		<choice doc:name="checkResponse" doc:id="968a4702-5a26-4d72-908d-4b7e6909d549" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload.getCommentsResponse) > 0]">
				<ee:transform doc:name="Transform SPC Response" doc:id="d6275510-fa0e-4284-b837-2eeebeb29050">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload resource="dw/SPC_getComments_Response.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Final Response Log" doc:id="ee334bbc-7434-46b0-8909-ca9bbaa069ec" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="SPC Service :  getCommentsV1x0 ::  Successfully Processed : Response : " />
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="No data from SPC" doc:id="92388b2c-0292-47e2-b59c-58c27837e338" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="SPC Service :  getCommentsV1x0 ::  No data returned from SPC getCommentsV1x0"/>
				<ee:transform doc:name="errorMessage" doc:id="cbe3f5c5-5812-445c-898c-f94b98e2db7f" >
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
             "isSuccess" : false,
             "RetrieveCommentInfoResponse": {
         "AccountNumber": vars.account,
         "errorCode" : "404",
         "errorMessage": "No data returned from SPC comments"
     	 
    }
}
]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>
				</ee:transform>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
			<error-handler >
			<on-error-continue enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Continue" doc:id="79cb5c04-2a0d-4d56-ab1e-cb2ef81d524b" >
				<set-variable value="#[error.exception.errorMessage.attributes.statusCode default 500]" doc:name="httpStatus" doc:id="28d285c5-88f0-408a-9654-85658bcc3e24" variableName="httpStatus" />
				<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Error Message" doc:id="c5e2ed9c-47bb-4c60-a830-c497d6cc6773">
					<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	    "isSuccess" : false,
	    "RetrieveCommentInfoResponse": {
    "AccountNumber": vars.account,
	errorCode:error.exception.errorMessage.attributes.statusCode,
	errorDescription: error.description,
	errorType:error.exception.'type',
	errorMessage:error.exception.errorMessage.payload
	
	}

}
]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>
				</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="SPC Error Log" doc:id="0208dd4d-6db0-4b73-bb2b-8b7344c9e512" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" message="SPC Service :  getCommentsV1x0  :: Final Exception Message : " />
			</on-error-continue>
		</error-handler>
	</flow>
</mule>

</when>

					<ee:message >
					</ee:message>

output application/java

true]]></ee:set-variable>

</choice>

{

			<salesforce:ids><![CDATA[#[[vars.Id]]]]></salesforce:ids>

<when expression="#[payload.successful == true]">
<ee:transform doc:name="Success Response" doc:id="c2203203-a06f-411c-8fa7-c19b39166020">
<ee:message>

<otherwise >

<ee:variables >

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for v surchargeCode (mapping/transformation, filtering, flattening nested data)
output:
%dw 2.0
var inl0003 = vars.MAC00029_Response.ICOMS.MAC00029.INL00145.*INL00003 filter $.INL00004 != null default []
fun findINL00005(inl00004List) = inl00004List.*INL00005 filter 
     (($.SRVCCODE == "FA045" or 
     	$.SRVCCODE == "FA065" or 
     	$.SRVCCODE == "FA066" or 
     	$.SRVCCODE == "MP038" or 
     	$.SRVCCODE == "MP040"
     ) and ($.SRVCSTTS == "A"))
     
     
var inl00005 = flatten(inl0003) map using (inl04 = findINL00005($.*INL00004))
  {
    (result: true) if (sizeOf(inl04) > 0) 
  } default []
  
  
var isFA045A = inl00005 filter  $.result != null
output application/java  
---


if ((sizeOf(isFA045A)) > 0) isFA045A[0].result else false

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook object to pairs
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Object to Array of Pairs
 * Category: Object Transformation
 * Difficulty: Beginner
 * Description: Convert an object into an array of key-value pair objects.
 * One of the most frequently asked questions on MuleSoft forums. Useful
 * for dynamic processing of object properties, building form data, and
 * feeding into downstream systems that expect array format.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "firstName": "John",
 *   "lastName": "Doe",
 *   "email": "john@example.com",
 *   "age": 30,
 *   "active": true
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook hmac signature (aggregation, XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: HMAC Signature
 * Category: Security & Encoding
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Generate HMAC-SHA256 signatures for webhook verification,
 * API request signing, and message integrity validation. Used by Stripe,
 * GitHub, Slack, and many other webhook providers.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "webhookBody": "{\"event\":\"order.created\",\"id\":\"evt_123\"}",
 *   "secret": "whsec_abc123",
 *   "receivedSignature": "sha256=a1b2c3d4e5f6",
 *   "timestamp": "1700000000"
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "signature": "sha256=<computed_hmac_hex>",
 * "signedPayload": "1708300000.{\"event\":\"payment.completed\",\"amount\":99.99}",
 * "isValid": false
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
import dw::Crypto
output application/json
var signedPayload = "$(payload.timestamp).$(payload.webhookBody)"
var hmacBytes = Crypto::HMACWith(signedPayload as Binary, payload.secret as Binary, "HmacSHA256")
var hmacHex = lower(hmacBytes reduce (byte, acc = "") -> acc ++ (byte as String {format: "%02x"}))
var computedSig = "sha256=$(hmacHex)"
---
{ signature: computedSig, isValid: computedSig == payload.receivedSignature }

Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook DateUtils (aggregation)
output:
%dw 2.0

/**
 * Module: DateUtils
 * Version: 1.0.0
 *
 * Reusable date/time utility functions for DataWeave 2.x.
 * Import with: import modules::DateUtils
 *
 * Functions (14):
 *   toISO, toEpoch, fromEpoch, addDays, addMonths, diffDays,
 *   formatDate, isWeekend, startOfMonth, endOfMonth, isLeapYear,
 *   toBusinessDay, quarter, daysBetweenBusiness
 */

/**
 * Convert a DateTime to ISO 8601 string.
 * toISO(|2026-02-15T14:30:00Z|) -> "2026-02-15T14:30:00Z"
 */
fun toISO(d: DateTime): String =
    d as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssZ"}

/**
 * Convert a DateTime to Unix epoch seconds.
 * toEpoch(|2026-02-15T00:00:00Z|) -> 1771200000
 */
fun toEpoch(d: DateTime): Number =
    d as Number {unit: "seconds"}

/**
 * Convert Unix epoch seconds to DateTime (UTC).
 * fromEpoch(1771200000) -> |2026-02-15T00:00:00Z|
 */
fun fromEpoch(n: Number): DateTime =
    n as DateTime {unit: "seconds"}

/**
 * Add (or subtract) days from a Date.
 * addDays(|2026-02-15|, 10) -> |2026-02-25|
 * addDays(|2026-02-15|, -5) -> |2026-02-10|
 */
fun addDays(d: Date, n: Number): Date =
    d + ("P$(n)D" as Period)

/**
 * Add (or subtract) months from a Date.
 * addMonths(|2026-01-31|, 1) -> |2026-02-28|
 * addMonths(|2026-03-15|, -2) -> |2026-01-15|
 */
fun addMonths(d: Date, n: Number): Date =
    d + ("P$(n)M" as Period)

/**
 * Calculate the number of days between two dates (d2 - d1).
 * diffDays(|2026-02-10|, |2026-02-15|) -> 5
 * diffDays(|2026-02-15|, |2026-02-10|) -> -5
 */
fun diffDays(d1: Date, d2: Date): Number =
    (d2 as Number {unit: "days"}) - (d1 as Number {unit: "days"})

/**
 * Format a DateTime with a custom pattern.
 * formatDate(|2026-02-15T14:30:00Z|, "MM/dd/yyyy") -> "02/15/2026"
 * formatDate(|2026-02-15T14:30:00Z|, "dd-MMM-yyyy") -> "15-Feb-2026"
 */
fun formatDate(d: DateTime, fmt: String): String =
    d as String {format: fmt}

/**
 * Check if a Date falls on a weekend (Saturday or Sunday).
 * isWeekend(|2026-02-14|) -> true  (Saturday)
 * isWeekend(|2026-02-15|) -> true  (Sunday)
 *
 * Note: Uses dayOfWeek where 6=Saturday, 7=Sunday.
 */
fun isWeekend(d: Date): Boolean =
    do {
        var dow = (d as DateTime) as String {format: "u"}
        ---
        dow == "6" or dow == "7"
    }

/**
 * Get the first day of the month for a given Date.
 * startOfMonth(|2026-02-15|) -> |2026-02-01|
 */
fun startOfMonth(d: Date): Date =
    (d as String {format: "yyyy-MM"} ++ "-01") as Date {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}

/**
 * Get the last day of the month for a given Date.
 * endOfMonth(|2026-02-15|) -> |2026-02-28|
 * endOfMonth(|2024-02-15|) -> |2024-02-29| (leap year)
 */
fun endOfMonth(d: Date): Date =
    do {
        var firstOfNext = addMonths(startOfMonth(d), 1)
        ---
        addDays(firstOfNext, -1)
    }

/**
 * Check if a year is a leap year.
 * isLeapYear(2024) -> true
 * isLeapYear(2026) -> false
 * isLeapYear(2000) -> true
 * isLeapYear(1900) -> false
 */
fun isLeapYear(y: Number): Boolean =
    (mod(y, 4) == 0 and mod(y, 100) != 0) or (mod(y, 400) == 0)

/**
 * Adjust a date to the next business day (Mon-Fri).
 * If the date falls on Saturday, returns the following Monday.
 * If on Sunday, returns the following Monday.
 * toBusinessDay(|2026-02-14|) -> |2026-02-16| (Saturday -> Monday)
 * toBusinessDay(|2026-02-13|) -> |2026-02-13| (Friday -> Friday)
 */
fun toBusinessDay(d: Date): Date =
    do {
        var dow = (d as DateTime) as String {format: "u"}
        ---
        if (dow == "6") addDays(d, 2)
        else if (dow == "7") addDays(d, 1)
        else d
    }

/**
 * Get the fiscal quarter (1-4) for a given date.
 * quarter(|2026-01-15|) -> 1
 * quarter(|2026-06-15|) -> 2
 * quarter(|2026-09-30|) -> 3
 * quarter(|2026-12-01|) -> 4
 */
fun quarter(d: Date): Number =
    do {
        var month = d.month as Number
        ---
        ceil(month / 3)
    }

/**
 * Count business days (Mon-Fri) between two dates (exclusive of end date).
 * daysBetweenBusiness(|2026-02-09|, |2026-02-13|) -> 4  (Mon-Thu)
 * daysBetweenBusiness(|2026-02-09|, |2026-02-16|) -> 5  (Mon-Fri, skip Sat/Sun)
 */
fun daysBetweenBusiness(d1: Date, d2: Date): Number =
    do {
        var totalDays = diffDays(d1, d2)
        var fullWeeks = floor(totalDays / 7)
        var remainingDays = mod(totalDays, 7)
        var startDow = ((d1 as DateTime) as String {format: "u"}) as Number
        var extraWeekendDays = (0 to (remainingDays - 1)) reduce ((i, acc = 0) ->
            do {
                var currentDow = mod(startDow + i - 1, 7) + 1
                ---
                if (currentDow == 6 or currentDow == 7) acc + 1
                else acc
            }
        )
        ---
        totalDays - (fullWeeks * 2) - (extraWeekendDays default 0)
    }

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook date arithmetic
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Date Arithmetic
 * Category: Date/Time
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Add or subtract time periods from dates using Period and
 * Duration literals. Use for calculating due dates, SLA deadlines, expiry
 * dates, billing periods, and scheduling future events.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "orderDate": "2026-02-15",
 *   "orderTime": "2026-02-15T14:30:00Z",
 *   "subscriptionStart": "2026-01-01",
 *   "trialDays": 30
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "deliveryDate": "2026-02-22",
 * "invoiceDueDate": "2026-03-17",
 * "warrantyExpiry": "2027-02-15",
 * "slaDeadline": "2026-02-15T18:30:00Z",
 * "nextBillingDate": "2026-02-01",
 * "trialEndDate": "2026-01-31",
 * "daysBetween": 45,
 * "yesterday": "2026-02-14",
 * "lastMonth": "2026-01-15"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var d = payload.orderDate as Date
var dt = payload.orderTime as DateTime
var sub = payload.subscriptionStart as Date
---
{
  deliveryDate: (d + |P7D|) as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"},
  invoiceDue: (d + |P30D|) as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"},
  warrantyExpiry: (d + |P1Y|) as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"},
  slaDeadline: (dt + |PT4H|) as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"},
  nextBilling: (sub + |P1M|) as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"},
  trialEnd: (sub + ("P$(payload.trialDays)D" as Period)) as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook epoch conversion (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Epoch Conversion
 * Category: Date/Time
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Convert between Unix epoch timestamps (seconds or milliseconds
 * since 1970-01-01) and human-readable dates. Many APIs, databases, and
 * messaging systems use epoch timestamps — Kafka, AWS, Unix systems, and
 * JavaScript all commonly use epoch-based time.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "epochSeconds": 1771200000,
 *   "epochMillis": 1771200000000,
 *   "isoDate": "2026-02-15T14:30:00Z",
 *   "events": [
 *     {
 *       "name": "User Login",
 *       "timestamp": 1771185600
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "name": "Order Placed",
 *       "timestamp": 1771189200
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "name": "Payment Confirmed",
 *       "timestamp": 1771200000
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "fromEpochSeconds": "2026-02-16T00:00:00Z",
 * "fromEpochMillis": "2026-02-16T00:00:00Z",
 * "toEpochSeconds": 1771165800,
 * "toEpochMillis": 1771165800000,
 * "events": [
 * {"name": "User Login", "time": "2026-02-15T20:00:00Z"},
 * {"name": "Order Placed", "time": "2026-02-15T21:00:00Z"},
 * {"name": "Payment Confirmed", "time": "2026-02-16T00:00:00Z"}
 * ]
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
  fromSeconds: (payload.epochSeconds * 1000) as DateTime as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"},
  fromMillis: payload.epochMillis as DateTime as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"},
  toEpoch: (payload.isoDate as DateTime) as Number,
  events: payload.events map (e) -> ({
    name: e.name,
    time: (e.timestamp * 1000) as DateTime as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"}
  })
}

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:vm="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/vm" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/vm http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/vm/current/mule-vm.xsd">
	<http:request-config name="HTTP_Request_configuration" doc:name="HTTP Request configuration" doc:id="8b35aa32-0e28-4ee4-b6c1-b4878b657704" responseTimeout="60000">
		<http:request-connection protocol="HTTPS" host="api.instantwebtools.net" port="443" />
	</http:request-config>
	<vm:config name="VM_Config" doc:name="VM Config" doc:id="10ca857b-5680-4fbe-9890-36f31ba4ecda" >
		<vm:queues >
			<vm:queue queueName="recursive" />
		</vm:queues>
	</vm:config>
	<flow name="sync-flow" doc:id="bf961802-b0e5-4255-9ee5-cf4cbc8b7fa4" >
		<scheduler doc:name="Scheduler" doc:id="b21201a3-1074-4e1f-9cb3-9f4ae45ec8cb" >
			<scheduling-strategy >
				<fixed-frequency startDelay="100" timeUnit="DAYS"/>
			</scheduling-strategy>
		</scheduler>
		<flow-ref doc:name="recursive-flow-pagination" doc:id="b8fc2874-7226-4eea-a1f7-6e68156bdfb1" name="recursive-flow-pagination"/>
	</flow>
	<flow name="recursive-flow-pagination" doc:id="886c7ba8-28fd-4a87-af41-d316616ac3b5" >
		<vm:listener queueName="recursive" doc:name="Listener" doc:id="2c764060-9070-47c6-b730-2d81a71880e8" config-ref="VM_Config"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Initial Array" doc:id="d30c8490-df3b-45f1-b10d-9b442608b2d4" >
			<ee:message >
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="apiRecords" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
//Check if the variable is null then initializes as empty array
//otherwise we set it with the data it already contains.
if (payload.apiRecords != null) payload.apiRecords else []  ]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="page" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
if (payload.page != null) payload.page else 1]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Current Page" doc:id="7cf5a15e-7a7a-4f85-af33-311d65550910" message='#["Page: " ++ vars.page]'/>
		<http:request method="GET" doc:name="Public Passenger API (GET)" doc:id="cc8d7928-c9a1-4eb5-a939-642c0427db26" config-ref="HTTP_Request_configuration" path="/v1/passenger">
			<http:query-params ><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"page" : vars.page,
	"size": "2000"
}]]]></http:query-params>
		</http:request>
		<ee:transform doc:name="total Pages" doc:id="211211a6-5d82-4543-b018-4ae6c9276219" >
			<ee:message >
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="totalPages" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
payload.totalPages]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<choice doc:name="Check total pages vs current" doc:id="c5bee1ba-6f62-48fd-821a-4ac4c3b2fb08" >
			<when expression="#[vars.page < vars.totalPages]">
				<set-variable value="#[vars.page + 1]" doc:name="Increase Page" doc:id="fba347e0-7154-4637-bea5-cbbbe0498bcf" variableName="page"/>
				<ee:transform doc:name="Dynamic mapping" doc:id="1ff4f316-2181-4cb7-9f3b-8ae4cf09ad5a">
					<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
(payload.data map $)]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>
				</ee:transform>
				<ee:transform doc:name="Aggregate records" doc:id="65583937-4b76-4cfb-b490-cb05dcc0a68b" >
					<ee:message >
					</ee:message>
					<ee:variables >
						<ee:set-variable variableName="apiRecords" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
(vars.apiRecords + payload)]]></ee:set-variable>
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
				<ee:transform doc:name="payload for VM" doc:id="a9d0e535-0dd6-43d0-af83-03d8ecb64b42" >
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
{
	page:vars.page,
	apiRecords:vars.apiRecords	
}]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>
				</ee:transform>
				<vm:publish queueName="recursive" doc:name="Publish" doc:id="eeca2a5b-f385-469e-9047-cce89fea24a7" config-ref="VM_Config"/>
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<ee:transform doc:name="flatten records" doc:id="01a36c37-8775-43b5-8a00-539cd17d7ef2" >
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
flatten (vars.apiRecords)]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>
				</ee:transform>
				<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="49e8e5b0-3c53-4c9d-864b-243cfb33b880" message='#["Total records: " ++ sizeOf(payload)]'/>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for update service request (mapping/transformation, filtering)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/java
fun stringNull(value) = if(lower(value) == "null") " "  else value
fun dateNull(value)=if(lower(value) == "null" or value == " ") " "  else value as LocalDateTime {format: "MM-dd-yyyy h:mm:ss a z" } as String  {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"} as DateTime

fun onlyDateNull(value)=if(lower(value) == "null" or value == " ") " "  else value as Date {format: "yyyy-MM-dd" } as String  {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"} as Date

fun getUserId(userPID) = do {
	if ( lower(userPID) == "null" ) " "
	else do{
		var correctUser = (vars.idVar filter ((item, index) -> item.Charter_PID__c == userPID))
		---
		correctUser[0].Id default " "
	}
}

fun notesUser(newnote)=if ( ((vars.idVar filter ((item, index) -> item.Charter_PID__c == newnote.userId)).Name[0]) != null ) ((vars.idVar filter ((item, index) -> item.Charter_PID__c == newnote.userId)).Name[0])
else
""
fun notesConcat(oldNotes,newnotes)=(if ( oldNotes != null ) ("[ " ++ (if ( newnotes.context != null ) (newnotes.context ++ " | ") else "") ++ notesUser(newnotes) ++ (if ( newnotes.createdTimeStamp != null ) " | " ++ newnotes.createdTimeStamp else "") ++ (if ( newnotes.sourceSystemName != null ) " | " ++ newnotes.sourceSystemName else "") ++ (if ( newnotes.'type' != null ) " | " ++ newnotes.'type' ++ " ]" else " ]") ++ "\n" ++ (if ( newnotes.content != null ) (newnotes.content ++ "\n" ++ "\n") 
else (newnotes.content default "" ++ "\n")) ++  oldNotes)
else ("[ " ++ (if ( newnotes.context != null ) (newnotes.context ++ " | ")  else "") ++ notesUser(newnotes) ++ (if ( newnotes.createdTimeStamp != null ) " | " ++ newnotes.createdTimeStamp else "") ++ (if ( newnotes.sourceSystemName != null ) " | " ++ newnotes.sourceSystemName else "") ++ (if ( newnotes.'type' != null ) " | " ++ newnotes.'type' ++ " ]" else " ]") ++ (if ( newnotes.content != null ) ("\n" ++  newnotes.content default "") else (newnotes.content default ""))))

var provisioningComments = (payload[0].notes filter ((item, index) -> item."type" ==  "Provisioning Comments"))[0] default ""

---
vars.srPayload map ((item) -> 
{
	  (Id: item.Id)if(item.Id != null),	
      (Service_Request_Stage__c: stringNull(item.srStage))if(item.srStage !=null),
      (Bandwidth__c: stringNull(item.bandwidth))if(item.bandwidth !=null),
      (Bandwidth_Speed__c: stringNull(item.bandwidthSpeed))if(item.bandwidthSpeed !=null),
      (Bandwidth_Unit__c: stringNull(item.bandwidthUnit))if(item.bandwidthUnit !=null),
      (Special_Routing__c: stringNull(item.specialRouting))if(item.specialRouting !=null),
      (Topology_Type__c: stringNull(item.topologyType))if(item.topologyType !=null),
	  (Service_Request_Order_Type__c: stringNull(item.serviceRequestOrderType))if(item.serviceRequestOrderType !=null),
	  (Transport_Type__c: stringNull(item.transportType))if(item.transportType !=null),
	  (Change_Reason__c: stringNull(item.changeReason))if(item.changeReason !=null),
	  (Service_Request_Status__c: stringNull(item.serviceRequestStatus))if(item.serviceRequestStatus !=null),
	  (Status_Reason__c: stringNull(item.statusReason))if(item.statusReason !=null),
	  (QC_Complete_Date__c: dateNull(item.qcCompleteDate))if(item.qcCompleteDate !=null),
	  (QC_Complete_By__c: if(item.qcCompleteBy != "null") ((vars.idVar filter ((item1, index) -> item1.Charter_PID__c as String == item.qcCompleteBy)).Name[0]) else " ") if (((vars.idVar filter ((item1, index) -> item1.Charter_PID__c == item.qcCompleteBy)).Name[0]) != null or item.qcCompleteBy == "null" ),
	  (Construction_Not_Required__c: stringNull(item.constructionNotRequired))if(item.constructionNotRequired !=null),
	  (Provisioning_Engineer_2__c: getUserId(item.provisioningEngineer))if(item.provisioningEngineer !=null),
	  (Provisioning_Completed_Date__c: dateNull(item.provisioningCompletedDate))if(item.provisioningCompletedDate !=null),
	  ("Provisioning_Comments__c": notesConcat(vars.notes.Provisioning_Comments__c[0],provisioningComments)) if (payload[0].notes.."type" contains ("Provisioning Comments")),
	  (Scheduled_Installation_Date__c: onlyDateNull(item.scheduledInstallationDate))if(item.scheduledInstallationDate != null),
	  (Scheduled_Installation_Time__c: stringNull(item.scheduledInstallationTime))if(item.scheduledInstallationTime != null),
	  (Customer_Accepted__c: item.customerAccepted as Boolean)if(item.customerAccepted !=null),
	  (Customer_Accepted_By__c: stringNull(item.customerAcceptedBy))if(item.customerAcceptedBy !=null),
	  (Customer_Accepted_Date__c: dateNull(item.customerAcceptedDate))if(item.customerAcceptedDate !=null),
      (Post_sales_comments__c:if(vars.notes.Post_Sales_Comments__c[0] != null)("[ " ++ (payload[0].notes[0].context default "") ++ " | " ++ (((vars.idVar filter ((item, index) -> item.Charter_PID__c == payload[0].notes[0].userId)).Name[0]) default "") ++ " | " ++ (payload[0].notes[0].createdTimeStamp default "" ) ++ " | " ++ (payload[0].notes[0].sourceSystemName default "") ++ " | " ++ (payload[0].notes[0].'type' default "") ++" ]" ++ "\n" ++ (  if(payload[0].notes[0].content != null)(payload[0].notes[0].content ++ "\n" ++ "\n" ) else ( payload[0].notes[0].content default "" ++ "\n"  )) ++  vars.notes.Post_Sales_Comments__c[0]) else ("[ " ++ (payload[0].notes[0].context default "") ++ " | " ++ (((vars.idVar filter ((item, index) -> item.Charter_PID__c == payload[0].notes[0].userId)).Name[0]) default "") ++ " | " ++ (payload[0].notes[0].createdTimeStamp default "" ) ++ " | " ++ (payload[0].notes[0].sourceSystemName default "") ++ " | " ++ (payload[0].notes[0].'type' default "") ++" ]" ++ ( if(payload[0].notes[0].content != null) ("\n" ++  payload[0].notes[0].content default "") else (payload[0].notes[0].content default "")))  )if(payload[0].notes != null ),
	  (Project_Manager__c: if(item.projectManager != "null") ((vars.idVar filter ((item1, index) -> item1.Charter_PID__c as String == item.projectManager)).Id[0]) else " ") if (((vars.idVar filter ((item1, index) -> item1.Charter_PID__c == item.projectManager)).Id[0]) != null or item.projectManager == "null" )   
	      }
)

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook distinct by
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Distinct By (Remove Duplicates)
 * Category: Array Manipulation
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 *
 * Description: Remove duplicate elements from an array based on a specific
 * field or criteria. Use when ingesting data from multiple sources that may
 * contain overlapping records, or when deduplicating API responses.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * [
 *   {"customerId": "C-100", "name": "Alice Chen", "email": "alice@example.com", "source": "Salesforce"},
 *   {"customerId": "C-101", "name": "Bob Martinez", "email": "bob@example.com", "source": "Salesforce"},
 *   {"customerId": "C-100", "name": "Alice Chen", "email": "alice.chen@example.com", "source": "SAP"},
 *   {"customerId": "C-102", "name": "Carol Nguyen", "email": "carol@example.com", "source": "Salesforce"},
 *   {"customerId": "C-101", "name": "Robert Martinez", "email": "bob@example.com", "source": "HubSpot"}
 * ]
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 *   {"customerId": "C-100", "name": "Alice Chen", "email": "alice@example.com", "source": "Salesforce"},
 *   {"customerId": "C-101", "name": "Bob Martinez", "email": "bob@example.com", "source": "Salesforce"},
 *   {"customerId": "C-102", "name": "Carol Nguyen", "email": "carol@example.com", "source": "Salesforce"}
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload distinctBy (customer) -> customer.customerId

// Alternative 1 — shorthand:
// payload distinctBy $.customerId

// Alternative 2 — distinct by multiple fields (composite key):
// payload distinctBy (customer) -> customer.customerId ++ customer.source

// Alternative 3 — distinct on primitive arrays:
// [1, 2, 3, 2, 1, 4] distinctBy $
// Output: [1, 2, 3, 4]

instruction: The **SF PRISM Site Survey Process API (sf-prism-ss-papi)** is a MuleSoft Process API that serves as the integration bridge between **Salesforce** and using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd">
   
    <flow name="sf-prism-ss-papi-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger" doc:id="8403ba4e-2927-4ae8-b1fc-57a2ce06ae04" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Before Sending Request to API Kit Router"/>
		<apikit:router config-ref="sf-prism-ss-papi-config" />
        <error-handler>
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="b1561823-f871-40b3-92d3-630edc763cac" >
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="fbb56673-b0eb-4a7e-ab98-39706312e01c" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config" badRequestError='#["There was an issue with your request message." ++ error.description]'/>
				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set HTTP Status Code" doc:id="9de7ca94-5f7c-49e3-92bf-777df09b2c25" variableName="httpStatus"/>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="logError" doc:id="bdfdb94b-aaa9-4cf4-a732-0ff148c224db" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After Receiving Error" tracePoint="EXCEPTION"/>
			</on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="sf-prism-ss-papi-console">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="${api.name}/api/${api.version}/console/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="sf-prism-ss-papi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="put:\siteSurvey\status:application\json:sf-prism-ss-papi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="put-siteSurvey-status-flow-ref" doc:id="a810a1d3-f2d3-4545-9774-30375bf47324" name="put-siteSurvey-status-flow"/>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\enterprise\sitesurvey:application\json:sf-prism-ss-papi-config">
        <flow-ref doc:name="post-enterprise-sitesurvey-flow-ref" doc:id="dcc9494c-1e57-4cc6-aee5-8f9d4ad4738d" name="post-enterprise-sitesurvey-flow"/>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\sitesurvey\constructionjob:application\json:sf-prism-ss-papi-config">

instruction: using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, Database Select
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
      xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
      xmlns:db="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db"
      xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
      xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
      xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
                          http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db/current/mule-db.xsd
                          http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd">

    <sub-flow name="update-task-flow" doc:id="7b69c3b2-eb02-4ae7-8265-320b6462db78">
        <logger level="INFO" doc:name="Start - Update Task" message="Starting update task flow with ID: #[vars.taskId] and payload: #[payload]"/>
        <set-variable variableName="inputPayload" value="#[payload]" doc:name="inputPayload" doc:id="gbxrcg" />
        
        <!-- Check if task exists -->
        <db:select doc:name="Check Task Exists" config-ref="mysql-db-config">
            <db:sql><![CDATA[SELECT id, title, description, dueDate, completed FROM tasks WHERE id = :id]]></db:sql>
            <db:input-parameters><![CDATA[#[{
    'id': vars.taskId
}]]]></db:input-parameters>
        </db:select>
        
        <choice doc:name="Check if task exists">
            <when expression="#[isEmpty(payload)]">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Task Not Found">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    "message": "Task not found"
}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus"><![CDATA[404]]></ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
                <logger level="INFO" doc:name="Task Not Found" message="Task with ID #[vars.taskId] not found for update"/>
            </when>
            <otherwise>
                <!-- Prepare task data for update -->
                <ee:transform doc:name="Prepare Task Data">
                    <ee:message />
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="taskInput">
                        <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
{
    title: vars.inputPayload.title,
    description: vars.inputPayload.description default null,
    dueDate: vars.inputPayload.dueDate default null,
    completed: vars.inputPayload.completed default false
}]]>
                    </ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
                
                <!-- Update task in database -->
                <db:update doc:name="Update Task" config-ref="mysql-db-config">
                    <db:sql><![CDATA[UPDATE tasks 
SET title = :title, description = :description, dueDate = :dueDate, completed = :completed 
WHERE id = :id]]></db:sql>
                    <db:input-parameters><![CDATA[#[{
    'id': vars.taskId,
    'title': vars.taskInput.title,
    'description': vars.taskInput.description,
    'dueDate': vars.taskInput.dueDate,
    'completed': vars.taskInput.completed
}]]]></db:input-parameters>
                </db:update>
                
                <!-- Get updated task -->
                <db:select doc:name="Get Updated Task" config-ref="mysql-db-config">
                    <db:sql><![CDATA[SELECT id, title, description, dueDate, completed FROM tasks WHERE id = :id]]></db:sql>
                    <db:input-parameters><![CDATA[#[{
    'id': vars.taskId
}]]]></db:input-parameters>
                </db:select>
                
                <!-- Transform to API response format -->
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform to API Response">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    id: payload[0].id as String,
    title: payload[0].title,
    description: payload[0].description,
    dueDate: payload[0].dueDate,
    completed: payload[0].completed
}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                </ee:transform>
                
                <logger level="INFO" doc:name="End - Update Task" message="Completed update task flow, updated task with ID: #[payload.id]"/>
            </otherwise>
        </choice>
    </sub-flow>
    
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook multiline csv (mapping/transformation, CSV processing)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Multi-line CSV Fields
 * Category: CSV Operations
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Handle CSV data where fields contain newlines, commas,
 * or quotes within quoted values. Properly parse and generate CSV with
 * embedded special characters — a common issue with address fields,
 * descriptions, and notes from CRM/ERP exports.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * [
 *   {
 *     "name": "Alice",
 *     "address": "123 Main St\nApt 4\nSpringfield, IL 62704"
 *   },
 *   {
 *     "name": "Bob",
 *     "address": "456 Oak Ave\nSuite 200\nChicago, IL 60601"
 *   }
 * ]
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * {
 * "name": "John Doe",
 * "address": "123 Main St\nApt 4B\nAustin, TX 78701",
 * "addressLines": ["123 Main St", "Apt 4B", "Austin, TX 78701"],
 * "notes": "First-time buyer, needs \"premium\" support",
 * "city": "Austin",
 * "state": "TX",
 * "zip": "78701"
 * },
 * ...
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
fun parseAddress(address: String): Object = do {
    var lines = address splitBy "\n" map trim($)
    var lastLine = lines[-1]
    var cityStateZip = lastLine match /^(.+),\s*([A-Z]{2})\s+(\d{5})$/
    --- { city: cityStateZip[1], state: cityStateZip[2], zip: cityStateZip[3] }
}
---
payload map (row) -> do {
    var addressInfo = parseAddress(row.address)
    --- { name: row.name, city: addressInfo.city, state: addressInfo.state, zip: addressInfo.zip }
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook string advanced (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Advanced String Functions Toolkit
 * Category: String Operations
 * Difficulty: Beginner
 * Description: Leverage dw::core::Strings utility functions (words, countMatches,
 * everyCharacter, first, mapString, remove, replaceAll, reverse) for text
 * processing. These functions simplify common string operations that otherwise
 * require regex or manual character iteration.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "text": "The quick brown fox",
 *   "email": "Alice@Example.COM",
 *   "code": "DW-2026-XYZ",
 *   "password": "MyP@ss0rd!"
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "wordCount": 9,
 * "words": ["The", "quick", "brown", "fox", "jumps", "over", "the", "lazy", "dog"],
 * "digitCount": 0,
 * "emailNormalized": "alice.chen@example.com",
 * "codeReversed": "100-ZYX-CBA-6202-WD",
 * "codeDigitsOnly": "2026001",
 * "firstFiveChars": "The q",
 * "passwordStrength": {
 * "hasUpper": true,
 * "hasLower": true,
 * "hasDigit": true,
 * "hasSpecial": true,
 * "length": 14
 * }
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
import words, countMatches, everyCharacter, first, remove, reverse from dw::core::Strings
output application/json
var w = words(payload.text)
---
{wordCount: sizeOf(w), words: w, emailNormalized: lower(payload.email), codeReversed: reverse(payload.code), digitsOnly: remove(payload.code, /[^0-9]/), firstThree: first(payload.text, 3), passwordStrength: {hasUpper: !(everyCharacter(payload.password, (c) -> lower(c) == c)), hasDigit: countMatches(payload.password, /\d/) > 0}}
