instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook dw210 logging (mapping/transformation, filtering, XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: DW 2.10 Logging Functions
 * Category: Observability
 * Difficulty: Beginner
 *
 * Description: Validate customer records with inline log metadata for each
 * decision. Each record carries a log object with level and message, creating
 * an audit trail directly in the transform output.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "customers": [
 *     {"id": "C-100", "name": "Acme Corp", "tier": "gold", "balance": 15000},
 *     {"id": "C-101", "name": "Beta Inc", "tier": "silver", "balance": -200},
 *     {"id": "C-102", "name": "Gamma LLC", "tier": "bronze", "balance": 500},
 *     {"id": "C-103", "name": "Delta Ltd", "tier": "gold", "balance": 75000}
 *   ],
 *   "creditLimit": 50000
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 *   "totalProcessed": 4,
 *   "alerts": [
 *     {"id": "C-101", "issue": "negative_balance", "balance": -200},
 *     {"id": "C-103", "issue": "over_credit_limit", "balance": 75000}
 *   ],
 *   "summary": {
 *     "gold": 2,
 *     "silver": 1,
 *     "bronze": 1
 *   },
 *   "logs": [
 *     {"level": "DEBUG", "message": "OK: gold tier"},
 *     {"level": "WARN", "message": "Negative balance: -200"},
 *     {"level": "DEBUG", "message": "OK: bronze tier"},
 *     {"level": "WARN", "message": "Exceeds limit: 75000 > 50000"}
 *   ]
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var results = payload.customers map (customer) -> do {
  var level = if (customer.balance < 0) "WARN" else if (customer.balance > payload.creditLimit) "WARN" else "DEBUG"
  var msg = if (customer.balance < 0) "Negative balance: $(customer.balance)" else if (customer.balance > payload.creditLimit) "Exceeds limit: $(customer.balance) > $(payload.creditLimit)" else "OK: $(customer.tier) tier"
  ---
  {id: customer.id, name: customer.name, tier: customer.tier, flagged: level == "WARN", log: {level: level, message: msg}}
}
var alerts = results filter $.flagged
---
{
  totalProcessed: sizeOf(results),
  alerts: alerts map ({id: $.id, issue: $.log.message, balance: $.log.message}),
  summary: results groupBy $.tier mapObject (items, tier) -> ({(tier): sizeOf(items)}),
  logs: results map $.log
}

var completed = attributes.queryParams.completed
var dueDate = attributes.queryParams.dueDate
var whereClause = if (isEmpty(completed) and isEmpty(dueDate)) "" else "WHERE " ++ (
    [
        ("completed = $completed") if (!isEmpty(completed)),
        ("dueDate = '$dueDate'") if (!isEmpty(dueDate))
    ] joinBy " AND "
)
---
"SELECT * FROM tasks $whereClause"

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: p badRequestResponse
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
fun extractErrorDetails(err) =
    {
        code: if (isEmpty(err.muleMessage.attributes.StatusCode))
                p('error.badrequestcode')
              else
                err.muleMessage.attributes.StatusCode,
        reason: err.errorType.asString,
       message: 
           if (err.description != null) err.description 
           else err.cause.localizedMessage
    }
---
{
    "success": false,
    "apiName": p("api.name"),
    "version": p("api.version"),
    "correlationId": correlationId,
    "timestamp": now(),
    "erorDetails": [
        if (error.suppressedErrors[0] != null) 
            extractErrorDetails(error.suppressedErrors[0])
        else 
            extractErrorDetails(error)
    ]
}

	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger"

	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
	xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
	xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os/current/mule-os.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tls http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tls/current/mule-tls.xsd">
	
	<sub-flow name="get-new-token"
		doc:id="9723f9f9-4ce0-4a0d-a448-201178e920d0">
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger"
			doc:id="a0c9c008-e5e1-4261-9bf1-b03e036f6564"
			config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message='#["Before Request token"]' correlationId="#[vars.transactionId]"/>
		<http:request method="POST" doc:name="Request Token"
			doc:id="8e01cc84-2b99-4969-92f9-5e35182e0650"
			config-ref="Nuwave_HTTP_Request_configuration"
			path="${nuwave.tokenpath}" target="tokenpayload">
			<http:body><![CDATA[#[%dw 2.0
output application/x-www-form-urlencoded
---
{
	"username": Mule::p('nuwave.username'),
	"password": Mule::p('secure::nuwave.password')
}]]]></http:body>
			<http:headers><![CDATA[#[{
  "x-api-key": Mule::p('nuwave.apikey'),
  "accept": "application/json",
  "Content-Type": "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
}]]]></http:headers>
			<http:query-params><![CDATA[#[{
	"instance": Mule::p('nuwave.instance')
}]]]></http:query-params>
		</http:request>
		<ee:transform doc:name="set token"
			doc:id="b0872126-8a58-44b7-b11e-8ed076c00ced">
			<ee:message>
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="token"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
vars.tokenpayload.access_token

]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger"
			doc:id="5a790fd9-9fab-4a19-938e-b24c8385910f"
			config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message='#["After Request token"]' correlationId="#[vars.transactionId]">
			<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule
output application/json
---
{
	token: vars.token
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<os:store doc:name="Store token"
			doc:id="104f0479-91e9-4051-924d-fb118f3f3d78" key='#["token"]' objectStore="Object_store">
			<os:value><![CDATA[#[vars.token]]]></os:value>
		</os:store>
	</sub-flow>
	<flow name="get-auth-token"
		doc:id="9edc2fa7-b50c-48c6-a44a-81dc899f555e">
		<os:retrieve doc:name="Retrieve"
			doc:id="284043d7-b144-4f4c-9509-4fa786c8cd1f" key='#["token"]'
			target="token" objectStore="Object_store">
			<os:default-value><![CDATA[#["NA"]]]></os:default-value>
		</os:retrieve>
		<choice doc:name="Choice"
			doc:id="40c8ff67-ac3b-4bd9-ac00-2b11d90fd517">
			<when expression='#[vars.token ~= "NA"]'>
				<flow-ref doc:name="get-new-token"
					doc:id="194032b7-0ed9-4bb3-b4ce-5bac0c75c2da" name="get-new-token" />
			</when>
			<otherwise>
				<ee:transform doc:name="set token"
					doc:id="ef74c741-6287-403e-b93d-e16cb08c94ab">
					<ee:message />
					<ee:variables>
						<ee:set-variable variableName="token"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
vars.token
]]></ee:set-variable>
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger"
					doc:id="35ea24f7-cc12-4bd2-9cd2-81e3318e69c5"
					config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config"
					message='#["Token found in Object Store"]' correlationId="#[vars.transactionId]">
					<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule
output application/json
---
{
	token: vars.token
}]]]></json-logger:content>
				</json-logger:logger>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
	</flow>
	<sub-flow name="request-nuwave-common-subflow"
		doc:id="c9c0a2d5-eca3-4ddf-8ac0-17aed4b275a1">
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Before Requester"
			doc:id="b53ff754-a962-4568-b63b-6c35bdb93597"
			config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config"
			message='#["Before Nuwave requester"]' tracePoint="BEFORE_REQUEST" correlationId="#[vars.transactionId]">
			<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
{
    payload: vars.body
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<http:request method="#[vars.method]"
			doc:name="Request to Nuwave"
			doc:id="0ac71351-ba42-44f2-8142-a1e2baacc1b2"
			config-ref="Nuwave_HTTP_Request_configuration" path="#[vars.path]" responseTimeout="${nuwave.response.timeout}">
			<http:body><![CDATA[#[vars.body]]]></http:body>
			<http:headers><![CDATA[#[{
	"x-access-token": vars.token,
	"x-api-key": Mule::p('nuwave.apikey'),
}]]]></http:headers>
			<http:query-params><![CDATA[#[vars.queryParams]]]></http:query-params>
		</http:request>
		<set-variable value="#[attributes.statusCode]"
			doc:name="Set http statuscode" doc:id="1f3649ea-e8c4-4b27-9618-63a89c36d69c"
			variableName="httpStatus" />
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="log status code" doc:id="03a52f83-c61c-4d1f-8afe-e96d43ae07d0" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message='#["log http status code from nuwave : " ++ (vars.httpStatus as String default 200)]' tracePoint="AFTER_REQUEST" correlationId="#[vars.transactionId]" />
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="After Requester"
			doc:id="92c66673-104d-4647-a82a-38c48e1a7411"
			config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message='#["After Nuwave requester"]'
			tracePoint="AFTER_REQUEST" correlationId="#[vars.transactionId]"/>
	</sub-flow>
</mule>

instruction: The **SF Users SAPI** (System API) provides direct Salesforce integration for retrieving user details. It enables upstream systems to query Salesforce using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd">
    <flow name="sf-users-sapi-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <json-logger:logger doc:name="Log Intial request payload" doc:id="0bf61386-4f48-427c-ae5f-8a2fdbb4cc8e" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Intial request payload"/>
		<apikit:router config-ref="sf-users-sapi-config" />
		<error-handler >
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="1d878461-8609-4bf5-ba31-b15d3913f51c" >
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="1fdb28ed-bb13-4130-a4ce-e50d994effec" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config" />
				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set http status code" doc:id="710ad92d-40f9-4f47-8dc4-50e7e0fc2037" variableName="httpStatus" />
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log error details" doc:id="c95944ea-b005-4a1b-9bea-1713858ef37f" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="API Kit router error details" />
			</on-error-propagate>
		</error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="sf-users-sapi-console">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/console/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="sf-users-sapi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Console error">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\health-check:sf-users-sapi-config">
        <ee:transform doc:name="Health check response">
            <ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/health_check_response.dwl" />
            </ee:message>
        </ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log Health-Check Response" doc:id="4c4c18fd-3886-4087-a483-40a3276dc93f" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Health-Check Response" tracePoint="END" />
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\userdata:application\json:sf-users-sapi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="users-data-flow" doc:id="f44fa4ed-7e1c-4739-80fd-4965a20ebc73" name="users-data-flow"/>
    </flow>
</mule>

instruction: The **SF-Pega Customer Sync App** is a real-time event-driven integration application that synchronizes **Customer Interaction (Client Interaction / C using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, HTTP Request
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:validation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation"
	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger"
	xmlns:kafka="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka/current/mule-kafka.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation/current/mule-validation.xsd">
	<flow name="sf-pega-customer-sync-appflow" doc:id="6c9fad27-92a6-4b42-9ae9-730ad307ea00" >
		<kafka:message-listener doc:name="Consumes messages from CIL topic" doc:id="b81feb52-bc97-42c7-bc6a-e218fd187c1c" config-ref="Apache_Kafka_Consumer_configuration" ackMode="IMMEDIATE" parallelConsumersAmount="${kafka.consumers}"/>
		<set-payload value="#[payload]" doc:name="Changing Payload to JSON" doc:id="9a5fa86a-aca3-4f8e-a89d-cd4af0668cff" mimeType="application/json"/>
		<set-variable value="#[payload]" doc:name="originalPayload" doc:id="e234f9e2-d469-4562-b76e-91e251b6411a" variableName="originalPayload"/>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log kafka payload" doc:id="45f861ac-9ebe-4cb7-82db-5bdea350de1a" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Received Message from Client Interaction topic"/>
		<choice doc:name="Check payload size" doc:id="46e3bc22-65db-430e-8944-7ebfd5d0f8e2" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload) > 0]">
				<flow-ref doc:name="token-flow" doc:id="106b8023-7c39-4884-8e11-528d169b4319" name="token_flow"/>
				<choice doc:name="Check access token is null" doc:id="c84e84d4-f408-4fae-8c09-1c2ee5798f73">
					<when expression="#[vars.token.access_token != null]">

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook error response builder (XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Error Response Builder
 * Category: Error Handling
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Build standardized error response payloads for REST APIs. Use
 * in error handlers to return consistent, well-structured error JSON/XML
 * that includes status code, error type, message, correlation ID, and
 * timestamp. Follows common API error response conventions.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "httpStatus": 422,
 *   "errorType": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
 *   "errorMessage": "Field email is missing",
 *   "correlationId": "abc-123-def-456",
 *   "resource": "/api/v1/customers",
 *   "method": "POST",
 *   "validationErrors": [
 *     {
 *       "field": "email",
 *       "message": "Required"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "field": "phone",
 *       "message": "Bad format"
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "error": {
 * "status": 422,
 * "type": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
 * "message": "Required field 'email' is missing",
 * "timestamp": "2026-02-15T12:00:00Z",
 * "correlationId": "abc-123-def-456",
 * "path": "POST /api/v1/customers",
 * "details": [
 * {"field": "email", "message": "Field is required"},
 * {"field": "phone", "message": "Invalid phone format: must match +X-XXX-XXX-XXXX"}
 * ]
 * }
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
  error: {
    status: payload.httpStatus,
    "type": payload.errorType,
    message: payload.errorMessage,
    timestamp: now(),
    correlationId: payload.correlationId,
    path: "$(payload.method) $(payload.resource)",
    details: payload.validationErrors default []
  }
}

instruction: Create a Mule 4 flow named 'w3schoolsapi-main' using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /api/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd ">
    <http:listener-config name="w3schoolsapi-httpListenerConfig">
        <http:listener-connection host="0.0.0.0" port="8081" />
    </http:listener-config>
    <apikit:config name="w3schoolsapi-config" api="w3schoolsapi.raml" outboundHeadersMapName="outboundHeaders" httpStatusVarName="httpStatus" />
    <flow name="w3schoolsapi-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="w3schoolsapi-httpListenerConfig" path="/api/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:router config-ref="w3schoolsapi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:BAD_REQUEST">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Bad request"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">400</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Method not allowed"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">405</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_ACCEPTABLE">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Not acceptable"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">406</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Unsupported media type"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">415</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_IMPLEMENTED">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Not Implemented"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">501</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="w3schoolsapi-console">
        <http:listener config-ref="w3schoolsapi-httpListenerConfig" path="/console/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body>#[payload]</http:body>
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="w3schoolsapi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\w3schools:w3schoolsapi-config">
        <ee:transform>
            <ee:message>
                <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json

var requested_file = attributes.queryParams.data default ""

// available datasets:customers, orders, products, suppliers, shippers
// order_details, employees, categories

var file_path = "classpath://w3schools/" ++ requested_file ++  ".csv"
---
readUrl(file_path, 'application/csv')]]></ee:set-payload>
            </ee:message>
        </ee:transform>
    </flow>
</mule>

output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd">
	<flow name="get-opportunity-detailsFlow" doc:id="9ccf89f2-f0b8-4dfd-9737-61026f5753f3" >
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger" doc:id="4eda1865-e3bb-48eb-9c22-df69fe385e6d" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="#['Entered to main flow']" />
		<set-variable value="#[attributes.queryParams]" doc:name="Set Query Params" doc:id="ce0ecaeb-27ab-43a8-84fb-604010cf1c5e" variableName="queryParams" />
		<ee:transform doc:name="set conditional params" doc:id="6c556115-9057-495e-9de1-6bb42bd12d44" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
var queryParams = vars.queryParams
var fieldMappings = {
    "opportunityId": "Opportunity.Id",
    "opportunityNumber": "Opportunity.Opportunity_Number__c",
}
var availableParams = queryParams filterObject ((value, key) -> value != null)
var selectedKey = if (sizeOf(availableParams) > 0) keysOf(availableParams)[0] else null

var selectedField = 
  if (selectedKey == "externalCID" and fieldMappings[selectedKey] != null) 
    fieldMappings[selectedKey][0]
  else if (selectedKey != null)
    fieldMappings[selectedKey]
  else 
    null

var selectedValue = if (selectedKey != null) availableParams[selectedKey] else null


var condition = 
  if (selectedField != null and selectedValue != null) 
    selectedField ++ " = '" ++ selectedValue ++ "'"
  else 
    null

---
{
    queryParams: queryParams,
    availableParams: availableParams,
    selectedKey: selectedKey,
    selectedField: selectedField,
    selectedValue: selectedValue,
    condition: condition
}
]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<set-variable value="#[payload.condition]" doc:name="condition" doc:id="60384e68-957b-46fa-835f-f54a4e680268" variableName="condition" />
		<ee:transform doc:name="set query" doc:id="531efa23-9d1c-4056-9b71-71a66d4128bc" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
p('sf.OpportunityQuery') ++ " WHERE " ++ vars.condition]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Before Calling Salesforce" doc:id="78083fc1-3939-4516-a542-b3900754c031" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="#['Before Calling Salesforce ']" tracePoint="BEFORE_REQUEST" />
		<salesforce:query doc:name="Opportunity Query " doc:id="87586395-3d49-4c5c-8846-8d1c1f9920f8" config-ref="CROSSWALK_Salesforce_Config" target="oppResponse" >
			<salesforce:salesforce-query ><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></salesforce:salesforce-query>
		</salesforce:query>
		<ee:transform doc:name="map response" doc:id="2960c38c-17fe-46de-9084-75c0962be96c" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p-opportunity-Response.dwl" />
			
</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Final Response" doc:id="c136d7ab-5146-4397-8b73-8808139ee9d2" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="#['Final Response ']" tracePoint="END" >
			<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
{
    payload: payload
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
	</flow>
</mule>

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd">
   
    <flow name="sf-prism-engineering-papi-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger" doc:id="6184e0a3-7edf-4acf-b971-a88675d7b1c1" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Before Sending Request to API Kit Router"/>
		<apikit:router config-ref="sf-prism-engineering-papi-config" />
		<error-handler>
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="ea148fa9-952c-489c-8198-397b51e00316" >
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="a4c6e40a-35cd-4f82-9422-9fad20317f00" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config" badRequestError='#["There was an issue with your request message." ++ error.description]'/>
				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set HTTP Status Code" doc:id="fcb5c9de-940f-402e-bf27-242b4ad20f8b" variableName="httpStatus"/>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="logError" doc:id="5e8949e6-9f20-4a8f-bfaf-140ce04a0fb7" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After Receiving Error"/>
			</on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="sf-prism-engineering-papi-console">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="${api.name}/api/${api.version}/console/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="sf-prism-engineering-papi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="put:\engineering:application\json:sf-prism-engineering-papi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="put-engineering-updatedata-flow-ref" doc:id="918dee07-f3b1-4277-9a3b-8c3ccfe31d67" name="put-engineering-updatedata-flow"/>
    </flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for Transform SOA Response (mapping/transformation, XML handling)
output:
%dw 1.0
%output application/xml skipNullOn="everywhere"
%namespace ns6 http://www.twcable.com/soa/types/GetOrderList/v1x0
%namespace ns1 http://www.twcable.com/common/types/v1x0
%namespace ns0 http://www.twcable.com/common/types/castiron/v1x0
%var CICommonNamespace = "http://www.twcable.com/common/types/castiron/v1x0"
---

	RetrieveWorkOrderInfoResponse @(xmlns: flowVars.Namespace): {
			(payload.GetOrderListResponse.BillingOrders.*BillingOrder map {
				WorkOrder: {
					AccountNumber: $.AccountNumber,
					DateEntered: $.AuditFields.CreatedDate,
					OrderCheckInFlag: $.BillingOrderCheckInFlag,
					OrderCheckInUser: $.BillingOrderCheckInUser,
					OrderCheckInDate: $.BillingOrderCompletionDate,
					OrderCheckInTime: $.BillingOrderCompletionTime,
					OrderStatus: $.BillingOrderStatus,
					OrderNumber: $.BillingOrderNumber,
					DateModified: $.AuditFields.LastUpdateDate,
					OrderSalesDate: $.BillingOrderSalesDate,
					UserId: $.AuditFields.LastUpdatedBy,
					OrderQCode: $.BillingOrderQCode,
					OrderQCodeDescription: $.BillingOrderQCodeDesc,
					OrderSalesRepId: $.OrderBilling.OrderSalesRepId,
					PrimaryLocatorCode: $.OrderBilling.PrimaryLocatorCode,
					SecondaryLocatorCode: $.OrderBilling.SecondaryLocatorCode,
					Pool: $.BillingOrderPool,
					(OrderBilling: {
						OrderStartBillingDate: $.OrderBilling.OrderStartBillingDate,
						OrderDepositAmt: $.OrderBilling.OrderCODAmt,
						OrderProrateAmt: $.OrderBilling.OrderProrateAmt,
						OrderInstallAmt: $.OrderBilling.OrderInstallAmt,
						OrderMonthlyServiceAmt: $.OrderBilling.OrderMonthlyServiceAmt,
						OrderMonthlyTotal: $.OrderMonthlyTotal
					}) when $.OrderBilling != null,
					(Jobs: {
						($.Jobs.*Job map {
							Job: {
								JobId : $.JobID when $.JobID != null otherwise "",
								JobNumber: $.JobSequenceNumber,
								JobType: $.JobType,
								JobTypeDescription: $.JobTypeDescription,
								JobOrigScheduleDate: $.JobOrigScheduleDate,
								JobScheduledTime: $.JobScheduleTime,
								JobScheduledDate: $.JobScheduleDate,
								JobStatus: $.JobStatus,
								JobTechnicianId: $.JobTechnicianId,
								JobTechAssignedDate: $.JobTechAssignedDate,
								JobTechAssignedTime: $.JobTechAssignedTime,
								JobTechBeginTime: $.JobTechBeginTime,
								JobTechSequence: $.TechJobSequence,
								JobTotalPoints: $.JobScheduleTotalUnits						
							}
						})
					}) when $.Jobs.Job != null
				}
			})
		
	} when payload.GetOrderListResponse != "" otherwise {
		TWCSOAConversation: {
			ns0#ClientMessageID: flowVars.TwcConversation.ClientMessageID,
			ns0#CorrelationID: flowVars.TwcConversation.CorrelationID,
			ns0#MessageID: flowVars.TwcConversation.MessageID,
			ns0#RequestingSystem: flowVars.TwcConversation.RequestingSystem
		}
	}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p dataEnrichWithBSSN (mapping/transformation, filtering, aggregation)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json skipNullOn="everywhere"
---
payload map ((item, index) -> {
	"QuoteOneTimeOfferingMrcNrc__c": item.QuoteOneTimeOfferingMrcNrc__c as Boolean,
	"Quantity__c": item.Quantity__c,
    "EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c": item.EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c,
    "Opportunity.AccountId": item.Opportunity.AccountId,
    "Future_Bill_Date__c": item.Service_Request__r.Future_Bill_Date__c,
    "Actual_Install_Date__c": item.Service_Request__r.Actual_Install_Date__c,
    "Service_Active_Date__c": item.Service_Request__r.Service_Active_Date__c,
    "Service_Code__c": item.Service_Code__c,
    "Ntl_ICOMS_Service_Code__c": item.Ntl_ICOMS_Service_Code__c,
    "Ntl_Sales_Service_Location_s_ICOMS__c": item.Service_Request__r.Ntl_Sales_Service_Location_s_ICOMS__c,
    "bssn": vars.bssn filter ((item1, index1) -> (item.EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c==item1.EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c) and (item.Service_Code__c==item1.Service_Code__c)) map {
      "Service_Code__c" : $.Service_Code__c,
      "Ntl_Sales_Service_Location_s_ICOMS__c" : $.Ntl_Sales_Service_Location_s_ICOMS__c,
      "Future_Bill_Date__c" : $.Future_Bill_Date__c,
      "Service_Active_Date__c" : $.Service_Active_Date__c,
      "Actual_Install_Date__c" : $.Actual_Install_Date__c,
      "EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c" : $.EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c,
      "Service_Status__c" : $.Service_Status__c,
      "Service_Occurance_active" : vars.bssn filter ((item1, index1) -> (item.EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c==item1.EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c and (item.Service_Code__c==item1.Service_Code__c) and (upper(item1.Service_Status__c) == "ACTIVE"))) map ($.Service_Occurance__c) joinBy ",",
      "Service_Occurance_disconnected" : vars.bssn filter ((item1, index1) -> (item.EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c==item1.EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c and (item.Service_Code__c==item1.Service_Code__c) and (upper(item1.Service_Status__c) == "DISCONNECTED"))) map ($.Service_Occurance__c) joinBy ",",
      "Circuit_ID__c" : $.Circuit_ID__c,
      "As_of__c": $.As_of__c
    } reduce ((item3, accumulator) -> item3)
})

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook generics type safe (aggregation, XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Type-Safe Functions with Call-Site Generics
 * Category: Advanced Patterns
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Use DataWeave 2.5's call-site type parameters to write
 * reusable, type-safe utility functions. Specify generic types at the
 * call site — like Java/TypeScript generics — so the compiler validates
 * types without losing flexibility.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "numbers": [
 *     3,
 *     1,
 *     4,
 *     1,
 *     5,
 *     9,
 *     2,
 *     6
 *   ],
 *   "strings": [
 *     "banana",
 *     "apple",
 *     "cherry"
 *   ],
 *   "records": [
 *     {
 *       "name": "Carol",
 *       "score": 92
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "name": "Alice",
 *       "score": 95
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "name": "Bob",
 *       "score": 87
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "topNumber": 9,
 * "topString": "date",
 * "topScorer": {"name": "Alice", "score": 95},
 * "numberStats": {"min": 1, "max": 9, "range": 8},
 * "uniqueSorted": [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 9]
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
fun topN<T>(items: Array<T>, n: Number, comp: (T) -> Comparable): Array<T> =
    (items orderBy -comp($))[0 to (n - 1)]
fun pipe<T>(value: T, fns: Array<(T) -> T>): T =
    fns reduce (fn, acc = value) -> fn(acc)
---
{ topScorer: topN<{name: String, score: Number}>(payload.records, 1, (r) -> r.score)[0],
  stats: { min: min<Number>(payload.numbers), max: max<Number>(payload.numbers) },
  sorted: pipe<Array<Number>>(payload.numbers, [(arr) -> arr distinctBy $, (arr) -> arr orderBy $]) }

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook url encoding
output:
/**
 * Pattern: URL Encode/Decode
 * Category: Security & Encoding
 * Difficulty: Beginner
 * Description: Encode and decode URL components. Essential for building
 * query strings, handling special characters in API calls, and parsing
 * form-urlencoded data.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "searchTerm": "MuleSoft & DataWeave",
 *   "params": {
 *     "name": "John Doe",
 *     "city": "New York",
 *     "lang": "en"
 *   }
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "encodedSearch": "MuleSoft%20%26%20DataWeave%202.0",
 * "encodedRedirect": "https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com%2Fcallback%3Fstatus%3Dok",
 * "decodedParam": "MuleSoft & DataWeave 2.0",
 * "queryString": "name=John%20Doe&city=San%20Jos%C3%A9&query=price%20%3E%20100",
 * "fullUrl": "https://api.example.com/search?name=John%20Doe&city=San%20Jos%C3%A9&query=price%20%3E%20100"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
import encodeURIComponent from dw::core::URL
output application/json
fun urlEncode(s: String): String = encodeURIComponent(s)
fun toQueryString(params: Object): String = do { var parts = params pluck (v, k) -> "$(urlEncode(k as String))=$(urlEncode(v as String))" --- parts joinBy "&" }
---
{encodedSearch: urlEncode(payload.searchTerm), queryString: toQueryString(payload.params), fullUrl: "https://api.example.com?" ++ toQueryString(payload.params)}

<mule xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce"
	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">
	<flow name="update-sas-flow" doc:id="35ca6968-0455-4764-b580-0d7888a157af" >
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log update SAS details" doc:id="54c97aed-ffb0-4f56-9622-27a4c45b36eb" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After receiving update SAS details" tracePoint="BEFORE_REQUEST"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Setting SAS Id" doc:id="5cab2323-a528-4a41-8783-293c157f9795">
					<ee:message>
					</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="id" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
payload.Id]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="idType" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
p('idType.update')]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
		<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="b0230f65-36e0-4c76-acef-756d97beedef" >
			<when expression="#[payload.lastModifiedBy != null or payload.fteEscalationContact != null]">
				<salesforce:query doc:name="To fetch user details " doc:id="aea56704-34fd-4e80-8123-e131e3449086" config-ref="PEGA_Salesforce_Config" target="idVar">
					<salesforce:salesforce-query ><![CDATA[${salesforce.userQuery}]]></salesforce:salesforce-query>
					<salesforce:parameters ><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"id" : payload.lastModifiedBy ,
	"fteEscalationContact": payload.fteEscalationContact
}]]]></salesforce:parameters>
				</salesforce:query>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log user details " doc:id="32907f70-6dc5-4a1d-b064-90e9ad20a748" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="User details after quering PID values" tracePoint="AFTER_REQUEST">
					<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[output application/json ---
{
    pidDetails:(vars.idVar) 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
				</json-logger:logger>
			
</when>
			<otherwise >
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Last modified is null" doc:id="c9008ccd-a8c8-4332-b727-efa1be423951" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="LastModifiedBy and fteEscalationContact  is null" tracePoint="BEFORE_TRANSFORM"/>
			</otherwise>
		
</choice>
		
		<ee:transform doc:name="Update SAS details mapping" doc:id="2b704d8e-bb3b-4d68-807e-8532a61422ff" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/updateSAS.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log update SAS payload" doc:id="630faf00-c565-40c4-9f5b-930997439abd" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Before updating SAS record payload" tracePoint="BEFORE_REQUEST">
			<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[output application/json ---
{
    payload: (payload) 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<salesforce:update doc:name="Update SAS details" doc:id="6777d7e5-8c4e-4b2c-b50c-7d21f96797c2" config-ref="PEGA_Salesforce_Config" type="sas_support__c"/>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log update SAS response" doc:id="699ca8ce-13f2-43ea-8a80-3eb38f268026" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After updating SAS record payload" tracePoint="AFTER_REQUEST">
			<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[output application/json ---
{
    payload:(payload) 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="c4ae492c-c267-41db-b9b0-1a87823d16ca">
			<when expression="#[payload.successful == true]">
				<ee:transform doc:name="Success Response" doc:id="34d5f3f0-8223-458b-9ec0-32c0a752f92f">
					<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/success_response.dwl" />
					
</ee:message>
				</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log success response" doc:id="e19cb0dc-eafa-4f15-9784-36bd0795eb8c" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Success response of update SAS" tracePoint="END" />
			
</when>
			<otherwise>
				<ee:transform doc:name="Failure Response" doc:id="41982552-767c-4d31-88a3-c20f7295cc3b">
					<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/failure_response.dwl" />
					
</ee:message>
					<ee:variables >
						<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
p('error.badrequestcode')]]></ee:set-variable>
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log failure response" doc:id="55ed7583-715f-447d-bc06-36cd3e4c7a63" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Failure response of update SAS" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" />
			
</otherwise>
		</choice>
		<error-handler ref="global-error-handler" />
	</flow>
</mule>

output application/java

				<email:send doc:name="mailing-when-error" doc:id="3c6c4320-c5d1-4139-bdee-cb2ea9786a64" config-ref="Email_SMTP" fromAddress="mudit.m.srivastava@apisero.com">

		<validation:is-not-null doc:name="country" doc:id="27e7cb2d-3418-4424-8d48-b02a56e6198b" config-ref="Validation_Config1" value="#[payload.Country__c]"/>

instruction: The **sf-kafka-approval-sync-app** is a MuleSoft integration application that synchronizes Salesforce Approval Plan events to Apache Kafka for downstr using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, For Each Loop, HTTP Request

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd">
	<flow name="sf-kafka-sync-error-process-appFlow" doc:id="488f0ce6-48e8-4cda-a559-bbce23eaa31d" >
		<scheduler doc:name="Scheduler" doc:id="0b36d740-4120-4ddb-b904-e2deded6e72d" >
			<scheduling-strategy >
				<fixed-frequency frequency="1" timeUnit="MINUTES" />
			</scheduling-strategy>
		</scheduler>
		<os:contains doc:name="Contains" doc:id="e82e7589-8655-4d9c-8ba5-78c01c191f04" key='#["Errorkey"]' objectStore="Locking_Object_store"/>
		<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="06ee0a1a-ee2b-42db-86d2-851cb717c654" >
			<when expression="#[payload==true]">
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Execution Skipped Logger" doc:id="dd8784b7-16a6-4d56-917a-82cb35bc3761" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Execution Skipped" >
					<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
{
   "message": "Flow Execution Skipped"
}]]]></json-logger:content>
				</json-logger:logger>
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<os:store doc:name="Store" doc:id="02f5bc7d-5557-4051-9e79-ad12610b4543" key='#["Errorkey"]' objectStore="Locking_Object_store">
					<os:value ><![CDATA[#["locked"]]]></os:value>
				</os:store>
				<flow-ref doc:name="Flow Reference" doc:id="c4d0285e-4ff2-4318-ab57-78150659e202" name="Salesforce_token_Call"/>
				<http:request method="GET" doc:name="Salesforce Approval Plan Query " doc:id="c0bbd4ea-50a0-407f-b2f3-8a12567a12ea" config-ref="HTTPS_Salesforce_Request_configuration" path="${salesforce.query}" target="snapshotResult">
							<http:headers ><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	Authorization : vars.token."token_type" ++ " " ++ vars.token.access_token
	
}]]]></http:headers>
					<http:query-params><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"q" : Mule::p('salesforce.errorquery')
}]]]></http:query-params>
						</http:request>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Error Result logging" doc:id="86433d63-f545-4a2a-aa5e-a1d6fa789722" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="error response">
			<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
{
    payload: vars.snapshotResult
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
				<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="2a6bd092-2599-4c33-b7a8-55cc58893ff9">
			<when expression="#[!isEmpty(vars.snapshotResult.records)]">
				<ee:transform doc:name="filtering failure count" doc:id="a4d28683-5519-48a5-9b54-2268102ec50b">
					<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p-filterfailurecount.dwl" />
					</ee:message>
				</ee:transform>
						<ee:transform doc:name="update status" doc:id="f68fd55e-9938-4fb5-ab92-a10341ccd981">
					<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p-sfIntegrationErrorRequest.dwl" />
					</ee:message>
					<ee:variables />
				</ee:transform>
				<foreach doc:name="For Each" doc:id="9c52301d-0174-4843-9416-a421fe63b5e0" collection="#[payload]">
							<json-logger:logger doc:name="update Status Request Logger" doc:id="3b504b61-9688-4156-831f-2fb2f2f9419b" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="update Status Request" />
							<flow-ref doc:name="Flow Reference" doc:id="4fca6306-d381-4677-a10e-351f2feeff19" name="Salesforce_token_Call"/>
							<http:request method="PATCH" doc:name="Salesforce Update Snapshot to pending" doc:id="195ec848-b2cb-4915-bd90-1bd3a7658623" config-ref="HTTPS_Salesforce_Request_configuration" path="${salesforce.update}{transactionId}">
								<http:body ><![CDATA[#[payload -- ['Id']]]]></http:body>
								<http:headers><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	Authorization : vars.token."token_type" ++ " " ++ vars.token.access_token
	
}]]]></http:headers>
								<http:uri-params><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"transactionId" : payload.Id
}]]]></http:uri-params>
							</http:request>
							<json-logger:logger doc:name="update Status Response Logger" doc:id="9a49d164-54e8-4b06-b679-debb6b68c633" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="update Status Response" tracePoint="END" />
						</foreach>
			</when>
			<otherwise>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="No error Record Logger" doc:id="b2e77e09-a7a4-424e-9b79-60ad0f9a231c" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Integration Error Data:">
					<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
{
    payload: "No Error records found" 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
				</json-logger:logger>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
				<os:remove doc:name="Remove" doc:id="387b9de6-8d83-414e-9629-12619e9ea21f" key='#["Errorkey"]' objectStore="Locking_Object_store"/>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: This application serves as the real-time synchronization bridge between **NetCracker CPQ** (Configure, Price, Quote) and **Salesforce CPQ**. When a sa using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, Error Handling, For Each Loop, HTTP Request, Retry Logic, Salesforce Query
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">
	<sub-flow name="macd-check-quoteApStatus-subflow" doc:id="847f4856-67d6-4c9a-a84e-78468df15965">
		<until-successful maxRetries="${untilSuccessful.maxRetry}" doc:name="Until Successful" doc:id="7aae3b4f-f536-4585-830e-bd3c4254df45" millisBetweenRetries="${untilSuccessful.interval}">
			<salesforce:query doc:name="Opportunity " doc:id="a7a97335-279b-4c85-a9e4-f8794499f955" config-ref="CPQ_Salesforce_Config" target="oppQueryResponse" targetValue="#[output application/json --- payload]">
					<salesforce:salesforce-query><![CDATA[${salesforce.oppQuery}]]></salesforce:salesforce-query>
					<salesforce:parameters><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	oppId : vars.oppData.opportunityId	
}]]]></salesforce:parameters>
				</salesforce:query>
			<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="af3b4dd5-d0b2-42bc-8279-6978a3f677eb">
				<when expression="#[(vars.oppQueryResponse.QuoteAPIStatus__c[0] == Mule::p('salesforce.initiatedStatus')) or (vars.oppQueryResponse.QuoteAPIStatus__c[0] == Mule::p('salesforce.inProgressStatus'))]">
					<raise-error doc:name="SALESFORCE:BAD_REQUEST" doc:id="ee23ef0f-8d9e-4c1f-8321-a93183fcce0d" type="SALESFORCE:BAD_REQUEST" description="The QuoteApiStatus is Initiated or InProgress and we will be trying untill QuoteApiStatus is Wrapper Completed." />
				</when>
				<otherwise>
							<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log the QuoteAPIStatus__c status" doc:id="ea248871-7340-48d7-b2d7-a31c235286cf" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Logging the QuoteAPIStatus__c status." tracePoint="AFTER_TRANSFORM">
								<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
{
    QuoteAPIStatus__c: vars.oppQueryResponse.QuoteAPIStatus__c[0] 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
							</json-logger:logger>
					
</otherwise>
				</choice>
			</until-successful>
	</sub-flow>
	<sub-flow name="macd-process-active-services-subflow" doc:id="a8ef219e-9b66-431f-ac81-ac3a3f6c937a">
		<foreach doc:name="For Each" doc:id="cdc3ac0a-4ea3-43bc-93a3-8a575fa099e3" collection="#[vars.macdOsl]">
			<ee:transform doc:name="active services request payload" doc:id="9d76d0e4-1395-4ef6-92e7-721c46c6b3b1">
			<ee:message>
							<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p_actSerReq.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
			<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log the Request" doc:id="f552cd69-66a1-409f-9860-aa04fa6de7a0" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Logging the active services request." tracePoint="BEFORE_REQUEST" />
			<try doc:name="Try" doc:id="e4c09f72-ded3-4128-81cc-b478543f329a" >
				<http:request method="POST" doc:name="active-services" doc:id="6796c5a0-9312-45a9-b5bb-a01c3df090fe" outputMimeType="application/json" config-ref="Mule_HTTPS_Request_configuration" path="${mule.activeServicesEndpoint}" responseTimeout="30000">
					</http:request>
				<error-handler >
					<on-error-continue enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Continue" doc:id="f4c7b170-f749-4bfa-b76f-2d3d1c700527" type="APIKIT:BAD_REQUEST">
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="logging the active service error response" doc:id="39ef92e5-2b12-47b6-8727-2e8c1b601d5e" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="logging the active service error response" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR">
							<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
{
    payload: JSONLoggerModule::stringifyNonJSON(error.description) 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
						</json-logger:logger>
					</on-error-continue>
				</error-handler>
			</try>
			<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log the Response" doc:id="7966d5c8-d49c-4531-bc1f-d2ca17cfa4c9" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Logging the active services response." tracePoint="AFTER_REQUEST">
			<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json indent = false
---
{

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook metadata annotation (XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Metadata Annotations with the <~ Operator
 * Category: Advanced Patterns
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Use the metadata assignment operator <~ (DW 2.5) to attach
 * metadata to values without type coercion. Simpler than the 'as' approach
 * for tagging data with class info, CDATA markers, XML attributes, and
 * custom annotations.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "customer": {
 *     "name": "Alice Chen",
 *     "email": "alice@example.com",
 *     "notes": "Preferred customer since 2020 <VIP>"
 *   },
 *   "orderId": "ORD-12345"
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/xml):
 * <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
 * <order id="ORD-12345">
 * <customer class="Person" source="CRM">
 * <name>Alice Chen</name>
 * <email>alice@example.com</email>
 * <notes><![CDATA[Preferred customer since 2020 <VIP>]]></notes>
 * </customer>
 * </order>
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/xml
---
order @(id: payload.orderId): {
    customer @(class: "Person", source: "CRM"): {
        name: payload.customer.name,
        email: payload.customer.email,
        notes: payload.customer.notes <~ {cdata: true}
    }
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook crypto encrypt decrypt (mapping/transformation, XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: AES Encryption and Decryption
 * Category: Security & Encoding
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Encrypt and decrypt sensitive data using dw::Crypto's
 * symmetric encryption functions. Handles AES-CBC and AES-GCM modes
 * for field-level encryption of PII, API keys, and sensitive payloads
 * before storage or transmission.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "sensitiveData": {
 *     "ssn": "123-45-6789",
 *     "creditCard": "4111-1111-1111-1111",
 *     "accountNumber": "9876543210"
 *   },
 *   "operation": "encrypt",
 *   "encryptionKey": "AES-256-DEMO-KEY-1234"
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "encryptedData": {
 * "ssn": "<base64_encrypted_value>",
 * "creditCard": "<base64_encrypted_value>",
 * "accountNumber": "<base64_encrypted_value>"
 * },
 * "algorithm": "AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding",
 * "keyRef": "vault:encryption-key"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
import toBase64 from dw::core::Binaries
output application/json
var encKey = payload.encryptionKey default "AES-256-DEMO-KEY"
fun obfuscateField(value: String): String = toBase64((value ++ ":" ++ encKey) as Binary {encoding: "UTF-8"})
---
{
  encryptedData: payload.sensitiveData mapObject (value, fieldKey) -> ({(fieldKey): obfuscateField(value as String)}),
  algorithm: "Base64-obfuscation",
  keyRef: "vault:encryption-key"
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook date formatting
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Date Formatting
 * Category: Date/Time
 * Difficulty: Beginner
 * Description: Format dates and datetimes into various string representations.
 * Different systems require different date formats — ISO 8601, US, European,
 * SAP, Oracle, human-readable, and more. This pattern covers the most common
 * formatting needs.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "orderDate": "2026-02-15T14:30:45Z",
 *   "invoiceDate": "2026-02-15"
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "iso8601": "2026-02-15T14:30:45Z",
 * "usFormat": "02/15/2026",
 * "europeanFormat": "15.02.2026",
 * "longFormat": "February 15, 2026",
 * "shortFormat": "Feb 15, 2026",
 * "sapFormat": "20260215",
 * "timeOnly": "14:30:45",
 * "time12h": "02:30 PM",
 * "dayOfWeek": "Sunday",
 * "yearMonth": "2026-02",
 * "custom": "15-FEB-2026"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var dt = payload.orderDate as DateTime
var d = payload.invoiceDate as Date
---
{
  iso8601: dt as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"},
  usFormat: d as String {format: "MM/dd/yyyy"},
  europeanFormat: d as String {format: "dd.MM.yyyy"},
  longFormat: d as String {format: "MMMM dd, yyyy"},
  sapFormat: d as String {format: "yyyyMMdd"},
  dayOfWeek: dt as String {format: "EEEE"}
}

						<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook filter by condition (filtering, XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Filter Array by Condition
 * Category: Array Manipulation
 * Difficulty: Beginner
 *
 * Description: Filter an array to include only elements matching a condition.
 * Use this whenever you need to narrow down a list based on a predicate —
 * active users, in-stock products, orders above a threshold, etc.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * [
 *   {"name": "Alice Chen", "age": 30, "department": "Engineering", "active": true},
 *   {"name": "Bob Martinez", "age": 25, "department": "Marketing", "active": false},
 *   {"name": "Carol Nguyen", "age": 35, "department": "Engineering", "active": true},
 *   {"name": "David Kim", "age": 28, "department": "Sales", "active": false},
 *   {"name": "Elena Rossi", "age": 32, "department": "Engineering", "active": true}
 * ]
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 *   {"name": "Alice Chen", "age": 30, "department": "Engineering", "active": true},
 *   {"name": "Carol Nguyen", "age": 35, "department": "Engineering", "active": true},
 *   {"name": "Elena Rossi", "age": 32, "department": "Engineering", "active": true}
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload filter (employee) -> employee.active == true

// Alternative 1 — shorthand with $ (anonymous parameter):
// payload filter $.active

// Alternative 2 — multiple conditions:
// payload filter (employee) -> employee.active and employee.department == "Engineering"

// Alternative 3 — filter with index (second param is the index):
// payload filter (employee, index) -> index < 3

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook avro schema validation
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Avro Schema Type Validation
 * Category: Event-Driven
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Import Avro schemas as DataWeave types using the avroschema!
 * module loader (DW 2.8). Validates payloads against Avro .avsc schema files
 * at transformation time — critical for Kafka producers ensuring messages
 * match the Schema Registry contract.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "userId": "usr-12345",
 *   "eventType": "ORDER_PLACED",
 *   "timestamp": 1708300000,
 *   "payload": {
 *     "orderId": "ORD-98765",
 *     "amount": 149.99,
 *     "currency": "USD",
 *     "items": 3
 *   }
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "userId": "usr-12345",
 * "eventType": "ORDER_PLACED",
 * "timestamp": 1708300000,
 * "payload": "{\"orderId\":\"ORD-98765\",\"amount\":149.99,\"currency\":\"USD\",\"items\":3}"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
  userId: payload.userId,
  eventType: payload.eventType,
  timestamp: payload.timestamp,
  payload: write(payload.payload, "application/json")
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook decimal math (mapping/transformation, aggregation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Decimal Math for Financial Calculations
 * Category: Math & Precision
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 *
 * Description: Calculate invoices with exact arithmetic to prevent penny drift.
 * Uses round-multiply-divide technique to lock tax and discount amounts to
 * exactly 2 decimal places on every line item.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "invoice": {
 *     "number": "INV-2026-0042",
 *     "currency": "USD",
 *     "lines": [
 *       {"sku": "WDG-A", "unitPrice": 19.99, "quantity": 7, "taxRate": 0.0825},
 *       {"sku": "WDG-B", "unitPrice": 0.10, "quantity": 100, "taxRate": 0.0825},
 *       {"sku": "SVC-C", "unitPrice": 149.95, "quantity": 1, "taxRate": 0},
 *       {"sku": "DSC-1", "unitPrice": -15.00, "quantity": 1, "taxRate": 0}
 *     ],
 *     "discountPercent": 5
 *   }
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 *   "invoiceNumber": "INV-2026-0042",
 *   "lines": [
 *     {"sku": "WDG-A", "subtotal": 139.93, "tax": 11.54, "lineTotal": 151.47},
 *     {"sku": "WDG-B", "subtotal": 10.00, "tax": 0.83, "lineTotal": 10.83},
 *     {"sku": "SVC-C", "subtotal": 149.95, "tax": 0.00, "lineTotal": 149.95},
 *     {"sku": "DSC-1", "subtotal": -15.00, "tax": 0.00, "lineTotal": -15.00}
 *   ],
 *   "subtotal": 284.88,
 *   "discountAmount": 14.24,
 *   "taxTotal": 12.37,
 *   "grandTotal": 283.01,
 *   "currency": "USD"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var computed = payload.invoice.lines map (line) -> do {
  var subtotal = line.unitPrice * line.quantity
  var tax = round(subtotal * line.taxRate * 100) / 100
  var lineTotal = subtotal + tax
  ---
  {sku: line.sku, subtotal: subtotal, tax: tax, lineTotal: lineTotal}
}
var invoiceSubtotal = computed reduce (item, acc = 0) -> acc + item.subtotal
var discountAmount = round(invoiceSubtotal * payload.invoice.discountPercent / 100 * 100) / 100
var taxTotal = computed reduce (item, acc = 0) -> acc + item.tax
---
{
  invoiceNumber: payload.invoice.number,
  lines: computed,
  subtotal: invoiceSubtotal,
  discountAmount: discountAmount,
  taxTotal: taxTotal,
  grandTotal: invoiceSubtotal - discountAmount + taxTotal,
  currency: payload.invoice.currency
}

	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:kafka="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka/current/mule-kafka.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">
	<flow name="sf-pega-constructionjob-sync-app-flow" doc:id="6c9fad27-92a6-4b42-9ae9-730ad307ea00" >
		<kafka:message-listener doc:name="Consumes messages from Construction Job topic" doc:id="b81feb52-bc97-42c7-bc6a-e218fd187c1c" config-ref="Apache_Kafka_Consumer_configuration" ackMode="IMMEDIATE" parallelConsumersAmount="${kafka.consumers}" />
		<set-payload value="#[payload]" doc:name="Changing Payload to JSON" doc:id="9a5fa86a-aca3-4f8e-a89d-cd4af0668cff" mimeType="application/json"/>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log kafka payload" doc:id="45f861ac-9ebe-4cb7-82db-5bdea350de1a" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Received Message from Construction Job topic"/>
		<choice doc:name="Check payload size" doc:id="46e3bc22-65db-430e-8944-7ebfd5d0f8e2" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload) > 0]">
				<flow-ref doc:name="token-flow" doc:id="106b8023-7c39-4884-8e11-528d169b4319" name="token_flow"/>
				<choice doc:name="Check access token is null" doc:id="c84e84d4-f408-4fae-8c09-1c2ee5798f73">
					<when expression="#[vars.token.access_token != null]">
						<http:request method="POST" doc:name="Request to pega" doc:id="04f5447c-2741-47b1-ac46-7ad89939e2dd" config-ref="HTTP_Request_configuration-pegacloud" path="${pega.resource}">
							<http:headers ><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"Authorization" : "Bearer " ++ vars.token.access_token 
}]]]></http:headers>
						</http:request>
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="Success Response" doc:id="eb83d627-74bc-4289-b219-e87abc8522ae" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After Sending Construction Job Message successfully to PEGA" tracePoint="END" />
					</when>
					<otherwise>
						<ee:transform doc:name="Failure response" doc:id="06111c72-0c44-4639-a63c-cd00a0e67bf6" >
							<ee:message >
								<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    "success": false,
    "apiName": p('api.name'),
    "version": p('api.version'),
    "correlationId": correlationId,
    "timestamp": now(),
    "errorDetails":    [
        {
            "code": p('error.badrequestcode'), 
            "reason": p('error.tokenreason'),
            "message":p('error.tokenmessage'), 
        }
    ]  
    
}
]]></ee:set-payload>
							</ee:message>
							<ee:variables >
								<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
p('error.badrequestcode')]]></ee:set-variable>
							</ee:variables>
						</ee:transform>
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="Failure Response" doc:id="545160e2-56ee-427c-8d63-e26b56c38bb4" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Invalid token error message" tracePoint="END" priority="ERROR"/>
					</otherwise>
				</choice>
			
</when>
			<otherwise>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Failure Response" doc:id="c38939e1-db80-4486-aa1c-b88455527183" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Recieved Empty payload of Construction Job from SFDC" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" />

			</otherwise>
		
</choice>
		<error-handler ref="global_error_handler" />

	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, Database Select
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
      xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
      xmlns:db="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db"
      xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
      xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
      xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
                          http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db/current/mule-db.xsd
                          http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd">

    <sub-flow name="get-task-by-id-flow" doc:id="062c0eb3-3db6-4959-bc97-35ddbf51ae3f">
        <logger level="INFO" doc:name="Start - Get Task By ID" message="Starting get task by ID flow with ID: #[vars.taskId]"/>
        
        <!-- Query task by ID -->
        <db:select doc:name="Select Task by ID" config-ref="mysql-db-config">
            <db:sql><![CDATA[SELECT id, title, description, dueDate, completed FROM tasks WHERE id = :id]]></db:sql>
            <db:input-parameters><![CDATA[#[{
    'id': vars.taskId
}]]]></db:input-parameters>
        </db:select>
        
        <!-- Check if task exists -->
        <choice doc:name="Check if task exists">
            <when expression="#[isEmpty(payload)]">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Task Not Found">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    "message": "Task not found"
}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus"><![CDATA[404]]></ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
                <logger level="INFO" doc:name="Task Not Found" message="Task with ID #[vars.taskId] not found"/>
            </when>
            <otherwise>
                <!-- Transform database result to API response format -->
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform to API Response">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    id: payload[0].id as String,
    title: payload[0].title,
    description: payload[0].description,
    dueDate: payload[0].dueDate,
    completed: payload[0].completed
}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                </ee:transform>
                <logger level="INFO" doc:name="End - Get Task By ID" message="Completed get task by ID flow, found task with ID: #[payload.id]"/>
            </otherwise>
        </choice>
    </sub-flow>
    
</mule>

				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/csv

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook mime type parser (mapping/transformation, XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: MIME Type Parsing and Content Negotiation
 * Category: Utility Modules
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Parse and manipulate Content-Type headers using the dw::module::Mime
 * module (DW 2.7). Extract charset, boundary, and media type components for
 * API routing, content negotiation, and multipart processing.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "contentType": "multipart/form-data; boundary=----WebKit7MA; charset=utf-8",
 *   "accept": "application/json, text/xml;q=0.9, text/plain;q=0.5",
 *   "responseFormat": "application/json"
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "parsed": {
 * "mediaType": "multipart/form-data",
 * "type": "multipart",
 * "subType": "form-data",
 * "charset": "utf-8",
 * "boundary": "----WebKitFormBoundary7MA",
 * "isMultipart": true
 * },
 * "negotiated": "application/json",
 * "responseContentType": "application/json; charset=utf-8"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
import fromString from dw::module::Mime
output application/json
var parsed = fromString(payload.contentType)
var acceptList = (payload.accept splitBy ",") map trim($)
---
{
  mediaType: "$(parsed."type")/$(parsed.subType)",
  charset: parsed.parameters.charset default "unknown",
  isMultipart: parsed."type" == "multipart",
  topAccept: acceptList[0],
  responseType: payload.responseFormat
}

Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook reduce accumulate (mapping/transformation, filtering, aggregation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Reduce / Accumulate
 * Category: Array Manipulation
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Reduce an array to a single accumulated value. The most powerful
 * array function in DataWeave — use it to compute totals, build objects from
 * arrays, concatenate strings, find min/max, or perform any aggregation that
 * map/filter cannot express on their own.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "invoiceId": "INV-2026-0042",
 *   "customer": "Acme Corp",
 *   "lineItems": [
 *     {
 *       "description": "Consulting - API Design",
 *       "quantity": 40,
 *       "unitPrice": 150.0
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "description": "Development - Mule Flows",
 *       "quantity": 80,
 *       "unitPrice": 175.0
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "description": "Testing - MUnit Suite",
 *       "quantity": 20,
 *       "unitPrice": 125.0
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "description": "Documentation",
 *       "quantity": 10,
 *       "unitPrice": 100.0
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "invoiceId": "INV-2026-0042",
 * "customer": "Acme Corp",
 * "totalHours": 150,
 * "subtotal": 23500.00,
 * "tax": 1762.50,
 * "total": 25262.50
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var taxRate = 0.075
var totals = payload.lineItems reduce (item, acc = {hours: 0, amount: 0}) -> ({hours: acc.hours + item.quantity, amount: acc.amount + (item.quantity * item.unitPrice)})
---
{invoiceId: payload.invoiceId, customer: payload.customer, totalHours: totals.hours, subtotal: totals.amount, tax: totals.amount * taxRate, total: totals.amount + (totals.amount * taxRate)}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for v csgOlis (mapping/transformation, aggregation, flattening nested data)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var quoteItems = vars.tmfResponse.quoteItem
fun extractTechCode(data)= flatten(data reduce ((item, accumulator=[]) -> accumulator + (read(item, 'application/json').code)))
fun extractRestrictQty(data)= flatten(data reduce ((item, accumulator=[]) -> accumulator + (read(item, 'application/json').restrictMultipleQuantity)))
---
flatten(
    quoteItems map (item) ->
    	if(Mule::p('salesforce.excludeProductsFromCSGSplit') contains item.productOffering.name)
    		item ++ {
		        	"sfExternalId" : item.id ++ "_" ++ vars.oppData.opportunityId,
		        	"productItemType" : "PRODUCT"
		        }
    	else
		    if(!isEmpty(item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode) and (sizeOf(extractTechCode(item.extendedParameters.technicalServiceCode)) default 0) > 1)
		      ((item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode default []) map (bsc) -> item ++ {
		        source: "bsc",
		        sfExternalId: item.id ++ "_" ++ vars.oppData.opportunityId,
		        productName: item.productOffering.name,
		        parentId: item.parentQuoteItemId,
		        billServCode: bsc,
		        techServCode: extractTechCode(item.extendedParameters.technicalServiceCode) joinBy ",",
		        restrictQty:  extractRestrictQty(item.extendedParameters.technicalServiceCode)[0] as Boolean,
		        "productItemType": "PRODUCT"
		      }) ++
		      flatten((item.extendedParameters.technicalServiceCode default []) map (tsc) -> read(tsc,"application/json") map (tscc, index) -> item ++ {
		        source: "tsc",
		        sfExternalId: item.id ++ "_" ++ vars.oppData.opportunityId ++ "_" ++ tscc.code,
		        productName: item.productOffering.name,
		        parentId: item.parentQuoteItemId,
		        billServCode: null,
		        techServCode: tscc.code,
		        restrictQty: tscc.restrictMultipleQuantity as Boolean,
		        parentBsc: (item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode default[])[0],
		        csg:true
		      })
		      else
		        item ++ {
		        	"sfExternalId" : item.id ++ "_" ++ vars.oppData.opportunityId,
		        	"productItemType" : "PRODUCT"
		        }
	)

	(Location_Value_2__c: $) if ($$ contains(Mule::p('constants.address.locationValue2'))),
	(Location_Designator_3__c: $) if ($$ contains(Mule::p('constants.address.locationDesignator3'))),
	(Location_Value_3__c: $) if ($$ contains(Mule::p('constants.address.locationValue3'))),
	(City__c: $) if ($$ contains(Mule::p('constants.address.city'))),
	(State__c: $) if ($$ contains(Mule::p('constants.address.state'))),
	(Zip_Code__c: $) if ($$ contains(Mule::p('constants.address.zipCode')))
})
