instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for v csgOlis (mapping/transformation, aggregation, flattening nested data)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var quoteItems = vars.tmfResponse.quoteItem
fun extractTechCode(data)= flatten(data reduce ((item, accumulator=[]) -> accumulator + (read(item, 'application/json').code)))
---
flatten(
    quoteItems map (item) -> 
    if(!isEmpty(item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode) and (sizeOf(extractTechCode(item.extendedParameters.technicalServiceCode)) default 0) > 1)
      ((item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode default []) map (bsc) -> item ++ {
        source: "bsc",
        sfExternalId: item.id ++ "_" ++ bsc,
        productName: item.productOffering.name,
        parentId: item.parentQuoteItemId,
        billServCode: bsc,
        techServCode: extractTechCode(item.extendedParameters.technicalServiceCode) joinBy ",",
        "productItemType": "PRODUCT"
      }) ++
      flatten((item.extendedParameters.technicalServiceCode default []) map (tsc) -> read(tsc,"application/json") map (tscc, index) -> item ++ {
        source: "tsc",
        sfExternalId: item.id ++ "_" ++ item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode[0] ++ "_" ++ tscc.code,
        productName: item.productOffering.name,
        parentId: item.parentQuoteItemId,
        billServCode: null,
        techServCode: tscc.code,
        parentBsc: (item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode default[])[0],
        csg:true
      })
      else
        item ++ {
        	"productItemType": "PRODUCT"
        }
)

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns:os="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os/current/mule-os.xsd">
	<flow name="listOS" doc:id="5a9eb556-e953-4488-9f35-8a8fa25ea519" >
		<http:listener doc:name="/listOS" doc:id="6d9e542b-4ead-4588-b7df-ce905ba2827d" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/listOS"/>
		<os:retrieve-all doc:name="Retrieve all" doc:id="8b066dd5-a266-46f7-893b-0ebeba0573eb" objectStore="OS_Game"/>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="bb416fa2-ac86-4cd8-9e14-48b9b08669d0" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload mapObject (v,k,i) -> {
	(k) : read(v,"application/json").status
}
]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="clearEndedGame" doc:id="f3ff54bb-028a-4088-9a14-f2a6546f4db8" >
		<scheduler doc:name="At 02:00" doc:id="6bcc4a18-2452-42ec-8faf-81ecacf58658">
			<scheduling-strategy>
				<cron expression="0 0 2 * * ?" timeZone="Europe/Paris"/>
			</scheduling-strategy>
		</scheduler>
		<os:retrieve-all-keys doc:name="gameIds" doc:id="d8f54c06-9f98-4655-bf46-4e682d0d4756" objectStore="OS_Game" target="gameIds"/>
		<foreach doc:name="For Each" doc:id="ab5f153d-9fa0-4f14-a850-a4a7fe0c5e69" collection="#[vars.gameIds]">
			<os:retrieve doc:name="game" doc:id="90cdc557-64ea-4ee3-a989-42293d8d00ef" key="#[payload]" objectStore="OS_Game" target="game"/>
			<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="0064a91b-e5cc-4e8e-8800-6804b7a581b9" >
				<when expression="#[vars.game.status.status == 'ended']">
					<os:remove doc:name="game" doc:id="95ebc428-0392-44de-9c0d-f597f93b3cd9" key="#[payload]" objectStore="OS_Game"/>
				</when>
				<otherwise >
					<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="41309620-a1c6-4d93-bc96-09f06e597753" />
				</otherwise>
			</choice>
		</foreach>
	</flow>
	<flow name="generateNewId" doc:id="16e08495-67ef-40d6-846e-274b9bd268c8" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="Generate Id" doc:id="04f10e50-4dfa-4314-8dac-60e4dd6c3c72" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
var a = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
var s = sizeOf(a) - 1
fun block() = a[randomInt(s)] ++ a[randomInt(s)] ++ a[randomInt(s)]
---
block() ++ '-' ++ block() ++ '-' ++ block()]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<os:contains doc:name="Id in OS ?" doc:id="31f09e3b-9384-41c8-92ad-e932f02da7d6" key="#[payload]" objectStore="OS_Game" target="exists"/>
		<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="7d9d610a-46f6-4682-b5ae-1c63f16e3dfb" >
			<when expression="#[vars.exists == true]">
				<raise-error doc:name="Raise error" doc:id="a8d5e851-a685-4020-8b3b-bab36f9ca9ef" type="GENID:ALREADY_EXISTS"/>
			</when>
		</choice>
		<error-handler >
			<on-error-continue enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Continue" doc:id="0b1a3e0f-ac98-457a-9d5f-9cb89364f0f3" type="GENID:ALREADY_EXISTS">
				<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="56fddebf-c074-4da2-9441-00a918490a3d" message='#["ID " ++ payload ++ " already exists"]'/>
				<flow-ref doc:name="Regenerate an Id" doc:id="1918f0cf-d2c3-49d1-8e20-57c53639d0b5" name="generateNewId"/>
			</on-error-continue>
		</error-handler>
	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook batch payload split (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Batch Payload Split
 * Category: Real-World Mappings
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Split a large payload into smaller chunks for batch processing.
 * Many APIs and systems have payload size limits (e.g., Salesforce bulk API
 * accepts 10,000 records per batch, SAP IDoc has segment limits). This pattern
 * chunks an array into fixed-size batches for sequential or parallel processing.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "batchSize": 3,
 *   "records": [
 *     {
 *       "id": "R001",
 *       "name": "Alpha Corp",
 *       "action": "create"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "R002",
 *       "name": "Beta Inc",
 *       "action": "update"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "R003",
 *       "name": "Gamma LLC",
 *       "action": "create"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "R004",
 *       "name": "Delta Ltd",
 *       "action": "update"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "R005",
 *       "name": "Epsilon SA",
 *       "action": "delete"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "R006",
 *       "name": "Zeta GmbH",
 *       "action": "create"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "R007",
 *       "name": "Eta Corp",
 *       "action": "update"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "R008",
 *       "name": "Theta Inc",
 *       "action": "create"
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "totalRecords": 8,
 * "batchSize": 3,
 * "totalBatches": 3,
 * "batches": [
 * {"batchNumber": 1, "recordCount": 3, "records": [
 * {"id": "R001", "name": "Alice Chen", "action": "upsert"},
 * {"id": "R002", "name": "Bob Martinez", "action": "upsert"},
 * {"id": "R003", "name": "Carol Nguyen", "action": "upsert"}
 * ]},
 * {"batchNumber": 2, "recordCount": 3, "records": [
 * {"id": "R004", "name": "David Kim", "action": "insert"},
 * {"id": "R005", "name": "Elena Rossi", "action": "insert"},
 * {"id": "R006", "name": "Frank Wilson", "action": "update"}
 * ]},
 * {"batchNumber": 3, "recordCount": 2, "records": [
 * {"id": "R007", "name": "Grace Lee", "action": "upsert"},
 * {"id": "R008", "name": "Henry Park", "action": "insert"}
 * ]}
 * ]
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
import divideBy from dw::core::Arrays
output application/json

payload.records divideBy payload.batchSize map (batch, index) -> ({batchNumber: index + 1, recordCount: sizeOf(batch), records: batch})

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook pagination response (XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Pagination Response
 * Category: API Response Patterns
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Build a paginated API response with metadata and
 * navigation links. Standard pattern for any list-returning API endpoint.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "items": [
 *     {
 *       "id": "P1",
 *       "name": "Widget A",
 *       "price": 19.99
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "P2",
 *       "name": "Widget B",
 *       "price": 24.99
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "P3",
 *       "name": "Widget C",
 *       "price": 14.99
 *     }
 *   ],
 *   "queryParams": {
 *     "page": "2",
 *     "size": "3"
 *   },
 *   "totalCount": 15
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "data": [...],
 * "meta": {
 * "page": 2,
 * "pageSize": 10,
 * "totalRecords": 47,
 * "totalPages": 5,
 * "hasNext": true,
 * "hasPrevious": true
 * },
 * "links": {
 * "self": "/api/v1/orders?page=2&size=10",
 * "first": "/api/v1/orders?page=1&size=10",
 * "last": "/api/v1/orders?page=5&size=10",
 * "next": "/api/v1/orders?page=3&size=10",
 * "previous": "/api/v1/orders?page=1&size=10"
 * }
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var page = (payload.queryParams.page default "1") as Number
var pageSize = (payload.queryParams.size default "10") as Number
var totalRecords = payload.totalCount as Number
var totalPages = ceil(totalRecords / pageSize)
fun buildLink(p: Number): String = "/api/v1/products?page=$(p)&size=$(pageSize)"
---
{ data: payload.items, meta: { page: page, pageSize: pageSize, totalRecords: totalRecords, totalPages: totalPages, hasNext: page < totalPages, hasPrevious: page > 1 },
  links: { self: buildLink(page), first: buildLink(1), last: buildLink(totalPages), (next: buildLink(page + 1)) if page < totalPages, (previous: buildLink(page - 1)) if page > 1 } }

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for v csgOlisMacdAdd (mapping/transformation, filtering, aggregation, flattening nested data)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var quoteItems = vars.tmfResponse.quoteItem filter((item,index) -> lower(item.extendedParameters.orderType[0]) == "add")
fun extractTechCode(data)= flatten(data reduce ((item, accumulator=[]) -> accumulator + (read(item, 'application/json').code)))
fun extractRestrictQty(data)= flatten(data reduce ((item, accumulator=[]) -> accumulator + (read(item, 'application/json').restrictMultipleQuantity)))
---
if(!isEmpty(quoteItems))
flatten(
    quoteItems map (item) -> 
    if(Mule::p('salesforce.excludeProductsFromCSGSplit') contains item.productOffering.name)
    	item ++ {
	        	"macd" : true,
	        	"sfExternalId" : item.id ++ "_" ++ vars.oppData.opportunityId,
	        	"productItemType": "PRODUCT"
	        }
    else
	    if(!isEmpty(item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode) and (sizeOf(extractTechCode(item.extendedParameters.technicalServiceCode)) default 0) > 1)
	      ((item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode default []) map (bsc) -> item ++ {
	        source: "bsc",
	        sfExternalId : item.id ++ "_" ++ vars.oppData.opportunityId,
	        productName: item.productOffering.name,
	        parentId: item.parentQuoteItemId,
	        billServCode: bsc,
	        techServCode: extractTechCode(item.extendedParameters.technicalServiceCode) joinBy ",",
	        restrictQty:  extractRestrictQty(item.extendedParameters.technicalServiceCode)[0] as Boolean,
	        "productItemType": "PRODUCT"
	      }) ++
	      flatten((item.extendedParameters.technicalServiceCode default []) map (tsc) -> read(tsc,"application/json") map (tscc, index) -> item ++ {
	        source: "tsc",
	        sfExternalId : item.id ++ "_" ++ vars.oppData.opportunityId ++ "_" ++ tscc.code,
	        productName: item.productOffering.name,
	        parentId: item.parentQuoteItemId,
	        billServCode: null,
	        techServCode: tscc.code,
	        restrictQty: tscc.restrictMultipleQuantity as Boolean,
	        parentBsc: (item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode default[])[0],
	        csg:true
	      })
	      else
	        item ++ {
	        	"macd" : true,
	        	"sfExternalId" : item.id ++ "_" ++ vars.oppData.opportunityId,
	        	"productItemType": "PRODUCT"
	        }
)
else []

  "nullString" : isBlank(nullString),

  "notEmptyTextString" : not isBlank(" 1234"),
  "notEmptyTextStringTwo" : ! isBlank("")
}

		http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd">
		
	<flow name="post:\customers">
		
		<logger 
			level="INFO" 
			doc:name="Logger" 
			message='#[%dw 2.0
import * from dw::util::Values
output application/json
---
{
	message: "Create customer",
    payload: payload
		mask field("lastName") with "*****"
		mask field("address") with "*****"
		mask field("email") with "*****"  
}]'
			category="app"/>
			
		<set-variable 
			value='#[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
{
    "firstName": payload.firstName default "",
    "lastName": payload.lastName default ""
}]' 
			doc:name="OpenTelemetry Tags" 
			variableName="openTelemetryTags" />

		<ee:transform doc:name="assign variables" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
{
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="location" ><![CDATA[attributes.requestUri ++ "/"]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="firstName" ><![CDATA[payload.firstName]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="lastName" ><![CDATA[payload.lastName]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="payloadBackup" ><![CDATA[payload]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		
		<flow-ref 
			doc:name="Get Customer By FirstName and LastName" 
			name="queryCustomer"/>
					
		<choice doc:name="Customer Exist?" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload) == 0]">
				<flow-ref 
					doc:name="newCustomer" 
					name="newCustomer"/>
			</when>
			
			<otherwise >
				<logger 
					level="DEBUG" 
					doc:name="Logger"
					message="The customer already exists in the database"
					category="app"/>

				<ee:transform doc:name="response">
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
  message: "${messages.record-exists}"
}
]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>
					<ee:variables >
						<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA[409]]></ee:set-variable>
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
				
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
		<error-handler ref="global-error-handler" />		
		
	</flow>
	
	
	
	<sub-flow name="newCustomer">
		<logger 
			level="DEBUG" 
			doc:name="Logger" 
			message="The customer is going to be created" 
			category="app"/>

		<ee:transform doc:name="Insert Payload" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
[
	vars.payloadBackup mapObject ((value, key, index) -> 
        ((key as String) ++ "__c") : value
    )
]]]>
				</ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<logger 
			level="DEBUG" 
			doc:name="Logger" 
			message="#[output application/java --- payload]" category="app"/>

		<salesforce:create 
			type="Customer__c" 
			doc:name="Create Customer" 
			config-ref="GlobalSalesforceConfig"/>

		<logger 
			level="DEBUG" 
			doc:name="Logger" 
			message="#[output application/json --- payload]" 
			category="app"/>

		<choice doc:name="verify success" >
			<when expression="#[payload.successful == true]">
				<logger 
					level="DEBUG" 
					doc:name="Logger"  
					message="#['Record created successfully with id=' ++ payload.items[0].id]" 
					category="app"/>

				<ee:transform doc:name="headers and response" >
					<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
  message: "${messages.record-create-success}"
}]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>

					<ee:variables >
						<ee:set-variable 
							variableName="outboundHeaders" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
{"Location": 
	( (vars.location as String)
		++ (payload.items[0].id as String)
	)
}]]></ee:set-variable>
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
			</when>

			<otherwise >
				<logger 
					level="DEBUG" 
					doc:name="Logger"
					message="The customer couldn't be created" 
					category="app"/>
				
				<ee:transform doc:name="Status 500 Response" >
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
  message: "${messages.record-create-error}"
}]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>

					<ee:variables >
						<ee:set-variable 
							variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA["500"]]></ee:set-variable>
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
	</sub-flow>

</mule>

instruction: The **sf-eom-attachment-papi** (Salesforce EOM Attachment Process API) is a MuleSoft Process API that provides a unified interface for managing file a using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /${api.name}/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd">
	<flow name="sf-eom-attachment-papi-main">
        <http:listener path="/${api.name}/*" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
<ee:transform doc:name="Set ID" doc:id="8df4505a-2961-4114-8599-b305bd455b55" >
			<ee:message >
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="idType" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
import * from dw::core::Strings
---
if(substringBeforeLast(attributes.maskedRequestPath,"/") == "/attachments/attachment")
"Attachment ID"
else if(substringBeforeLast(attributes.maskedRequestPath,"/") == "/attachments")
"Parent ID"
else
"Parent ID/Attachment ID"]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="version" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
import * from dw::core::Strings
var path =attributes.maskedRequestPath
---
if((substringBefore((substringAfterLast(path,"api/")), "/")) default "" startsWith("v")) 
(substringBefore((substringAfterLast(path,"api/")), "/")) default ""
else 
""]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
        <apikit:router config-ref="sf-eom-attachment-papi-config"/>
		<error-handler >
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="38733542-912c-4309-bca9-8514a7b23c6f" >
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="9639ab72-d163-4c8a-87dd-977c90b6e9ee" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config"/>
				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set Http Status Code" doc:id="9cfab8e1-ff28-483e-9f85-d7ca2a48023f" variableName="httpStatus" />
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log APIkit error response" doc:id="bbe0020b-4a83-4cf3-921c-b77a7bd9f98e" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Error response from APIkit router" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR"/>
			</on-error-propagate>
		</error-handler>
		    </flow>
    <flow name="sf-eom-attachment-papi-console">
        <http:listener path="/${api.name}/console/*" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="sf-eom-attachment-papi-config"/>
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Console error">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\health-check:sf-eom-attachment-papi-config">
        <ee:transform doc:name="Health-Check Response">
            <ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/HealthCheck_Response.dwl" />
            </ee:message>
        </ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log Health-Check Response" doc:id="b2715556-074e-4183-8eb6-e00957fb2251" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Health-Check Response" tracePoint="END"/>
    </flow>
</mule>

instruction: The **SF SPC BSS Refresh PAPI** (Process API) orchestrates the refresh of Billing Service Snapshot (BSS) data in Salesforce by pulling current service using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">
<sub-flow name="final-response-subFlow" doc:id="d4cc29f7-4bc5-48c8-9fd0-ded46172787f">
		<ee:transform doc:name="vars.errors" doc:id="5a54060e-294c-4bef-91b1-572a88e31797" >
			<ee:message >
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="errors" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
var includeParams = vars.sfdc.retrieveParameters default false
---
(((vars.upsertBSSResponse.items filter($.payload.errors != []))..payload.errors[0].message default []) joinBy ',' ) ++ 

if (includeParams ) (((vars.upsertBSSParamsResponse.items filter($.payload.errors != []))..payload.errors[0].message default []) joinBy ',') else ""]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Errors" doc:id="785abba0-6597-4818-ab0d-b874bd7682ba" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Errors">
			<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
vars.errors]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Extract upserted ids" doc:id="ccfc4788-47ba-482b-a452-7946d532a2b8" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	"upsertedBssIds":(vars.upsertBSSResponse[0].items filter $.successful).id,
	"upsertedBssParamsIds": (vars.upsertBSSParamsResponse[0].items filter $.successful).id,
	"disconnectedBssRecords" : vars.disconnectedBssRecords default "",
	"disconnectedBssParamsRecords": vars.disconnectedBssParamsRecords default ""
	
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<choice doc:name="Check If there are any errors in BSS upsert" doc:id="0a1a1c4b-f173-4f45-8acc-421b8453e5c8">
			<when expression="#[isEmpty(vars.errors)]">
				<ee:transform doc:name="Build  BSS Refresh Success Response" doc:id="d71ff143-49b6-4890-a0bf-134f08dc8871" >
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl\p_finalSuccessResponse.dwl" />
					
</ee:message>
				</ee:transform>
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Errors in Upsert BSS" doc:id="0d627344-f49b-4fc4-9507-267a2d0528dc" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Errors in Upsert BSS">
					<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
vars.errors]]]></json-logger:content>
				</json-logger:logger>
				<ee:transform doc:name="Build BSS Refresh Failure Response" doc:id="0e54b010-aa68-455a-bca9-a858db3eb794" >
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl\p_finalFailureResponse.dwl" />
					
</ee:message>
					<ee:variables >
						<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA["400"]]></ee:set-variable>
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
	</sub-flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook zip arrays (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Zip Arrays
 * Category: Array Manipulation
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Combine two arrays element-wise into an array of pairs (or merged
 * objects). Use when you have parallel arrays — e.g., a list of header names and
 * a list of values, or matched records from two systems that need to be joined
 * by position.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "names": [
 *     "Alice",
 *     "Bob",
 *     "Carol"
 *   ],
 *   "scores": [
 *     92,
 *     87,
 *     95
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * {"productName": "Mechanical Keyboard", "sku": "SKU-100", "price": 149.99, "inStock": true},
 * {"productName": "Wireless Mouse", "sku": "SKU-400", "price": 29.99, "inStock": true},
 * {"productName": "USB-C Hub", "sku": "SKU-300", "price": 49.99, "inStock": false}
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var pairs = payload.names zip payload.scores
---
pairs map (pair) -> ({name: pair[0], score: pair[1]})

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for v Received Service Request (mapping/transformation, filtering)
output:
%dw 2.0

output application/java  
---
{
  NtlSalesICOMSWorkOrderParams: {
    Service_Request__c: {
      Id: payload.Id,
      Service_Request_Number__c: payload.Service_Request_Number__c,
      Product_Family__c: payload.Product_Family__c default "",
      (Service_Active_Date__c: payload.Service_Active_Date__c) if(vars.serviceRequestOrderType != "Disconnect"),
      (Service_Active_Date__c: 
        if (payload.Customer_Requested_Due_Date__c == null or payload.Service_Request_Order_Type__c == "Conversion Disconnect")
          payload.Scheduled_Disconnect_Date__c
        else
          payload.Customer_Requested_Due_Date__c) if (vars.serviceRequestOrderType == "Disconnect"),
      Opportunity_Service_Location__c: payload.Opportunity_Service_Location__c,
      Service_Request_Order_Type__c: payload.Service_Request_Order_Type__c,
      Bill_System_Work_Order_Number__c: payload.Bill_System_Work_Order_Number__c,
      Service_Location__r: {
        Id: payload.Service_Location__r.Id,
        ParentId: payload.Service_Location__r.ParentId,
        ShippingStreet: payload.Service_Location__r.ShippingStreet,
        ShippingCity: payload.Service_Location__r.ShippingCity,
        ShippingState: payload.Service_Location__r.ShippingState,
        ShippingPostalCode: payload.Service_Location__r.ShippingPostalCode,
        Unit__c: payload.Service_Location__r.Unit__c,
        Ntl_Sales_ICOMS_Account_Number__c: 
          if ( payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_ICOMS_Account_Number__c != null)
            payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_ICOMS_Account_Number__c
          else
            vars.ntlSalesICOMSAccNumber,
        Ntl_Sales_Business_Name__c: payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Business_Name__c,
        Ntl_Sales_Enduser_ID__c: payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Enduser_ID__c,
        Ntl_Sales_Location_Primary_Contact__c: payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Location_Primary_Contact__c,
        Ntl_Sales_Bill_With_Account_Number__c: 
          if ( vars.NtlSalesBillWithAccountNumber != null and vars.callingFlow == "New Install")
            vars.NtlSalesBillWithAccountNumber.Ntl_Sales_Bill_With_Account_Number__c
          else
            vars.serviceLocationParent.Ntl_Sales_Bill_With_Account_Number__c,
        Ntl_Sales_Business_Location__c: payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Business_Location__c,
        Ntl_Sales_Tax_Exempt_Flag__c: payload.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Tax_Exempt_Flag__c,
        Ntl_Sales_Agent_Commission__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.Ntl_Sales_Agent_Commission__c,
        ICOMS_Bill_Type__c: payload.Service_Location__r.ICOMS_Bill_Type__c,
        Service_Location_Parent: {
          Ntl_Sales_Parent_Business_Id__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.Ntl_Sales_Parent_Business_ID__c,
          Ntl_Sales_Parent_Business_Location__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.Ntl_Sales_Parent_Business_Location__c,
          Ntl_Sales_Account_Type__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.Ntl_Sales_Account_Type__c,
          Ntl_Sales_Invoice_Presentation__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.Ntl_Sales_Invoice_Presentation__c,
          ParentId: vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.ParentId,
          ICOMS_Bill_Type__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.ICOMS_Bill_Type__c,
          Ntl_Sales_Hierarchy_Flag__c: vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.Ntl_Sales_Hierarchy_Flag__c
        }
      },
      Opportunity_Products__r: 
        if ( payload.Opportunity_Products__r != null)
          [
            (payload.Opportunity_Products__r filter ( $.Ntl_ICOMS_Service_Code__c != null) map {
              OpportunityLineItem: {
                Id: $.Id,
                Quantity: $.Quantity,
                Service_Code__c: $.Service_Code__c,
                Service_Code_Old__c: $.Service_Code_Old__c,
                Order_Type__c: $.Order_Type__c,
                Service_Occurance__c: $.Service_Occurance__c,
                Ntl_ICOMS_Service_Code__c: $.Ntl_ICOMS_Service_Code__c,
                ProductCode: $.ProductCode,
                Does_Product_Have_Rev_Schedule__c: $.Does_Product_Have_Rev_Schedule__c,
                Revenue_Schedule_Rollup_Key__c: $.Revenue_Schedule_Rollup_Key__c,
                TotalPrice: $.TotalPrice,
                UnitPrice: $.Billing_Price__c,
                ListPrice: $.ListPrice,
                Product_Revenue_Catagory__c: $.Product_Revenue_Catagory__c,
                Is_Core_Product__c: $.Is_Core_Product__c
              }
            })
          ]
        else
          []
    },
    AttachToHierarchy: if (vars.callingFlow == "New Install") true else false,
    NtlSalesICOMSAccountNumber: if (vars.callingFlow == "New Install") vars.Ntl_Sales_ICOMS_Account_Number else vars.ntlSalesICOMSAccNumber,
    NtlSalesParentBusinessId: if (vars.callingFlow == "New Install") vars.NtlSalesParentBusinessId else vars.serviceLocationParent.Parent.Ntl_Sales_Parent_Business_ID__c,
    NtlSalesParentBusinessLocation: vars.NtlSalesBusinessLocation default "",
    OperationCode: "",
    (OperationCode: p('CONST.Operation.CD.NewInstall')) if (vars.serviceRequestOrderType == "New Install" or vars.serviceRequestOrderType == "Add"),
    (OperationCode: p('CONST.Operation.CD.Discontinue')) if (vars.serviceRequestOrderType == "Disconnect"),
    SendToBilling: true
  }
}

instruction: The Enterprise EOM HouseKey Process API (PAPI) automates the creation and management of **House Keys** — unique location identifiers in the CSG (Cable using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /${api.name}/api/${api.version}/console/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:vm="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/vm" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/vm http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/vm/current/mule-vm.xsd">
    
    
	<flow name="enterprise-mule-eom-housekey-papi-main">
        <!-- <http:listener config-ref="enterprise-mule-eom-housekey-papi-httpListenerConfig" path="${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*"> -->
       <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:router config-ref="enterprise-mule-eom-housekey-papi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_IMPLEMENTED">
                <error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="ce24aa5e-7687-4e41-bdd5-4c6c9cbfa9da" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config"/>
				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set HTTP Status Code" doc:id="d2c877bd-b5d3-4ec2-9c03-644546cdb2e6" variableName="httpStatus"/>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger" doc:id="33753d24-bb89-4b83-8ba3-a212284d18d8" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After Receiving Error"/>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="enterprise-mule-eom-housekey-papi-console">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/console/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="enterprise-mule-eom-housekey-papi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>

            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>

    <flow name="get:\health-check:enterprise-mule-eom-housekey-papi-config">

                <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: p any error
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json

fun extractErrorDetails(err) =
    {
        code: if (isEmpty(err.muleMessage.attributes.StatusCode))
                p("error.internalservercode")
              else
                err.muleMessage.attributes.StatusCode,
        reason: err.errorType.asString,
       message: 
           if (err.description != null) err.description 
           else err.cause.localizedMessage
    }

---
{
    "success": false,
    "apiName": p("api.name"),
    "version": p("api.version"),
    "correlationId": correlationId,
    "timestamp": now(),
    "erorDetails": [
        if (error.suppressedErrors[0] != null) 
            extractErrorDetails(error.suppressedErrors[0])
        else 
            extractErrorDetails(error)
    ]
}

instruction: The **SF Pega IRR Sync App** is a real-time event-driven integration service that synchronizes Salesforce **IRR (Incentive/Reimbursement Request)** re using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, HTTP Request
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:validation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:kafka="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka/current/mule-kafka.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation/current/mule-validation.xsd">
	<flow name="sf-pega-irr-sync-appFlow" doc:id="a05ba75a-bd7b-4b7e-ab79-f968156b2494" >
		<kafka:message-listener doc:id="a3ef1f07-465b-4184-9d1b-dfc35d675b60" config-ref="Apache_Kafka_Consumer_configuration" ackMode="IMMEDIATE" parallelConsumersAmount="${kafka.consumers}" doc:name="Consume messages from IRR kafka topic" />
		<set-payload value="#[payload]" doc:name="Changing Payload to JSON" doc:id="1c2c6e77-31fe-45e0-82a9-20efea19955e" mimeType="application/json" />
		<json-logger:logger doc:id="65016210-85d3-4286-818c-85307c0f3d47" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Received Message from IRR object topic" doc:name="Log irr payload" >
			<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[output application/json ---
{
    payload:(payload) 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<choice doc:name="Check if Payload is Valid" doc:id="bebfcde5-9e2b-4e36-b61b-e6892ece80c6" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload) > 0]" >
				<flow-ref doc:name="token_flow" doc:id="70c6d5e1-f14e-4a44-ad16-d2a9e7356f5c" name="token_flow" />
				<choice doc:name="Check if access token is Valid" doc:id="70622c2e-6aa1-4806-84c4-8a8d50e5d2f7" >
					<when expression="#[vars.token.access_token != null]" >
						<http:request method="POST" doc:name="Request to pega" doc:id="a4477a49-cc24-4506-adf0-4d0ebab6b5d3" config-ref="HTTP_Request_configuration-NEOS" path="${pega.resource}">
							<http:headers ><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"Authorization" : "Bearer " ++ vars.token.access_token 
}]]]></http:headers>
						</http:request>
						<json-logger:logger doc:id="80a3cb7f-b953-4444-a282-bb205a72aba8" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After Sending IRR object Message successfully to PEGA" tracePoint="END" doc:name="Success Logger" />
					</when>
					<otherwise >
						<ee:transform doc:name="Error details" doc:id="1626e407-1cd6-4aeb-bb2d-d9c42a912740" >
							<ee:message >
								<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/failure_response.dwl" />
							</ee:message>
							<ee:variables >
								<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
p('error.badrequestcode')]]></ee:set-variable>
							</ee:variables>
						</ee:transform>
						<json-logger:logger doc:id="d8f40335-873a-4315-b0ae-ee0b063245e2" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Invalid token error message" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" doc:name="Log invalid token message" />
					</otherwise>
				</choice>
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<json-logger:logger doc:id="b40aa625-21c2-42d3-b119-0451e4343ae3" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Getting Empty payload of IRR object from SFDC" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="WARN" doc:name="log the empty payload" />
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
		<error-handler ref="global_error_handler"/>
	</flow>
</mule>

Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook soap envelope builder (XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: SOAP Envelope Builder
 * Category: XML Handling
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Build a complete SOAP 1.1 or 1.2 request envelope from
 * JSON data. Includes headers (authentication, addressing), body with
 * namespaced elements, and proper attribute handling.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "credentials": {
 *     "username": "admin",
 *     "password": "secret"
 *   },
 *   "body": {
 *     "orderId": "ORD-001",
 *     "customer": "Acme Corp"
 *   }
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/xml):
 * <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"
 * xmlns:ord="http://example.com/orders">
 * <soap:Header>
 * <wsse:Security xmlns:wsse="...">
 * <wsse:UsernameToken>
 * <wsse:Username>apiUser</wsse:Username>
 * <wsse:Password>apiPass</wsse:Password>
 * </wsse:UsernameToken>
 * </wsse:Security>
 * </soap:Header>
 * <soap:Body>
 * <ord:CreateOrder>
 * <ord:OrderId>ORD-001</ord:OrderId>
 * ...
 * </ord:CreateOrder>
 * </soap:Body>
 * </soap:Envelope>
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/xml writeDeclaration=true, indent=true
ns soap http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/
ns wsse http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd
ns ord http://example.com/orders
---
soap#Envelope: { soap#Header: { wsse#Security: { wsse#UsernameToken: { wsse#Username: payload.credentials.username, wsse#Password: payload.credentials.password } } }, soap#Body: { ord#CreateOrder: { ord#OrderId: payload.body.orderId } } }

import * from dw::core::Strings
---
vars.servicerequestvar map ((sritem, srindex) -> if(sritem.Offer__r.Product__r.Pega_Product_Name__c != null) {

    "Id": sritem.Service_Request__c ,
    "serviceRequestNumber": sritem.Service_Request__r.Service_Request_ID__c ,
     "serviceLocationId": sritem.Service_Request__r.Service_Location__c,
     "serviceRequestStage": sritem.Service_Request__r.Service_Request_Stage__c ,
     "region": sritem.Service_Request__r.Spectrum_Region__c,
      //"requestingRegion": sritem.Service_Request__r.Requesting_Region__c,
     "businessUnit": sritem.Service_Request__r.Billing_Account__r.ROE_Sales_Channel__c,
     "productFamily": sritem.Service_Request__r.Product_Family__c,
      "serviceCategory": sritem.Offer__r.Product__r.Pega_Product_Name__c , 
      "orderType": sritem.Service_Request__r.Service_Request_Order_Type__c ,
    "changeReason": sritem.Service_Request__r.Change_Reason__c,
    "fiberBuildingServiceabilityStatus": sritem.Service_Request__r.Fiber_Building_Serviceability_Status__c,
    "mtuAggSwitch": sritem.Service_Request__r.Service_Location__r.Location__r.MTU_Agg_Switch__c,
    "constructionJob": sritem.Service_Request__r.Construction_Job__c,
    "customerType": sritem.Service_Request__r.Customer_Type__c,
    "inNeos": sritem.Service_Request__r.NEOS__c,
    "recordTypeId": sritem.Service_Request__r.RecordTypeId ,
    "recordTypeName": sritem.Service_Request__r.RecordTypeName__c,
    "productTypes":
   if(vars.labelvar != null  ) (((flatten((vars.labelvar filter ((filteritem, filterindex) -> filteritem.label == sritem.Offer__r.Product__r.Pega_Product_Name__c)).values) ) map ((mapitem, mapindex) -> {
        ("key": camelize(mapitem.value replace  " " with ("_"))) if(mapitem.value != null) ,
        ("value": sritem.Offer__r.Product__r[p("product.attribute"++ (mapindex+1 as String))]) if(mapitem.value != null)
    } ))-{}) 
    else([]),
    "engineering": (vars.engVar map ((engitem, engindex) -> if( engitem.Service_Request__c == sritem.Service_Request__c ) {
                   "Id":  engitem.Id ,
                 "complex": engitem.Complex__c
             }
             else{})) - {}
 }
else{
    "Id": sritem.Service_Request__c ,
    "serviceRequestNumber": sritem.Service_Request__r.Service_Request_ID__c ,
     "serviceLocationId": sritem.Service_Request__r.Service_Location__c,

     "businessUnit": sritem.Service_Request__r.Billing_Account__r.ROE_Sales_Channel__c,
     "productFamily": sritem.Service_Request__r.Product_Family__c,
     "serviceCategory": sritem.Offer__r.Product__r.Pega_Product_Name__c ,
     "orderType": sritem.Service_Request__r.Service_Request_Order_Type__c ,
    "changeReason": sritem.Service_Request__r.Change_Reason__c,
    "fiberBuildingServiceabilityStatus": sritem.Service_Request__r.Fiber_Building_Serviceability_Status__c,
    "mtuAggSwitch": sritem.Service_Request__r.Service_Location__r.Location__r.MTU_Agg_Switch__c,
    "constructionJob": sritem.Service_Request__r.Construction_Job__c, 
    "customerType": sritem.Service_Request__r.Customer_Type__c, 
    "inNeos": sritem.Service_Request__r.NEOS__c,
    "recordTypeId": sritem.Service_Request__r.RecordTypeName__c ,
    "recordTypeName": sritem.Service_Request__r.RecordTypeId ,
    "productTypes": [],
    "engineering": (vars.engVar map ((engitem, engindex) -> if( engitem.Service_Request__c == sritem.Service_Request__c ) {
                   "Id":  engitem.Id ,
                 "complex": engitem.Complex__c
             }
             else{})) - {}

})

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for CustomFunctions (mapping/transformation)
output:
%dw 2.0
fun assignPicValues(networkRouting) = if ( networkRouting == "BHN" ) Mule::p('constants.networkRouting.bhn') 
else if ( networkRouting == "Charter" ) Mule::p('constants.networkRouting.charter')
else if ( networkRouting == "TWC-GIA" ) Mule::p('constants.networkRouting.twc')
else if ( networkRouting == "BW.com" ) Mule::p('constants.networkRouting.bw')
else Mule::p('constants.networkRouting.bhn')

fun assignPicValuesInternational(networkRouting) = if ( networkRouting == "BHN" ) Mule::p('constants.networkRouting.bhn') 
else if ( networkRouting == "Charter" ) Mule::p('constants.networkRouting.charter')
else if ( networkRouting == "TWC-GIA" ) Mule::p('constants.networkRouting.bwInternational')
else if ( networkRouting == "BW.com" ) Mule::p('constants.networkRouting.bwInternational')
else Mule::p('constants.networkRouting.bhn')

fun sfAddressMap(address, srId, spidAtn) = {
	Street_Number_Prefix__c: address.Street_Number_Prefix__c,
	Street_Number__c: address.Street_Number__c,
	Street_Number_Suffix__c: address.Street_Number_Suffix__c,
	Street_Directional_Prefix__c: address.Street_Directional_Prefix__c,
	Street_Name__c: address.Street_Name__c,
	Street_Thoroughfare__c: address.Street_Thoroughfare__c,
	Street_Directional_Suffix__c: address.Street_Directional_Suffix__c,
	Location_Designator_1__c: address.Location_Designator_1__c,
	Location_Value_1__c: address.Location_Value_1__c,
	Location_Designator_2__c: address.Location_Designator_2__c,
	Location_Value_2__c: address.Location_Value_2__c,
	Location_Designator_3__c: address.Location_Designator_3__c,
	Location_Value_3__c: address.Location_Value_3__c,
	City__c: address.City__c,
	State__c: address.State__c,
	Zip_Code__c: address.Zip_Code__c,
	Address_Type__c: Mule::p('constants.address.addressType'),
	Service_Request__c: srId,
	Name: spidAtn
}
fun addressMap(address, srId, spidAtn) = {
	Street_Number_Prefix__c: address.Street_Number_Prefix__c,
	Street_Number__c: address.Street_Number__c,
	Street_Number_Suffix__c: address.Street_Number_Suffix__c,
	Street_Directional_Prefix__c: address.Street_Directional_Prefix__c,
	Street_Name__c: address.Street_Name__c,
	Street_Thoroughfare__c: address.Street_Thoroughfare__c,
	Street_Directional_Suffix__c: address.Street_Directional_Suffix__c,
	Location_Designator_1__c: address.Location_Designator_1__c,
	Location_Value_1__c: address.Location_Value_1__c,
	Location_Designator_2__c: address.Location_Designator_2__c,
	Location_Value_2__c: address.Location_Value_2__c,
	Location_Designator_3__c: address.Location_Designator_3__c,
	Location_Value_3__c: address.Location_Value_3__c,
	City__c: if (address.City__c != null and address.City__c != "") address.City__c else address.ShippingCity,
	State__c: if(address.State__c != null and address.State__c != "") address.State__c else address.ShippingState,
	Zip_Code__c: if(address.Zip_Code__c != null and address.Zip_Code__c != "") address.Zip_Code__c else address.ShippingPostalCode
}

fun carrierInfoUpdate(carrierInfoId, typeOfServ, lcCsrAddId, endUserList) = {
	Id: carrierInfoId,
	Authorization_Date__c: now() as Date,
	Type_of_Service__c: typeOfServ,
	Losing_Carrier_CSR_Address__c: lcCsrAddId,
	End_User_Moving_Indicator__c: true as Boolean,
	CSR_Name__c: endUserList."End User Name(EUN)",

	CurrentTelcoAccountNo__c: endUserList."Account Number(AN)"
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook json to xml (mapping/transformation, XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: JSON to XML Conversion
 * Category: XML Handling
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Convert a JSON payload to well-formed XML with elements and
 * attributes. Required when calling SOAP services, generating B2B documents,
 * or feeding data into legacy systems that only accept XML.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "order": {
 *     "orderId": "ORD-2026-1587",
 *     "orderDate": "2026-02-15",
 *     "customer": {
 *       "name": "Acme Corp",
 *       "accountId": "ACCT-5001"
 *     },
 *     "items": [
 *       {
 *         "sku": "SKU-100",
 *         "desc": "Keyboard",
 *         "qty": 5,
 *         "price": 149.99
 *       },
 *       {
 *         "sku": "SKU-400",
 *         "desc": "Mouse",
 *         "qty": 10,
 *         "price": 29.99
 *       }
 *     ]
 *   }
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/xml):
 * <?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?>
 * <PurchaseOrder orderId="ORD-2026-1587" orderDate="2026-02-15">
 * <Customer name="Acme Corporation" accountId="ACCT-5001"/>
 * <Items>
 * <Item sku="SKU-100" quantity="5">
 * <Description>Mechanical Keyboard</Description>
 * <UnitPrice>149.99</UnitPrice>
 * </Item>
 * <Item sku="SKU-400" quantity="10">
 * <Description>Wireless Mouse</Description>
 * <UnitPrice>29.99</UnitPrice>
 * </Item>
 * </Items>
 * </PurchaseOrder>
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/xml
---
{
  PurchaseOrder @(orderId: payload.order.orderId, orderDate: payload.order.orderDate): {
    Customer @(name: payload.order.customer.name, accountId: payload.order.customer.accountId): null,
    Items: { (payload.order.items map (item) -> ({
      Item @(sku: item.sku, quantity: item.qty): {
        Description: item.desc,
        UnitPrice: item.price
      })
    }) }
  }
}

            "reason": if(!isEmpty(error.muleMessage.typedValue.errorDetails[0].reason)) error.muleMessage.typedValue.errorDetails[0].reason else error.errorType.asString ,
            "message":if(!isEmpty(error.muleMessage.typedValue.errorDetails[0].message)) error.muleMessage.typedValue.errorDetails[0].message else error.detailedDescription
        }
    ]
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p MAC0003Request (XML handling)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/xml  
var parsedAddress = vars.Parsed_Address.addressCandidateListFromGeocoder.addressCandidate
var splitCDF = (vars.CDFTranslatedValue default "") splitBy "-"
---
{
  ICOMS @(ENVIRONMENT: p("default.Icoms.API.Environment"), PASSWORD: p("secure::default.Icoms.Password"), USERID: p("default.ICOMS.Username"), KEY: p("default.ICOMS.API.Key")): {
    MAC00003: 
      {
        SITEID: p('default.Icoms.SiteID'),
        LOCATION: if ((parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") != "PO BOX") (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressNumber default "") else "",
        FRACTION: if ((parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") != "PO BOX") (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressFraction default "") else "",
        PREDIR:  if ((parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") != "PO BOX") (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressPreDirectional default "") else "",
        STREET: if (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain != "PO BOX") 
		( 
			if( ( (sizeOf(parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain) default 0) + (sizeOf(parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressPostThoroughfare)  default 0) ) > 24) 				    
				( ( (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") ++ " " ++ (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressPostThoroughfare default "") )[0 to 24] )
			else( (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") ++ " " ++ (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressPostThoroughfare default "")  )
		)
        else (parsedAddress.address default "") ,
        POSTDIR: if ((parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") != "PO BOX") (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressPostDirectional default "") else "",
        APARTMNT:if ((parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") != "PO BOX") vars.serviceRequest.Service_Location__r.Unit__c default "" else "",
        CITY: parsedAddress.city,
        STATE: parsedAddress.state,
        ZIP: parsedAddress.zipCode,
        COMPANY: if (((sizeOf(splitCDF)) == 3)) (splitCDF[0] as Number) as String else "",
        DIVISION: if (((sizeOf(splitCDF)) == 3)) (splitCDF[1] as Number) as String else "",
        FRANCHISE: if (((sizeOf(splitCDF)) == 3)) (splitCDF[2] as Number) as String else "",
        DWELLING: "B",
        BILLTYPE: "C",
        TARCODE: vars.TAR_Code,
        SIGACCESS: "U",
        HEADEND: "01",
        ADDRESSABLE: "N",
        PREWIRED: "Y"
      }
  }
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: v taxExemption
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json

// return N if TE is blank, N, or any non-standard value
// this represent non-exempt
var te_valid = if ([

  "J = C & M",

 "C = County or Local",

 "I = S & M",

 "K = F & M",

 "F = Federal",

 "E = F & S & M",

 "H = S & C",

 "P = S & C & M",

 "L = Letter on File",

 "M = Municipal",

 "A = F & S",

 "B = F & C",

 "D = F & S & C",

 "G = F & S & C & M",

 "S = State/Province"

] contains vars.serviceRequest.Service_Location__r.ASR_Tax_Exemption__c ) "Y" else "N"

 
var te_code = if (te_valid == "N") ""

                 else (if (vars.serviceRequest.Service_Location__r.Federal_Universal_Svc_Fund__c == "E = Exempt") "RESLE" else "RESL2" )

---

if ( ! (isEmpty(te_code))) vars.serviceRequest.Service_Location__r.ShippingState ++ te_code  else ""

instruction: using DataWeave Transform, Database Select
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
      xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
      xmlns:db="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db"
      xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
      xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
      xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
                          http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db/current/mule-db.xsd
                          http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd">

    <sub-flow name="get-all-tasks-flow" doc:id="6fdbaf16-63a8-4a6f-838f-802efd09e317">
        <logger level="INFO" doc:name="Start - Get All Tasks" message="Starting get all tasks flow with query params: #[attributes.queryParams]"/>
        <!-- Execute query with parameterized where clause -->
        <ee:transform doc:name="Prepare Query Parameters">
            <ee:message />
            <ee:variables>
                <ee:set-variable variableName="queryParams"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
var completedParam = attributes.queryParams.completed
var dueDateParam = attributes.queryParams.dueDate
---
{
    completed: if (completedParam != null) completedParam else null,
    dueDate: if (dueDateParam != null) dueDateParam else null
}]]></ee:set-variable>
                <ee:set-variable variableName="sqlQuery"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
var completedParam = attributes.queryParams.completed
var dueDateParam = attributes.queryParams.dueDate
var conditions = []

var withCompleted = if (completedParam != null) 
    conditions + "completed = :completed"
else 
    conditions
    
var withDueDate = if (dueDateParam != null)
    withCompleted + "due_date = :dueDate"
else 
    withCompleted

var whereClauseStr = if (sizeOf(withDueDate) > 0) 
    " WHERE " ++ (withDueDate joinBy " AND ")
else 
    ""
---
"SELECT id, title, description, dueDate, completed FROM tasks" ++ whereClauseStr]]></ee:set-variable>
            </ee:variables>
        </ee:transform>
        
        <db:select doc:name="Select Tasks" config-ref="mysql-db-config">
            <db:sql><![CDATA[#[vars.sqlQuery]]]></db:sql>
            <db:input-parameters><![CDATA[#[vars.queryParams]]]></db:input-parameters>
        </db:select>
        
        <!-- Transform database result to API response format -->
        <ee:transform doc:name="Transform to API Response">
            <ee:message>
                <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload map {
    id: $.id as String,
    title: $.title,
    description: $.description,
    dueDate: $.dueDate,
    completed: $.completed
}]]></ee:set-payload>
            </ee:message>
        </ee:transform>
        
        <logger level="INFO" doc:name="End - Get All Tasks" message="Completed get all tasks flow, returning #[sizeOf(payload)] tasks"/>
    </sub-flow>
    
</mule>

        <http:listener config-ref="todo-task-api-httpListenerConfig" path="/api/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body>#[payload]</http:body>
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:router config-ref="todo-task-api-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:BAD_REQUEST">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload>
                            <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Bad request"}]]>
                        </ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">400</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload>
                            <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]>
                        </ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload>
                            <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Method not allowed"}]]>
                        </ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">405</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_ACCEPTABLE">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload>
                            <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Not acceptable"}]]>
                        </ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">406</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload>
                            <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Unsupported media type"}]]>
                        </ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">415</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_IMPLEMENTED">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload>
                            <![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Not Implemented"}]]>
                        </ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">501</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="put:\tasks\(taskId):application\json:todo-task-api-config">
        <flow-ref name="update-task-by-id-subflow" />
    </flow>
    <flow name="delete:\tasks\(taskId):todo-task-api-config">

    <flow name="get:\tasks:todo-task-api-config">

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p MAC00054RequestSecond (XML handling)
Write a DataWeave transformation for v compositeRequest (mapping/transformation)
Write a DataWeave transformation for jpontdia micorp customer sapi soql (filtering)
output:
%dw 2.0
/**
* Generates a string parameter for the WHEN clause in SOQL
*
* === Parameters
*
* [%header, cols="1,1,3"]
* |===
* | Name | Type | Description
* | `field` | String | Name of the field parameter
* | `value` | String | Value
* |===
*
* === Example
*
* stringParameter("firstName__c", "Joe")
*
* ==== Source
*
* [source,DataWeave,linenums]
* ----
* %dw 2.0
* output application/json
* var firstName = "Joaquin"
* ---
* 
* stringParameter("firstName__c", firstName))
* ----
*
* ==== Output
*
* [source,Json,linenums]
* ----
* firstName__c ='Joaquin'
* ----
*
*/
fun stringParameter(field, value) =
    if (value != null) field ++ " ='" ++ value ++ "'" else null

fun soqlBuilder(sqlFilter, connector, parameter) =
  if (parameter != null)
    (
        if (sqlFilter == "") " WHERE " ++ parameter
        else sqlFilter ++ " " ++ connector ++ " " ++ parameter
    )
  else
    sqlFilter

output:

<mule xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
	xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd">
	<flow name="dataweave-class6Flow2" doc:id="da62d3e2-b5db-4283-b735-cd1a407e13ca" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="How many distinct OrderIDs do we have in the order_details W3Schools data?" doc:id="8069de9e-71aa-42e1-9690-7af8e60105d6" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
var unique_orderIds = payload distinctBy $.OrderID
---
sizeOf(unique_orderIds)]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="dataweave-class6Flow3" doc:id="5520a13b-dc6c-470e-993c-e78acabd3771" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="from the employees data in the w3shools data, find the oldest and the youngest employees" doc:id="0859a7aa-6f99-4f56-a924-47b8efca9589" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json

var oldest = payload minBy $.BirthDate
var youngest = payload maxBy $.BirthDate
---

{
	oldest: oldest,
	youngest: youngest
}


]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="dataweave-class6Flow" doc:id="bc3a4ebc-a4ea-4406-90b7-ab7f888daacc" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="find the count of airports by time zone" doc:id="e7060721-2a3b-4752-a0a6-20ec9eae9603" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
(payload groupBy $.tzone) mapObject (value, key, index) -> {(key):sizeOf(value)}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="dataweave-class6Flow1" doc:id="5270a27b-f8f9-418c-8971-bcf4e779a106" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="which products are ordered most frequently and which product are ordered the least" doc:id="b580d9df-c923-445e-a285-04b9ec7e4286" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
var freq = (payload groupBy $.ProductID) mapObject(value, key) -> {(key):sizeOf(value)}
var values = valuesOf(freq)
var productIds = keysOf(freq)
var zipped = zip(productIds, values)
var max_quantity = max(values)
var min_quantity = min(values)
var most_ordered_products = zipped filter $[1] == max_quantity
var least_ordered_products = zipped filter $[1] ==  min_quantity
var most_ordered_products_object = most_ordered_products map (value, index) -> {(value[0]):value[1]}
var least_ordered_products_object = least_ordered_products map (value, index) -> {(value[0]):value[1]}
---
 
{most_ordered:  most_ordered_products_object,
 least_ordered: least_ordered_products_object
}



]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="dataweave-class6Flow7" doc:id="0f164b3c-f589-4599-9bbb-565f1f3b7939">
		<ee:transform doc:name="how many products have price of more than 100, more than 50, more than 20 and less than 20?" doc:id="104c43ae-b8ed-45f2-ade2-a242d85fd234">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json

var category_added = payload map (value, index) ->{
	ProductID: value.ProductID,
	ProductName: value.ProductName,
	SupplierID: value.SupplierID,
	CategoryID: value.CategoryID,
	Unit: value.Unit,
	Price: value.Price,
	Category: if(value.Price > 100) "gt100" else if (value.Price > 50) 'gt50' else if (value.Price > 20) 'gt20' else 'lt20'
}
---

(category_added groupBy $.Category) mapObject(value, key) ->{(key): sizeOf(value)}

]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="dataweave-class6Flow8" doc:id="955e8ed5-7c9b-4e0e-a13e-274917ec3345" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="functions" doc:id="1287e615-b33c-4844-9555-2ce8ae63e1b3" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json

fun add_my_numbers(a, b) = a + b

fun is_it_odd_or_even(a) =
 if(mod(a, 2) == 0) 'even' else 'odd'
---
//add_my_numbers(5, 7)

is_it_odd_or_even(19)]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="dataweave-class6Flow4" doc:id="0b7b531f-dfb5-4ba1-9530-9d31525ee3e8" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="factorial" doc:id="cd0cfdcb-de02-4a8f-97c4-0c564be66482" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
fun get_functorial(x) = 
   if (x == 1)
      1
    else
      x * get_functorial(x-1)
---
//get_functorial(6)

(1 to 6) reduce (element, accu) -> element * accu]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="dataweave-class6Flow5" doc:id="19947d26-3350-4946-837a-0811db3a1789" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="sum of values in array using recursion" doc:id="d2a2aced-1e26-4721-8eb5-ad30d892cd2e" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
fun get_sum(x) = 
   if (sizeOf(x) == 1)
      x[0]
    else x[0] + get_sum(x[1 to -1])
 
---
get_sum(1 to 10)]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="reduce" doc:id="c11cb2a0-bc70-49e2-a047-4346fca0c23d" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="reduce" doc:id="3e34e1ea-c9ae-4ab9-9c0e-f23875e787f2" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
var myArray1 = 1 to 5
var myArray2 = 1 to 10
var myArray3 = [1,5,6, 'a', true, 10]
---
// product of the numbers
//myArray1 reduce(element, accu) -> accu * element


//combine numbers
//myArray1 reduce(element, accu = '') ->  accu ++ element


//reverse their order
//myArray1 reduce(element, accu = '') ->  element ++ accu

//product of even numbers

//myArray2 reduce(element, accu = 1) -> accu * (if(mod(element, 2)== 0) element else 1)

//sum of numeric values

myArray3 reduce(element, accu = 0) -> accu + (if(typeOf(element) == Number) element else 0)]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="dataweave-class6Flow6" doc:id="49621d29-0058-4600-9e7d-54e65013a39d" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="reverse order of keys in an object" doc:id="3709b67b-a4a2-46c2-bee4-889fc4b8940d" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json

var myData = {name: 'John',
	         age: 45,
	         occupation: 'IT',
	         birth_year: 1995
            }
---
myData plunk(value, key) ->{(key): value}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook batch error handler (mapping/transformation, filtering)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Batch Error Record Analysis
 * Category: Error Handling
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Analyze per-record batch failures using Mule 4.11's BatchError
 * objects. Generates structured error reports from batch job results, groups
 * failures by error type, and produces actionable summaries for retry logic
 * or alerting.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "batchJobId": "batch-001",
 *   "results": [
 *     {
 *       "recordId": "R001",
 *       "status": "SUCCESS"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "recordId": "R002",
 *       "status": "FAILED",
 *       "error": {
 *         "type": "CONNECTIVITY",
 *         "message": "Connection refused"
 *       }
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "recordId": "R003",
 *       "status": "FAILED",
 *       "error": {
 *         "type": "TRANSFORMATION",
 *         "message": "Cannot coerce String to Number"
 *       }
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "recordId": "R004",
 *       "status": "FAILED",
 *       "error": {
 *         "type": "CONNECTIVITY",
 *         "message": "Timeout on port 443"
 *       }
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "recordId": "R005",
 *       "status": "SUCCESS"
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "batchJobId": "batch-2026-02-22-001",
 * "summary": {"total": 1000, "succeeded": 2, "failed": 3, "failureRate": 0.6},
 * "failuresByType": {
 * "CONNECTIVITY": {"count": 2, "retryable": true, "sampleMessage": "Connection refused: orders-api:443"},
 * "TRANSFORMATION": {"count": 1, "retryable": false, "sampleMessage": "Cannot coerce String to Number"}
 * },
 * "retryRecords": ["R002", "R004"],
 * "requiresManualFix": ["R003"]
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var failures = payload.results filter $.status == "FAILED"
var retryableTypes = ["CONNECTIVITY", "TIMEOUT", "RATE_LIMIT"]
var grouped = failures groupBy $.error."type"
---
{
  batchJobId: payload.batchJobId,
  failuresByType: grouped mapObject (records, errorType) -> ({(errorType): {count: sizeOf(records), retryable: retryableTypes contains (errorType as String)}}),
  retryRecords: (failures filter (f) -> retryableTypes contains f.error."type") map $.recordId,
  manualFix: (failures filter (f) -> !(retryableTypes contains f.error."type")) map $.recordId
}

instruction: The **EOM-LCHTR Data Sync** application serves as a critical data migration and synchronization tool that transfers Salesforce data from the **EOM (En using DataWeave Transform, Error Handling, HTTP Listener, Salesforce Create, Salesforce Query with API endpoint /eom-lchtr-data-sync/Account
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:batch="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/batch"
	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce"
	xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/batch http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/batch/current/mule-batch.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd">
	<flow name="AccountFlow" doc:id="fc9ee110-2087-4409-9a23-98baedae6d3e" >
 		<http:listener doc:name="Listener" doc:id="83ea8416-7a3e-44a9-ae3a-2e436ec83777" config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="/eom-lchtr-data-sync/Account"/>
		<salesforce:query doc:name="AccountQuery" doc:id="3b9867a0-355f-45cf-9bea-d5185c33b7b7" config-ref="Salesforce_Config_EOM">
			<salesforce:salesforce-query ><![CDATA[SELECT ID,
ParentId,Name,Region__c,Region_Type__c,BillingStreet,BillingCity,BillingState,Unit__c,Ntl_Sales_Bill_With_Account_Number__c,Ntl_Sales_ICOMS_Account_Number__c,Ntl_Sales_Parent_Business_ID__c,Ntl_Sales_Parent_Business_Location__c,Ntl_Sales_Invoice_Presentation__c,Ntl_Sales_Account_Type__c,Ntl_Sales_Hierarchy_Flag__c,OwnerId,RecordTypeId,Management_Area__c,BillingAddress
,BillingCountry,
BillingPostalCode
FROM Account
WHERE Ntl_Sales_Account_Type__c ='VAR'
  AND Ntl_Sales_Hierarchy_Flag__c = 'Master Account'

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd">
	<flow name="data-setup" doc:id="ac193407-9643-46e6-90c5-6f4556c1eef3" >
		<scheduler doc:name="Scheduler" doc:id="1bee458f-8d0a-4591-aae0-71d413b96982" >
			<scheduling-strategy >
				<fixed-frequency startDelay="100" timeUnit="DAYS"/>
			</scheduling-strategy>
		</scheduler>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Original People Payload" doc:id="d0f542ac-65ea-46e0-ae6d-889e7e9e918e" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
[
    {
    	"id":"1111",
        "name": "Michael",
        "age": 34
    },
    {
    	"id":"2222",
        "name": "Andy",
        "age": 30
    },
    {
    	"id":"3333",
        "name": "Justin",
        "age": 19
    },
    {
    	"id":"4444",
        "name": "Alan",
        "age": 34
    },
    {
    	"id":"5555",
        "name": "Timmy",
        "age": 30
    },
    {
    	"id":"6666",
        "name": "Mark",
        "age": 19
    }
]]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Existing People in System" doc:id="0d8fc73e-f0e1-4e31-ad10-6aeb49c9e4a2" >
			<ee:message >
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="exisitngRecords" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
[
	{
    	"id":"4444",
        "name": "Alan",
        "age": 34
    },
    {
    	"id":"5555",
        "name": "Timmy",
        "age": 30
    },
    {
    	"id":"6666",
        "name": "Mark",
        "age": 19
    }
]]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Filtering Original Array with Existing Data" doc:id="8bb11a88-6f4b-4a2f-9655-b8fd6126a2b0" >
			<ee:message >
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="peopleWithMatch" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
//We collect the records that matches based on the Id from the origninal payload and 
//the existing data (This can be data you want to update)
(payload filter (vars.exisitngRecords.id contains ($.id)) map (record,indexOfrecord)->{
	(record),
	status:"Active" //just an additional attribute
})]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="peopleWithNoMatch" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
//We filter the original payload and we remove the records thet doesn't match
//So in this case these records can be the ones we need top create
payload filter (not (vars.exisitngRecords.id contains ($.id))) map $]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
</mule>

			<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---

				<ee:transform doc:name="errorMessage" doc:id="7ebaa92e-ca10-4dd8-a77d-bba693e5d19d" >
					<ee:message >

			</when>
