	<flow name="sf-resultsFlow" doc:id="e032d9ae-4240-4712-a7d9-47dcf581fed5" >
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger" doc:id="e249a51f-4a3b-497b-b41d-1a00ac7bfce3" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Entering into salesforce retrieve job failed flow for failed records">
			<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
{
    payload: JSONLoggerModule::stringifyNonJSON(payload) 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<ee:transform doc:name="JobId" doc:id="bad095ab-779f-4144-8734-d63174ac09d1" >
			<ee:message >
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="sfId" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.id]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<salesforce:retrieve-job-failed-results-bulk-v2 doc:name="Retrieve job failed results bulk v 2" doc:id="355cb801-3ac6-4fdb-955a-a10fcb765dc6" config-ref="SCQR_Salesforce_Config" id="#[vars.sfId]"/>
		<choice doc:name="recordCountCheck" doc:id="d620b789-6606-41e6-a642-117bddcba3d2" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload) > 0]">
				<ee:transform doc:name="converttoObject" doc:id="e01e83b3-fae1-4606-b947-51789d88c4f1">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
payload]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
				<ee:transform doc:name="mapping" doc:id="a9e57d51-a252-4cb3-939e-47c9f6207faa">
			<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p_opportunityFailedRecords.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="logResponse" doc:id="d623238a-ef7a-40fe-a3e8-3ce65c5d385a" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Before sending email to the distribution list with attached failed records file" >
					<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule output application/json ---
{
    payload: "Not logging failed records of its size" 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
				</json-logger:logger>
				<try doc:name="Try" doc:id="a88abf11-254f-40f7-a7a5-421cc110b0dc" >
					<ee:transform doc:name="Email properties" doc:id="cd1fa377-fa81-4735-bb57-6a849764be40" >
						<ee:message >
						</ee:message>
						<ee:variables >
							<ee:set-variable resource="dwl/v_errorEmailSubjectForDailyDeltaLoad.dwl" variableName="errorEmailSubject" />
						</ee:variables>
					</ee:transform>
					<email:send doc:name="SendEmail" doc:id="d871e1dc-760c-4cc6-bb06-3cc275b5aeaf" config-ref="Email_SMTP" fromAddress="${email.from}" subject='#[vars.errorEmailSubject]' toAddresses='#[vars.successEmailNotificationList splitBy ","]'>
						<email:body >
							<email:content ><![CDATA[#["Error records are attached"]]]></email:content>
						</email:body>
						<email:attachments><![CDATA[#[{
  ('Delta_Load_Failed_Records_' ++ (vars.sfId default "") ++ '.csv') : payload
}]]]></email:attachments>
					</email:send>
					<error-handler >
						<on-error-continue enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Continue" doc:id="88f64716-6e78-4a02-95bc-aee4fe6be89d" >
							<json-logger:logger doc:name="SCQR Failed records email for daily delta load is not sent for jobid" doc:id="6c370f44-ae42-4edc-8fea-32768b399dfa" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message='#["SCQR Failed records email for daily delta load is not sent for jobid : " ++ (vars.sfId default "")]'/>
						</on-error-continue>
					</error-handler>
				</try>
				<ee:transform doc:name="finalOutput" doc:id="677c787c-86f7-4f24-b841-0eaf1d7ecaaf">
			<ee:message>
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/p_dailyDeltaLoadFinalResponse.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
				<logger level="INFO" doc:name="finalResponseLog" doc:id="9db159f4-c638-4285-b321-3acfd5718764" message="successfully sent an email for the failed records to the provided distribution list for SF JobId -- -- #[vars.sfId]" />
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="noFailures" doc:id="9af650eb-58fc-46d7-8912-b8f020afaf1d" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message='#["No records failed from the provided Job Id -- " ++ vars.sfId]' tracePoint="END"/>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook index based lookup (mapping/transformation, filtering)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Index-Based Lookup
 * Category: Performance & Optimization
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Pre-index reference data into a keyed object for O(1)
 * lookups instead of O(n) filter scans. Dramatically improves performance
 * when joining large datasets.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "transactions": [
 *     {
 *       "id": "T1",
 *       "accountId": "A1",
 *       "amount": 500
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "T2",
 *       "accountId": "A2",
 *       "amount": 1200
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "T3",
 *       "accountId": "A1",
 *       "amount": 300
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "T4",
 *       "accountId": "A3",
 *       "amount": 750
 *     }
 *   ],
 *   "accounts": [
 *     {
 *       "id": "A1",
 *       "name": "Checking",
 *       "owner": "Alice"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "A2",
 *       "name": "Savings",
 *       "owner": "Bob"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "A3",
 *       "name": "Business",
 *       "owner": "Carol"
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * { "id": "TXN-001", "amount": 500, "accountName": "Checking", "owner": "Alice" },
 * { "id": "TXN-002", "amount": 1200, "accountName": "Savings", "owner": "Bob" },
 * { "id": "TXN-003", "amount": 300, "accountName": "Checking", "owner": "Alice" },
 * { "id": "TXN-004", "amount": 800, "accountName": "Business", "owner": "Carol" }
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var accountIndex = payload.accounts indexBy $.id
---
payload.transactions map (txn) -> do {
    var account = accountIndex[txn.accountId]
    ---
    ({ id: txn.id, amount: txn.amount, accountName: account.name default "Unknown", owner: account.owner default "Unknown" })
}

The **Crosswalk Salesforce Process API** (crosswalk-sf-papi) is a MuleSoft 4 Process API that acts as an integration middleware between Salesforce CRM using DataWeave Transform, Error Handling, HTTP Listener, HTTP Request with API endpoint /${api.name}/api/${api.version}/console/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:tls="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tls" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd  http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tls http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tls/current/mule-tls.xsd">
    <http:request-config name="HTTP_Request_configuration" doc:name="HTTP Request configuration" doc:id="45bd07c2-eca4-42f9-b114-d653e164f436">
        <http:request-connection protocol="HTTPS" host="hydra-vip.chtrse.com" port="443">
            <tls:context>
                <tls:trust-store insecure="true" />
            </tls:context>
        </http:request-connection>
    </http:request-config>
    <flow name="crosswalk-sf-papi-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <json-logger:logger doc:name="Entry Logger" doc:id="c9aecdec-8b74-4768-bbef-c89b3c8e5e96" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="#['Entry Logger']" />
        <apikit:router config-ref="crosswalk-sf-papi-config" />
        <json-logger:logger doc:name="End Logger" doc:id="8b20f3bb-3c12-4f48-bd9e-95269c84178d" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="#[' End of crosswalk-sf-papi process']" tracePoint="END" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate>
                <error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="0d78b943-1d27-49de-b3d3-e8a543efa6b0" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config" previousErrors="#[flatten([error.errorMessage.payload default []])]" correlationId="#[vars.headers.txnId default uuid()]" />
                <set-variable variableName="httpStatus" value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set HTTP Status Code" />
                <json-logger:logger doc:name="logError" doc:id="1ff9203d-6375-417f-a709-369d9fa3bae7" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="#['After Receiving Error']" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" />
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="crosswalk-sf-papi-console">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/console/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>

            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="crosswalk-sf-papi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>

            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\engineeringDetails:crosswalk-sf-papi-config">
        <!-- <flow-ref doc:name="salesforce-operationsFlow" doc:id="ae0309ae-195b-400f-952e-ecba7c86b8d9" name="salesforce-operationsFlow" /> -->
        <flow-ref doc:name="salesforce-operationsFlow" doc:id="f100c9c1-7bcb-4cd2-a700-431aeaebf258" name="salesforce-operationsFlow" />
    </flow>

output application/json
---
{
  "success": true,
  "apiName": p('app.name'),
  "version": p('app.version'),
  "correlationId": correlationId,

    Status: "crosswalk-sf-papi is up and running"
  }
}]]></ee:set-payload>
            </ee:message>
        </ee:transform>

    <flow name="get:\offnetRfq:crosswalk-sf-papi-config">
        <flow-ref doc:name="query-salesforce-offnetRfq" doc:id="8e3d4f53-6178-4114-9cd3-43f76592bf1c" name="query-salesforce-offnet-rfq-flow" />

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook hierarchical lookup (mapping/transformation, filtering)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Hierarchical Lookup
 * Category: Lookup & Enrichment
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Build a parent-child hierarchy tree from flat data using
 * a parent ID reference. Common for org charts, product categories,
 * bill of materials (BOM), and folder/menu structures.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * [
 *   {
 *     "id": "1",
 *     "name": "CEO",
 *     "parentId": null
 *   },
 *   {
 *     "id": "2",
 *     "name": "VP Engineering",
 *     "parentId": "1"
 *   },
 *   {
 *     "id": "3",
 *     "name": "VP Sales",
 *     "parentId": "1"
 *   },
 *   {
 *     "id": "4",
 *     "name": "Dev Lead",
 *     "parentId": "2"
 *   },
 *   {
 *     "id": "5",
 *     "name": "QA Lead",
 *     "parentId": "2"
 *   },
 *   {
 *     "id": "6",
 *     "name": "Account Mgr",
 *     "parentId": "3"
 *   }
 * ]
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "id": "1",
 * "name": "Company",
 * "children": [
 * {
 * "id": "2",
 * "name": "Engineering",
 * "children": [
 * { "id": "4", "name": "Frontend", "children": [
 * { "id": "8", "name": "React Team", "children": [] }
 * ]},
 * { "id": "5", "name": "Backend", "children": [
 * { "id": "9", "name": "API Team", "children": [] }
 * ]}
 * ]
 * },
 * {
 * "id": "3",
 * "name": "Marketing",
 * "children": [
 * { "id": "6", "name": "Content", "children": [] },
 * { "id": "7", "name": "SEO", "children": [] }
 * ]
 * }
 * ]
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var childrenByParent = payload groupBy ($.parentId default "ROOT")
fun buildTree(nodeId: String): Object = do {
    var node = (payload filter $.id == nodeId)[0]
    var children = childrenByParent[nodeId] default []
    ---
    ({ id: node.id, name: node.name, children: children map (child) -> buildTree(child.id) })
}
var roots = payload filter $.parentId == null
---
if (sizeOf(roots) == 1) buildTree(roots[0].id) else roots map (root) -> buildTree(root.id)

instruction: The **SF-Pega Errors Sync App** is an event-driven MuleSoft integration application that bridges Salesforce (SFDC) and Pega Workforce Optimization (WF using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, HTTP Request
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:validation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:kafka="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka/current/mule-kafka.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation/current/mule-validation.xsd">
	<flow name="sf-pega-errors-sync-appflow" doc:id="209e1e95-49a0-418f-b725-dfe646e3e44c" >
		<kafka:message-listener doc:id="bc3b3617-7191-4350-8d5f-bc7e4122e819" config-ref="Apache_Kafka_Consumer_configuration" ackMode="IMMEDIATE" parallelConsumersAmount="${kafka.consumers}" doc:name="Consumes messages from Error topic" />
		<set-payload value="#[payload]" doc:name="Changing Payload to JSON" doc:id="7940a60d-1795-42c1-b3bf-584b3641509f" mimeType="application/json" />
		<set-variable value="#[payload]" doc:name="originalPayload" doc:id="2050d832-24c1-4fec-901f-542661baf506" variableName="originalPayload" />
		<json-logger:logger doc:id="2e726d94-f95e-40d4-994a-4b5f84ce55ba" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Received Message from error topic topic" doc:name="Log kafka payload" />
		<choice doc:name="Check payload size" doc:id="51305703-e016-49fe-93dd-d7415a92c055" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload) > 0]" >
				<flow-ref doc:name="token-flow" doc:id="c52aa174-dd7a-4bf4-adfc-fa8d3625ba69" name="token_flow"/>
				<choice doc:name="Check access token is null" doc:id="662aa891-764a-46bb-975d-eeb29aeb5e10">
					<when expression="#[vars.token.access_token != null]">
						<http:request method="POST" doc:name="Pega Request" doc:id="ba8dba2f-50f0-46ec-b8a6-98709990481e" config-ref="HTTP_Request_configuration-pegacloud" responseTimeout="${http.responsetimeout}" path="${pega.resource}">
							<reconnect frequency="${pega.reconnectionfrequency}" count="${pega.reconnectionattempts}" />
							<http:headers ><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"Authorization" : "Bearer " ++ vars.token.access_token 
}]]]></http:headers>
						</http:request>
						<json-logger:logger doc:id="cec47103-8a34-4a44-96b9-df3e3b797770" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After Sending integration error Message successfully to PEGA" tracePoint="END" doc:name="Success Response" />
					</when>
					<otherwise >
						<ee:transform doc:name="Error details" doc:id="09db5a32-c445-4920-8475-6fcd292e7db4" >
							<ee:message >
								<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/failure_response.dwl" />
							</ee:message>
							<ee:variables >
								<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
p('error.badrequestcode')]]></ee:set-variable>
							</ee:variables>
						</ee:transform>
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="Failure Response" doc:id="8f43f8ad-181b-4436-bd58-849c1ed08a06" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Invalid token error message" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" />
					</otherwise>
				</choice>
			
</when>
			<otherwise >
				<json-logger:logger doc:id="499c1aa1-4168-4157-8886-a10401676cda" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Getting Empty payload of Integration Error from SFDC" tracePoint="END" doc:name="Log the empty payload" />
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
		<error-handler >
			<on-error-continue enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Continue" doc:id="1900b0b0-bbc1-4a28-a9db-6119321a0c5b" type="HTTP:CONNECTIVITY" >
				<ee:transform doc:name="webexVar" doc:id="31daa44c-5fa1-48a4-af57-0f981ee790d8" >
					<ee:message >
					</ee:message>
					<ee:variables >
						<ee:set-variable resource="dwl/http_connectivity_error.dwl" variableName="webexVar" />
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
				<async doc:name="Async" doc:id="f1505c16-fd74-4326-9c74-b853e34880df" >
					<validation:is-true doc:id="b5063b12-5ead-4524-8480-d83f2a6cd363" config-ref="Validation_Config" expression="#[Mule::p('webex.alert')]" message="Alert suppressed: Webex notifications are disabled by configuration." doc:name="Is true" />
					<http:request method="POST" doc:name="Request to Webex service" doc:id="ba40c438-7557-49ea-8fe9-1aa36ae7466c" config-ref="WEBEX_HTTPS_Request_configuration" path="${secure::webex.webhookId.wfo}" >
						<http:body ><![CDATA[#[vars.webexVar]]]></http:body>
					</http:request>
				
</async>
				<ee:transform doc:name="Connectivity error response" doc:id="83285571-c2e2-42e4-81d9-bc3e5cf03d1f" >
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/connectivity_error.dwl" />
					</ee:message>
					<ee:variables >
						<ee:set-variable resource="dwl/error_status_500.dwl" variableName="httpStatus" />
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:id="48b1e323-325a-46cf-b836-58d44b384022" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Http Connectivity Error Response" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" doc:name="Log HTTP connectivity error " />
			</on-error-continue>
			<on-error-continue enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Continue" doc:id="49cf8c83-e0d7-4508-af33-9e41a03f7e8f" type="HTTP:BAD_REQUEST" >
				<ee:transform doc:name="Error Details" doc:id="1e671437-98d8-411c-9185-fd9056e44c71" >
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/badrequest_error.dwl" />
					</ee:message>
					<ee:variables >
						<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
p('error.badrequestcode')]]></ee:set-variable>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for v pendingWO (mapping/transformation, filtering)
Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook cross reference mapping (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Cross-Reference Mapping
 * Category: Lookup & Enrichment
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Map identifiers between different systems using a cross-
 * reference table. Essential for Salesforce ↔ SAP, CRM ↔ ERP, and any
 * multi-system integration where each system has its own ID scheme.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "sourceSystem": "SF",
 *   "targetSystem": "SAP",
 *   "records": [
 *     {
 *       "sfAccountId": "SF001",
 *       "name": "Acme",
 *       "amount": 5000
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "sfAccountId": "SF002",
 *       "name": "Beta",
 *       "amount": 3000
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "sfAccountId": "SF099",
 *       "name": "Ghost",
 *       "amount": 100
 *     }
 *   ],
 *   "crossReference": [
 *     {
 *       "sf": "SF001",
 *       "sap": "SAP-A1"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "sf": "SF002",
 *       "sap": "SAP-B2"
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "mapped": [
 * { "KUNNR": "KUNNR-10001", "NAME1": "Acme Corp", "NETWR": 50000, "_source": "001A000001ABC123" },
 * { "KUNNR": "KUNNR-10002", "NAME1": "Globex Inc", "NETWR": 75000, "_source": "001A000001DEF456" }
 * ],
 * "unmapped": [
 * { "sfAccountId": "001A000001GHI789", "name": "Initech", "reason": "No cross-reference found" }
 * ],
 * "summary": { "total": 3, "mapped": 2, "unmapped": 1 }
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
import partition from dw::core::Arrays
output application/json
var xrefIndex = payload.crossReference indexBy $.sf
var parts = payload.records partition (rec) -> xrefIndex[rec.sfAccountId]?
---
{
  mapped: parts.success map (rec) -> ({
    sapId: xrefIndex[rec.sfAccountId].sap,
    name: rec.name, amount: rec.amount
  }),
  unmapped: parts.failure map {sfAccountId: $.sfAccountId, reason: "No cross-reference found"},
  summary: {total: sizeOf(payload.records), mapped: sizeOf(parts.success)}
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for updateConstructionJobMapping (filtering)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/java
var serviceDeliveryManager = vars.originalPayload.serviceDeliveryManager
var ownerId = vars.originalPayload.ownerId

fun dateNull(value)=if ( lower(value) == "null" or value == " " ) " "  else value as Date {
	format:'MM-dd-yyyy'
}
fun getUserId(userPID) = do {
	if ( lower(userPID) == "null" ) " "
	else do{
		var correctUser = (vars.userDetails filter ((item, index) -> item.Charter_PID__c == userPID))
		---
		if ( isEmpty(correctUser) ) " " 
			else correctUser[0].Id default " "
	}
}
fun stringNull(value) = if ( lower(value) == "null" ) " "  else value
fun notesUser(newnote)=if ( ((vars.userDetails filter ((item, index) -> item.Charter_PID__c == newnote.userId)).Name[0]) != null ) ((vars.userDetails filter ((item, index) -> item.Charter_PID__c == newnote.userId)).Name[0])
else
""
fun notesConcat(oldNotes,newnotes)=(if ( oldNotes != null ) ("[ " ++ (if ( newnotes.context != null ) (newnotes.context ++ " | ") else "") ++ notesUser(newnotes) ++ (if ( newnotes.createdTimeStamp != null ) " | " ++ newnotes.createdTimeStamp else "") ++ (if ( newnotes.sourceSystemName != null ) " | " ++ newnotes.sourceSystemName else "") ++ (if ( newnotes.'type' != null ) " | " ++ newnotes.'type' ++ " ]" else " ]") ++ "\n" ++ (if ( newnotes.content != null ) (newnotes.content ++ "\n" ++ "\n") 
else (newnotes.content default "" ++ "\n")) ++  oldNotes)
else ("[ " ++ (if ( newnotes.context != null ) (newnotes.context ++ " | ")  else "") ++ notesUser(newnotes) ++ (if ( newnotes.createdTimeStamp != null ) " | " ++ newnotes.createdTimeStamp else "") ++ (if ( newnotes.sourceSystemName != null ) " | " ++ newnotes.sourceSystemName else "") ++ (if ( newnotes.'type' != null ) " | " ++ newnotes.'type' ++ " ]" else " ]") ++ (if ( newnotes.content != null ) ("\n" ++  newnotes.content default "") else (newnotes.content default ""))))
var prismnotes = (vars.originalPayload.notes filter ((item, index) -> item."type" ==  "PRISM Construction Notes"))[0] default ""
var notes =(vars.originalPayload.notes filter ((item, index) -> item."type" ==  "Construction Notes"))[0] default ""
---
[{
	"Id": vars.originalPayload.Id,
	("Svc_Delivery_Manager__c": getUserId(serviceDeliveryManager))if(serviceDeliveryManager != null),
	("Confirmed_TSD__c": dateNull(vars.originalPayload.confirmedTSD))if(vars.originalPayload.confirmedTSD != null),
	("Job_Type__c": stringNull(vars.originalPayload.jobType))if(vars.originalPayload.jobType != null),
	("Construction_Type__c": stringNull(vars.originalPayload.constructionType))if(vars.originalPayload.constructionType != null),
	("Product_Families_for_Construction__c": stringNull(vars.originalPayload.productFamiliesForConstruction))if(vars.originalPayload.productFamiliesForConstruction != null),
	("Plant_Type__c": stringNull(vars.originalPayload.plantType))if(vars.originalPayload.plantType != null),
	("Status__c": stringNull(vars.originalPayload.constructionStatus))if(vars.originalPayload.constructionStatus != null),
	("Sub_Status__c": stringNull(vars.originalPayload.constructionSubStatus))if(vars.originalPayload.constructionSubStatus != null),
	("Site_Survey__c": stringNull(vars.originalPayload."Site Survey"))if(vars.originalPayload."Site Survey" != null),
	("Estimated_Completion_Date__c": dateNull(vars.originalPayload.tentativeServiceDate))if(vars.originalPayload.tentativeServiceDate != null),
	("PRISM_Construction_Notes__c": notesConcat(payload.PRISM_Construction_Notes__c[0],prismnotes)) if (vars.originalPayload.notes.."type" contains ("PRISM Construction Notes")),
	("Notes__c": notesConcat(payload.Notes__c[0],notes)) if (vars.originalPayload.notes.."type" contains ("Construction Notes")),
	("Spectrum_Business_Expected_Resolve_Date__c": dateNull(vars.originalPayload.spectrumBusinessExpectedResolveDate))if(vars.originalPayload.spectrumBusinessExpectedResolveDate != null),
	("OwnerId": getUserId(ownerId))if(!isEmpty(ownerId) and (getUserId(ownerId) != " "))
	
}]

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook try pattern (mapping/transformation, filtering)
Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook flatten nested (mapping/transformation, flattening nested data)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Flatten Nested Arrays
 * Category: Array Manipulation
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Flatten nested arrays into a single-level array. Common when
 * dealing with API responses that return arrays of arrays (e.g., orders with
 * line items, departments with employees) and you need a flat list.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "departments": [
 *     {
 *       "name": "Engineering",
 *       "employees": [
 *         {
 *           "id": "E001",
 *           "name": "Alice Chen",
 *           "role": "Senior Developer"
 *         },
 *         {
 *           "id": "E002",
 *           "name": "Bob Martinez",
 *           "role": "DevOps Engineer"
 *         }
 *       ]
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "name": "Marketing",
 *       "employees": [
 *         {
 *           "id": "M001",
 *           "name": "Carol Nguyen",
 *           "role": "Content Strategist"
 *         },
 *         {
 *           "id": "M002",
 *           "name": "David Kim",
 *           "role": "SEO Analyst"
 *         },
 *         {
 *           "id": "M003",
 *           "name": "Elena Rossi",
 *           "role": "Brand Manager"
 *         }
 *       ]
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * {"id": "E001", "name": "Alice Chen", "role": "Senior Developer", "department": "Engineering"},
 * {"id": "E002", "name": "Bob Martinez", "role": "DevOps Engineer", "department": "Engineering"},
 * {"id": "M001", "name": "Carol Nguyen", "role": "Content Strategist", "department": "Marketing"},
 * {"id": "M002", "name": "David Kim", "role": "SEO Analyst", "department": "Marketing"},
 * {"id": "M003", "name": "Elena Rossi", "role": "Brand Manager", "department": "Marketing"}
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.departments flatMap (dept) -> dept.employees map (emp) -> emp ++ {department: dept.name}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shyamrajprasad dataweave fun dynamicMapper (mapping/transformation, aggregation, XML handling)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
fun dynamicValue(value) = 
    if (value is Object) value mapObject ($$): dynamicValue($)
    else if  (value is String and (value contains "<payload.")) dynamicSelector( value[1 to -2] splitBy  ".") else value
fun dynamicSelector(x)=x reduce ((item, accumulator =payload[x[0]] ) -> 
  if(item == "payload") payload[item] else accumulator[item]
) 
---
payload.mapper mapObject ((value, key, index) -> 
            (key):dynamicValue(value))

instruction: Create a Mule 4 flow named 'api-main' using Error Handling, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /api/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule 
    xmlns:opentelemetry="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/opentelemetry" 
    xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" 
    xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" 
    xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" 
    xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" 
    xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" 
    xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" 
    xsi:schemaLocation="
        http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core 
        http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd 
        http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http 
        http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd 
        http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit 
        http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd 
        http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core
        http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
    ">

    <flow name="api-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="api-httpListenerConfig" path="/api/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]"> 
                <http:body>#[payload]</http:body>
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:error-response> 
        </http:listener>
		<apikit:router config-ref="api-config" />
		<error-handler ref="global-error-handler"/>
    </flow>

    <flow name="api-console">
        <http:listener config-ref="api-httpListenerConfig" path="/console/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body>#[payload]</http:body> 
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener> 
        <apikit:console config-ref="api-config" />
		<error-handler ref="global-error-handler" />
    </flow>

    <flow name="delete:\customers\(customerId):api-config">
        <flow-ref doc:name="Delete" name="deleteFlow"/>
    </flow>
    
    <flow name="get:\customers:api-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="get-by-name" name="getByName"/>
    </flow>
    
    <flow name="get:\customers\(customerId):api-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="get" name="getById"/>
    </flow>
    
    <flow name="post:\customers:application\json:api-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="post" name="post:\customers"/>
    </flow>
</mule>

	)

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook timezone conversion (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Timezone Conversion
 * Category: Date/Time
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Convert datetimes between timezones using the >> operator.
 * Critical for global integrations where systems operate in different
 * timezones — converting UTC to local time, normalizing timestamps
 * for storage, and displaying times in user-local timezones.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "eventTime": "2026-02-15T14:30:00Z",
 *   "targetZones": [
 *     {
 *       "name": "New York",
 *       "offset": "-05:00"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "name": "Tokyo",
 *       "offset": "+09:00"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "name": "Kolkata",
 *       "offset": "+05:30"
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "originalUTC": "2026-02-15T14:30:00Z",
 * "newYork": "2026-02-15T09:30:00-05:00",
 * "losAngeles": "2026-02-15T06:30:00-08:00",
 * "london": "2026-02-15T14:30:00Z",
 * "tokyo": "2026-02-15T23:30:00+09:00",
 * "kolkata": "2026-02-15T20:00:00+05:30",
 * "meetingInUTC": "2026-02-15T14:00:00Z",
 * "meetingInTokyo": "2026-02-15T23:00:00+09:00"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var utcTime = payload.eventTime as DateTime
---
{
  originalUTC: utcTime as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"},
  conversions: payload.targetZones map (zone) -> ({
    city: zone.name,
    localTime: (utcTime >> (zone.offset as TimeZone)) as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"}
  })
}

instruction: Create a Mule 4 flow named 'Manual_WaterMarking:MySQL_2_Postgres_partial_data' using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, Database Insert, Database Select, For Each Loop
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:db="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db"
	xmlns:os="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os/current/mule-os.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db/current/mule-db.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd">
	<flow name="Manual_WaterMarking:MySQL_2_Postgres_partial_data" doc:id="bd238ccd-fe67-4827-baab-2308376f6eaf" >
		<scheduler doc:name="Scheduler" doc:id="ce6e3f24-0df7-42f3-a7a4-abaa282b9a3d" >
			<scheduling-strategy >
				<fixed-frequency frequency="5" timeUnit="SECONDS" />
			</scheduling-strategy>
		</scheduler>
		<os:retrieve doc:name="maxID" doc:id="53bc1896-d1d1-4f09-83d9-5506ad175c94" key="maxID" target="maxID" >
			<os:default-value ><![CDATA[0]]></os:default-value>
		</os:retrieve>
		<db:select doc:name="Select" doc:id="102c08d8-f34e-4075-b351-c40769bdca13" config-ref="MySQL_Database_Config" >
			<db:sql ><![CDATA[SELECT PersonID, LastNamE, FirstName, Address, State FROM persons
WHERE PersonID > :max_id AND State IN ('Connecticut', 'Maine', 'Massachusetts', 'New Hampshire', 'Rhode Island', 'Vermont')]]></db:sql>
			<db:input-parameters ><![CDATA[#[{'max_id':vars.maxID}]]]></db:input-parameters>
		</db:select>
		<set-variable value="#[sizeOf(payload)]" doc:name="Size of Payload" doc:id="90fc4a20-caa1-4c23-adb1-112ef735aef8" variableName="size_var" />
		<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="df111ab2-6dfb-46fb-b583-468ae81051ac" >
			<when expression="#[not isEmpty(payload)]" >
				<os:store doc:name="maxID" doc:id="7bc2f6cf-fa83-44fa-b348-26565a970736" key="maxID">
			<os:value><![CDATA[#[max(payload.*PersonID)]]]></os:value>
		</os:store>
				<foreach doc:name="For Each" doc:id="e0583bb3-4306-47fc-8988-1aea3773b049" >
					<db:insert doc:name="Insert into Postgres" doc:id="7c59362b-fdb0-4968-bb3a-420673a14776" config-ref="Postgres_Database_Config" >
						<db:sql ><![CDATA[INSERT INTO newengland(personid, lastName, firstName, address, state)
VALUES (:personID, :lastName, :firstName, :address, :state)]]></db:sql>
						<db:input-parameters ><![CDATA[#[{
	'personID':payload.PersonID, 
	'lastName':payload.LastName, 
	 'firstName':payload.FirstName,
	 'address': payload.Address,
	 "state":payload.State
}]]]></db:input-parameters>
					</db:insert>
					<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="712e2b19-3a5f-4263-939b-b93903266a55" >
						<ee:message >
							<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	"message": vars.size_var as String ++ " records inserted into Postgres."
}]]></ee:set-payload>
						</ee:message>
					</ee:transform>
					<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="8c2b08f6-b74e-42da-8855-8188fb9aac57" message="========================================================================================================================================" />
					<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="8a3759e8-5a38-4f8b-a10b-41f052f666f7" message="#[payload]" />
				</foreach>
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="811d8503-e48a-4678-9f19-7918affe395c" message="No new records found!" />
				<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="e2077866-b258-4d4f-9a01-03f0814170fd" message="============================================================================================" />
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
	</flow>
</mule>

		<scatter-gather doc:name="Scatter-Gather" doc:id="9e41526b-af12-4431-9ef5-2eb6536c4b52" >
